title: Interpretable AI-Assisted Early Reliability Prediction for a Two-Parameter Parallel Root-Finding Scheme
summary: We propose an interpretable AI-assisted reliability diagnostic framework for parameterized root-finding schemes based on kNN-LLE proxy stability profiling and multi-horizon early prediction. The approach augments a numerical solver with a lightweight predictive layer that estimates solver reliability from short prefixes of iteration dynamics, enabling early identification of stable and unstable parameter regimes. For each configuration in the parameter space, raw and smoothed proxy profiles of a largest Lyapunov exponent (LLE) estimator are constructed, from which contractivity-based reliability scores summarizing finite-time convergence are derived. Machine learning models predict the reliability score from early segments of the proxy profile, allowing the framework to determine when solver dynamics become diagnostically informative. Experiments on a two-parameter parallel root-finding scheme show reliable prediction after only a few iterations: the best models achieve R^2=0.48 at horizon T=1, improve to R^2=0.67 by T=3, and exceed R^2=0.89 before the characteristic minimum-location scale of the stability profile. Prediction accuracy increases to R^2=0.96 at larger horizons, with mean absolute errors around 0.03, while inference costs remain negligible (microseconds per sample). The framework provides interpretable stability indicators and supports early decisions during solver execution, such as continuing, restarting, or adjusting parameters.

AI.tldr: 提出基于kNN-LLE代理稳定性分析和多时间尺度早期预测的可解释AI辅助可靠性诊断框架，用于参数化求根方案
AI.motivation: 传统数值求解器在参数化求根问题中难以早期识别稳定与不稳定参数区域，需要一种能够从迭代动态早期阶段预测求解器可靠性的方法
AI.method: 结合kNN-LLE代理稳定性分析和多时间尺度早期预测，构建轻量级预测层，从迭代动态的早期片段估计求解器可靠性，推导基于收缩性的可靠性评分
AI.result: 在两参数并行求根方案实验中，仅需几次迭代即可实现可靠预测：最佳模型在T=1时R²=0.48，T=3时提升至0.67，在稳定性特征最小位置尺度前超过0.89，更大时间尺度下R²达0.96，平均绝对误差约0.03，推理成本可忽略（微秒级）
AI.conclusion: 该框架提供可解释的稳定性指标，支持求解器执行期间的早期决策（继续、重启或调整参数），实现了高效可靠的AI辅助数值求解诊断

title: A space-time dual-pairing summation-by-parts framework for forward and adjoint wave equations
summary: In this paper, we propose the first of its kind space-time dual-pairing summation by parts (DP-SBP) numerical framework for forward and adjoint wave propagation problems. This novel approach enables us to achieve spatial and temporal high order accuracy while naturally introducing dissipation in time. Within this framework, initial and boundary conditions are weakly imposed using the simultaneous approximation term (SAT) technique. Fully discrete energy estimates are derived, ensuring the stability of the resulting numerical scheme. Furthermore, the proposed space-time numerical framework allows us to construct adjoint consistent fully discrete numerical approximations, which can be applied to solve inverse wave propagation problems. We provide numerical experiments in one and two spatial dimensions to verify the theoretical analysis and demonstrate convergence of numerical errors.

AI.tldr: 提出首个时空对偶配对求和分部（DP-SBP）数值框架，用于正演和伴随波传播问题，实现时空高阶精度并自然引入时间耗散。
AI.motivation: 需要开发一种能够同时处理正演和伴随波传播问题的数值框架，该框架应具备时空高阶精度、自然时间耗散特性，并能用于解决反演波传播问题。
AI.method: 采用时空对偶配对求和分部（DP-SBP）方法，结合同时逼近项（SAT）技术弱施加初始和边界条件，构建完全离散的能量估计以确保数值格式稳定性。
AI.result: 建立了稳定的完全离散数值格式，实现了伴随一致性，能够用于解决反演波传播问题，并通过一维和二维数值实验验证了理论分析和数值误差收敛性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的时空DP-SBP框架是首个能够同时处理正演和伴随波传播问题的数值方法，具备时空高阶精度、自然时间耗散和伴随一致性，适用于反演问题求解。

title: On the role of relaxation and acceleration in the non-overlapping Schwarz alternating method for coupling
summary: The purpose of this paper is to study the influence of relaxation and acceleration techniques on the convergence behavior of the non-overlapping Schwarz algorithm with alternating Dirichlet-Neumann transmission conditions in the context of domain decomposition- (DD-) based coupling. After demonstrating that the multiplicative Schwarz scheme can be formulated as a fixed-point iteration, we explore, both theoretically and numerically, two promising techniques for speeding up the method: (i) Aitken acceleration and (ii) Anderson acceleration. In the process, we derive a robust and efficient adaptive variant of Anderson acceleration, termed "Anderson with memory adaptation". We compare the proposed acceleration strategies to the well-known classical relaxed Dirichlet-Neumann Schwarz alternating method. Our results suggest that, while Aitken-accelerated Schwarz is the best approach in terms efficiency and robustness when considering two sub-domain DDs, Anderson-accelerated Schwarz is the method of choice in larger multi-domain setting.

AI.tldr: 研究松弛和加速技术对非重叠Schwarz算法收敛行为的影响，比较Aitken加速和Anderson加速在域分解耦合中的表现
AI.motivation: 研究如何通过加速技术改进非重叠Schwarz算法的收敛性能，特别是在域分解耦合场景中，探索更高效的数值计算方法
AI.method: 将乘性Schwarz格式表述为不动点迭代，理论分析和数值实验结合，研究Aitken加速和Anderson加速技术，并提出自适应Anderson加速变体"Anderson with memory adaptation"
AI.result: Aitken加速Schwarz在双子域设置中效率和鲁棒性最佳，而Anderson加速Schwarz在更多子域的多域设置中表现更优
AI.conclusion: 不同加速技术适用于不同域分解场景：Aitken加速适合双子域问题，Anderson加速适合多子域问题，提出的自适应Anderson加速变体具有鲁棒性和高效性

title: Multi-Modal Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning for Radiology Report Generation: Radiologist-Like Workflow with Clinically Verifiable Rewards
summary: We propose MARL-Rad, a novel multi-modal multi-agent reinforcement learning framework for radiology report generation that coordinates region-specific agents and a global integrating agent, optimized via clinically verifiable rewards. Unlike prior single-model reinforcement learning or post-hoc agentization of independently trained models, our method jointly trains multiple agents and optimizes the entire agent system through reinforcement learning. Experiments on the MIMIC-CXR and IU X-ray datasets show that MARL-Rad consistently improves clinically efficacy (CE) metrics such as RadGraph, CheXbert, and GREEN scores, achieving state-of-the-art CE performance. Further analyses confirm that MARL-Rad enhances laterality consistency and produces more accurate, detail-informed reports.

AI.tldr: MARL-Rad是一个用于放射学报告生成的多模态多智能体强化学习框架，通过协调区域特定智能体和全局整合智能体，使用临床可验证奖励进行优化，在临床效能指标上达到最先进水平。
AI.motivation: 现有的放射学报告生成方法通常使用单一模型的强化学习，或者对独立训练的模型进行后处理智能体化，这些方法无法联合训练多个智能体并通过强化学习优化整个智能体系统。
AI.method: 提出MARL-Rad框架，协调区域特定智能体和全局整合智能体，使用临床可验证奖励进行多智能体强化学习优化，联合训练多个智能体并优化整个智能体系统。
AI.result: 在MIMIC-CXR和IU X-ray数据集上的实验表明，MARL-Rad在RadGraph、CheXbert和GREEN等临床效能指标上持续改进，达到最先进的临床效能表现，同时增强了侧向一致性和生成更准确、细节丰富的报告。
AI.conclusion: MARL-Rad通过多模态多智能体强化学习框架有效提升了放射学报告生成的临床效能，为医疗报告生成提供了一种新的协同智能体优化方法。

title: Modified Halley's method for computation of zeros of solution of second order ODEs
summary: This paper develops an efficient iterative method for computing all zeros of solutions of second order ordinary differential equations. A third order Halleys method is first derived by approximating the solution of an associated Riccati differential equation. To improve computational efficiency, a modified Halleys method is proposed by fixing one of the functions in Halleys scheme as a constant. The modified Halleys method also retains third order convergence. Based on the behavior of the coefficients of the second order ODE, nonlocal convergence results are established for both Halleys and modified Halleys methods. Suitable initial guesses for computing all zeros of solutions of second order ODEs in a given interval are also presented for both methods. Furthermore, algorithms based on the modified Halleys method are developed for to compute all nodes and weights for Gauss Legendre and Gauss Hermite quadratures. A comparative numerical study with recent methods demonstrates the efficiency of the proposed algorithms.

AI.tldr: 提出计算二阶常微分方程解的所有零点的有效迭代方法，包括三阶Halley方法和改进的Halley方法，并应用于高斯-勒让德和高斯-埃尔米特求积的节点与权重计算。
AI.motivation: 需要高效计算二阶常微分方程解的所有零点，这在数值分析中具有重要应用，特别是对于高斯求积公式的节点和权重计算。
AI.method: 1. 通过近似关联的Riccati微分方程推导三阶Halley方法；2. 提出改进的Halley方法，将Halley方案中的一个函数固定为常数以提高计算效率；3. 基于二阶ODE系数行为建立非局部收敛性结果；4. 为两种方法提供合适的初始猜测；5. 基于改进的Halley方法开发计算高斯-勒让德和高斯-埃尔米特求积节点与权重的算法。
AI.result: 改进的Halley方法保持三阶收敛性，同时提高计算效率。建立了两种方法的非局部收敛性理论。开发的算法在数值实验中表现出优于现有方法的效率。
AI.conclusion: 提出的改进Halley方法能高效计算二阶ODE解的所有零点，特别适用于高斯求积公式的数值实现，具有理论和实际应用价值。

title: Tokenization vs. Augmentation: A Systematic Study of Writer Variance in IMU-Based Online Handwriting Recognition
summary: Inertial measurement unit-based online handwriting recognition enables the recognition of input signals collected across different writing surfaces but remains challenged by uneven character distributions and inter-writer variability. In this work, we systematically investigate two strategies to address these issues: sub-word tokenization and concatenation-based data augmentation. Our experiments on the OnHW-Words500 dataset reveal a clear dichotomy between handling inter-writer and intra-writer variance. On the writer-independent split, structural abstraction via Bigram tokenization significantly improves performance to unseen writing styles, reducing the word error rate (WER) from 15.40% to 12.99%. In contrast, on the writer-dependent split, tokenization degrades performance due to vocabulary distribution shifts between the training and validation sets. Instead, our proposed concatenation-based data augmentation acts as a powerful regularizer, reducing the character error rate by 34.5% and the WER by 25.4%. Further analysis shows that short, low-level tokens benefit model performance and that concatenation-based data augmentation performance gain surpasses those achieved by proportionally extended training. These findings reveal a clear variance-dependent effect: sub-word tokenization primarily mitigates inter-writer stylistic variability, whereas concatenation-based data augmentation effectively compensates for intra-writer distributional sparsity.

AI.tldr: IMU手写识别中，子词分词主要解决跨书写者风格差异，而拼接数据增强则有效缓解单个书写者的数据稀疏问题。
AI.motivation: IMU手写识别面临字符分布不均和书写者间差异的挑战，需要系统研究如何解决这些问题。
AI.method: 采用两种策略：子词分词（Bigram分词）和基于拼接的数据增强，在OnHW-Words500数据集上进行实验。
AI.result: 在书写者独立分割中，Bigram分词将词错误率从15.40%降至12.99%；在书写者依赖分割中，拼接数据增强将字符错误率降低34.5%，词错误率降低25.4%。
AI.conclusion: 子词分词主要缓解书写者间风格差异，而拼接数据增强有效补偿书写者内分布稀疏性，揭示了方差依赖效应。

title: Trust, Safety, and Accuracy: Assessing LLMs for Routine Maternity Advice
summary: Access to reliable maternal healthcare information is a major challenge in rural India due to limited medical resources and infrastructure. With over 830 million internet users and nearly half of rural women online, digital tools offer new opportunities for health education. This study evaluates large language models (LLMs) like ChatGPT-4o, Perplexity AI, and GeminiAI to provide reliable and understandable pregnancy-related information. Seventeen pregnancy-focused questions were posed to each model and compared with responses from maternal health professionals. Evaluations used semantic similarity, noun overlap, and readability metrics to measure content quality. Results show Perplexity closely matched expert semantics, while ChatGPT-4o produced clearer, more understandable text with better medical terminology. As internet access grows in rural areas, LLMs could serve as scalable aids for maternal health education. The study highlights the need for AI tools that balance accuracy and clarity to improve healthcare communication in underserved regions.

AI.tldr: 评估大语言模型（ChatGPT-4o、Perplexity AI、GeminiAI）在提供可靠且易懂的孕期健康信息方面的表现，发现Perplexity在语义上与专家最接近，而ChatGPT-4o在清晰度和医学术语使用上更优。
AI.motivation: 印度农村地区由于医疗资源和基础设施有限，获取可靠的孕产保健信息面临挑战。随着互联网普及（8.3亿用户，近半数农村女性上网），数字工具为健康教育提供了新机会。
AI.method: 向三个大语言模型（ChatGPT-4o、Perplexity AI、GeminiAI）提出17个孕期相关问题，并与孕产健康专家的回答进行比较。使用语义相似度、名词重叠度和可读性指标评估内容质量。
AI.result: Perplexity在语义上与专家回答最接近，而ChatGPT-4o生成的文本更清晰易懂，医学术语使用更好。随着农村互联网普及，大语言模型可作为孕产健康教育的可扩展辅助工具。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明大语言模型有潜力作为农村地区孕产健康教育的辅助工具，但需要平衡准确性和清晰度。随着互联网普及，AI工具可改善服务不足地区的医疗沟通。

title: Generative AI-assisted Participatory Modeling in Socio-Environmental Planning under Deep Uncertainty
summary: Socio-environmental planning under deep uncertainty requires researchers to identify and conceptualize problems before exploring policies and deploying plans. In practice and model-based planning approaches, this problem conceptualization process often relies on participatory modeling to translate stakeholders' natural-language descriptions into a quantitative model, making this process complex and time-consuming. To facilitate this process, we propose a templated workflow that uses large language models for an initial conceptualization process. During the workflow, researchers can use large language models to identify the essential model components from stakeholders' intuitive problem descriptions, explore their diverse perspectives approaching the problem, assemble these components into a unified model, and eventually implement the model in Python through iterative communication. These results will facilitate the subsequent socio-environmental planning under deep uncertainty steps. Using ChatGPT 5.2 Instant, we demonstrated this workflow on the lake problem and an electricity market problem, both of which demonstrate socio-environmental planning problems. In both cases, acceptable outputs were obtained after a few iterations with human verification and refinement. These experiments indicated that large language models can serve as an effective tool for facilitating participatory modeling in the problem conceptualization process in socio-environmental planning.

AI.tldr: 提出使用大语言模型辅助参与式建模的模板化工作流，用于社会-环境规划中的问题概念化过程
AI.motivation: 社会-环境规划中的深度不确定性要求研究者先识别和概念化问题，再探索政策和部署计划。传统的参与式建模过程依赖利益相关者的自然语言描述转化为定量模型，这一过程复杂且耗时。
AI.method: 提出模板化工作流，利用大语言模型进行初始概念化：1）从利益相关者的直观问题描述中识别基本模型组件；2）探索解决问题的不同视角；3）将这些组件组装成统一模型；4）通过迭代交流在Python中实现模型。使用ChatGPT 5.2 Instant在湖泊问题和电力市场问题上进行演示。
AI.result: 在两个案例中，经过几次迭代和人工验证与细化后，都获得了可接受的输出。实验表明大语言模型可以作为社会-环境规划中问题概念化过程中促进参与式建模的有效工具。
AI.conclusion: 大语言模型能够有效促进社会-环境规划中的参与式建模，特别是在问题概念化阶段，通过模板化工作流可以显著提高效率并减少复杂性。

title: A foundation model for electrodermal activity data
summary: Foundation models have recently extended beyond natural language and vision to timeseries domains, including physiological signals. However, progress in electrodermal activity (EDA) modeling is hindered by the absence of large-scale, curated, and openly accessible datasets. EDA reflects sympathetic nervous system activity and is widely used to infer cognitive load, stress, and engagement. Yet very few wearable devices provide continuous, unobtrusive sensing, and the only large-scale archive to date is proprietary. To address this gap, we compile EDAMAME, a collection of EDA traces from 24 public datasets, comprising more than 25,000 hours from 634 users. Using this resource, we train UME, the first dedicated foundation model for EDA. In eight out of ten scenarios, UME outperforms baselines and matches generalist timeseries foundation models while using 20x fewer computational resources. Our findings, however, also highlight the intrinsic challenges of EDA modeling, motivating further research to unlock its full potential. All datasets, model weights, and code are released to support further research.

AI.tldr: 研究人员创建了首个大规模、公开的EDA数据集EDAMAME（包含25,000+小时数据），并基于此训练了首个EDA专用基础模型UME，该模型在多数场景下优于基线且计算资源消耗仅为通用时序模型的1/20。
AI.motivation: EDA（皮肤电活动）作为反映交感神经系统活动的重要生理信号，在认知负荷、压力、参与度评估中有广泛应用，但缺乏大规模、公开、高质量的数据集阻碍了该领域基础模型的发展。现有大型档案多为专有数据，限制了研究进展。
AI.method: 1. 从24个公开数据集中收集EDA数据，构建EDAMAME数据集（634名用户，超过25,000小时数据）；2. 基于该数据集训练UME模型，这是首个专门针对EDA设计的基础模型；3. 在10个不同场景下评估模型性能，并与基线方法和通用时序基础模型进行比较。
AI.result: 在10个评估场景中，UME在8个场景中表现优于基线方法，且与通用时序基础模型性能相当，同时计算资源消耗仅为后者的1/20。研究也揭示了EDA建模的内在挑战，表明该领域仍有进一步研究空间。
AI.conclusion: EDAMAME数据集和UME模型的发布填补了EDA领域缺乏公开大规模数据资源的空白，为后续研究提供了重要基础。虽然模型在多数场景中表现良好，但EDA建模仍面临挑战，需要进一步研究以充分发挥其潜力。所有数据集、模型权重和代码均已开源。

title: Purcell swimmer near a wall
summary: We study the effects of hydrodynamic interactions between a wall and the Purcell three-link swimmer in the two-dimensional case. After deriving the equations of motion in a low Reynolds number regime using Resistive Force Theory with suitably modified drag coefficients, we show, by means of criteria from Geometric Control Theory, that the system is controllable at configurations that are nearly parallel to the wall. Furthermore, we study configurations that are tilted, and we show net displacement with respect to the initial orientation. Some numerical experiments illustrate the analytical results.

AI.tldr: 研究二维Purcell三连杆游泳器在壁面附近的水动力相互作用，证明在低雷诺数下系统在接近平行于壁面的构型下可控，并分析倾斜构型的净位移。
AI.motivation: 研究游泳器与壁面之间的水动力相互作用对运动控制的影响，这对于理解微尺度生物游泳器在受限环境中的运动机制具有重要意义。
AI.method: 使用修正阻力系数的阻力理论推导低雷诺数下的运动方程，应用几何控制理论分析系统可控性，并通过数值实验验证分析结果。
AI.result: 证明系统在接近平行于壁面的构型下是可控的，对于倾斜构型也能实现相对于初始方向的净位移。
AI.conclusion: 壁面附近的水动力相互作用显著影响Purcell游泳器的运动控制特性，系统在特定构型下具有可控性，这为微尺度游泳器的导航和控制提供了理论基础。

title: Wavenumber-explicit $hp$-FEM analysis of Maxwell's equations with impedance boundary conditions in piecewise smooth media
summary: We consider the time-harmonic Maxwell equations with impedance boundary conditions on a bounded Lipschitz domain $Ω$ with analytic boundary $Γ$. We suppose that $Ω$ consists of multiple subdomains, and that the permeability and permittivity tensors are analytic on every subdomain, but may jump across subdomain interfaces. Under these conditions we show that for any wavenumber $k\in\mathbb{C}$ with $|k|\geq 1$ for which Maxwell's equations are polynomially well-posed, a Galerkin discretization based on Nédélec elements of order $p$ on a mesh with mesh width $h$ is quasi-optimal, provided that there holds the wavenumber-explicit scale resolution condition a) that $|k|h/p$ is sufficiently small and b) that $p/\log |k|$ is bounded from below.

AI.tldr: 针对具有解析边界和分片解析介质参数的时间谐波Maxwell方程，证明了在多项式适定条件下，Nédélec元Galerkin离散的拟最优性，需要满足波数相关的尺度分辨率条件。
AI.motivation: 研究具有跳跃系数的Maxwell方程的数值离散，特别是在波数较大时保持数值方法的稳定性，为高频电磁场计算提供理论保证。
AI.method: 使用Nédélec有限元进行Galerkin离散，分析需要满足两个波数相关的尺度分辨率条件：1) |k|h/p足够小；2) p/log|k|有下界。
AI.result: 证明了在多项式适定性和分辨率条件下，离散化是拟最优的，即离散解与连续解之间的误差由最佳逼近误差控制。
AI.conclusion: 对于具有解析边界和分片解析系数的Maxwell方程，在适当的波数相关分辨率条件下，Nédélec元离散能够保持拟最优收敛性。

title: Leveraging Large Vision Model for Multi-UAV Co-perception in Low-Altitude Wireless Networks
summary: Multi-uncrewed aerial vehicle (UAV) cooperative perception has emerged as a promising paradigm for diverse low-altitude economy applications, where complementary multi-view observations are leveraged to enhance perception performance via wireless communications. However, the massive visual data generated by multiple UAVs poses significant challenges in terms of communication latency and resource efficiency. To address these challenges, this paper proposes a communication-efficient cooperative perception framework, termed Base-Station-Helped UAV (BHU), which reduces communication overhead while enhancing perception performance. Specifically, we employ a Top-K selection mechanism to identify the most informative pixels from UAV-captured RGB images, enabling sparsified visual transmission with reduced data volume and latency. The sparsified images are transmitted to a ground server via multi-user MIMO (MU-MIMO), where a Swin-large-based MaskDINO encoder extracts bird's-eye-view (BEV) features and performs cooperative feature fusion for ground vehicle perception. Furthermore, we develop a diffusion model-based deep reinforcement learning (DRL) algorithm to jointly select cooperative UAVs, sparsification ratios, and precoding matrices, achieving a balance between communication efficiency and perception utility. Simulation results on the Air-Co-Pred dataset demonstrate that, compared with traditional CNN-based BEV fusion baselines, the proposed BHU framework improves perception performance by over 5% while reducing communication overhead by 85%, providing an effective solution for multi-UAV cooperative perception under resource-constrained wireless environments.

AI.tldr: 提出BHU框架，通过Top-K像素选择减少通信开销，结合MU-MIMO传输和Swin-large编码器进行BEV特征融合，使用扩散模型DRL联合优化，在Air-Co-Pred数据集上实现感知性能提升5%同时通信开销降低85%。
AI.motivation: 多无人机协同感知在低空经济应用中前景广阔，但多视角视觉数据带来的通信延迟和资源效率问题亟待解决，需要在保证感知性能的同时降低通信开销。
AI.method: 1) Top-K选择机制筛选信息量最大的像素，实现稀疏化视觉传输；2) 通过MU-MIMO将稀疏图像传输到地面服务器；3) 使用Swin-large-based MaskDINO编码器提取BEV特征并进行协同特征融合；4) 开发基于扩散模型的DRL算法联合选择协同无人机、稀疏化比率和预编码矩阵。
AI.result: 在Air-Co-Pred数据集上的仿真结果表明，相比传统CNN-based BEV融合基线，BHU框架将感知性能提升超过5%，同时通信开销减少85%。
AI.conclusion: BHU框架为资源受限无线环境下的多无人机协同感知提供了有效解决方案，在通信效率和感知效用之间取得了良好平衡。

title: Enhancing Financial Report Question-Answering: A Retrieval-Augmented Generation System with Reranking Analysis
summary: Financial analysts face significant challenges extracting information from lengthy 10-K reports, which often exceed 100 pages. This paper presents a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system designed to answer questions about S&P 500 financial reports and evaluates the impact of neural reranking on system performance. Our pipeline employs hybrid search combining full-text and semantic retrieval, followed by an optional reranking stage using a cross-encoder model. We conduct systematic evaluation using the FinDER benchmark dataset, comprising 1,500 queries across five experimental groups. Results demonstrate that reranking significantly improves answer quality, achieving 49.0 percent correctness for scores of 8 or above compared to 33.5 percent without reranking, representing a 15.5 percentage point improvement. Additionally, the error rate for completely incorrect answers decreases from 35.3 percent to 22.5 percent. Our findings emphasize the critical role of reranking in financial RAG systems and demonstrate performance improvements over baseline methods through modern language models and refined retrieval strategies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个基于检索增强生成（RAG）的系统，用于回答S&P 500财务报告相关问题，并通过神经重排序显著提升系统性能。
AI.motivation: 金融分析师面临从冗长的10-K报告（通常超过100页）中提取信息的重大挑战，需要高效的工具来辅助信息检索和分析。
AI.method: 采用混合检索（全文检索+语义检索）的RAG系统，可选地使用交叉编码器模型进行神经重排序，在FinDER基准数据集（包含1,500个查询）上进行系统评估。
AI.result: 重排序显著提升答案质量：得分8分以上的正确率从33.5%提升至49.0%（提升15.5个百分点），完全错误答案的错误率从35.3%降至22.5%。
AI.conclusion: 重排序在金融RAG系统中起关键作用，通过现代语言模型和优化的检索策略，系统性能优于基线方法。

title: Transformers are Bayesian Networks
summary:
Transformers are the dominant architecture in AI, yet why they work remains poorly understood. This paper offers a precise answer: a transformer is a Bayesian network. We establish this in five ways.
  First, we prove that every sigmoid transformer with any weights implements weighted loopy belief propagation on its implicit factor graph. One layer is one round of BP. This holds for any weights -- trained, random, or constructed. Formally verified against standard mathematical axioms.
  Second, we give a constructive proof that a transformer can implement exact belief propagation on any declared knowledge base. On knowledge bases without circular dependencies this yields provably correct probability estimates at every node. Formally verified against standard mathematical axioms.
  Third, we prove uniqueness: a sigmoid transformer that produces exact posteriors necessarily has BP weights. There is no other path through the sigmoid architecture to exact posteriors. Formally verified against standard mathematical axioms.
  Fourth, we delineate the AND/OR boolean structure of the transformer layer: attention is AND, the FFN is OR, and their strict alternation is Pearl's gather/update algorithm exactly.
  Fifth, we confirm all formal results experimentally, corroborating the Bayesian network characterization in practice. We also establish the practical viability of loopy belief propagation despite the current lack of a theoretical convergence guarantee.
  We further prove that verifiable inference requires a finite concept space. Any finite verification procedure can distinguish at most finitely many concepts. Without grounding, correctness is not defined. Hallucination is not a bug that scaling can fix. It is the structural consequence of operating without concepts. Formally verified against standard mathematical axioms.

AI.tldr: 论文证明Transformer本质上是贝叶斯网络，通过五种方式建立了这一等价关系：1）Sigmoid Transformer实现加权循环信念传播；2）可构造实现精确信念传播；3）唯一性证明；4）层结构的AND/OR布尔解释；5）实验验证。同时证明可验证推理需要有限概念空间。
AI.motivation: Transformer是AI中的主导架构，但其工作原理仍不清楚。本文旨在提供精确解释：证明Transformer本质上是贝叶斯网络，揭示其内在的统计推理机制。
AI.method: 采用五种证明方法：1）证明Sigmoid Transformer实现加权循环信念传播；2）构造性证明Transformer可实现精确信念传播；3）唯一性证明；4）分析Transformer层的AND/OR布尔结构；5）实验验证。所有证明均基于标准数学公理进行形式化验证。
AI.result: 成功建立了Transformer与贝叶斯网络的等价关系，证明了Transformer层对应信念传播的一轮迭代，注意力机制对应AND操作，前馈网络对应OR操作。实验证实了理论结果，并展示了循环信念传播的实际可行性。
AI.conclusion: Transformer本质上是贝叶斯网络，其工作原理可通过信念传播解释。可验证推理需要有限概念空间，否则会产生幻觉问题。这一发现为理解Transformer提供了理论基础，并指出了其局限性。

title: Federated Multi Agent Deep Learning and Neural Networks for Advanced Distributed Sensing in Wireless Networks
summary: Multi-agent deep learning (MADL), including multi-agent deep reinforcement learning (MADRL), distributed/federated training, and graph-structured neural networks, is becoming a unifying framework for decision-making and inference in wireless systems where sensing, communication, and computing are tightly coupled. Recent 5G-Advanced and 6G visions strengthen this coupling through integrated sensing and communication, edge intelligence, open programmable RAN, and non-terrestrial/UAV networking, which create decentralized, partially observed, time-varying, and resource-constrained control problems. This survey synthesizes the state of the art, with emphasis on 2021-2025 research, on MADL for distributed sensing and wireless communications. We present a task-driven taxonomy across (i) learning formulations (Markov games, Dec-POMDPs, CTDE), (ii) neural architectures (GNN-based radio resource management, attention-based policies, hierarchical learning, and over-the-air aggregation), (iii) advanced techniques (federated reinforcement learning, communication-efficient federated deep RL, and serverless edge learning orchestration), and (iv) application domains (MEC offloading with slicing, UAV-enabled heterogeneous networks with power-domain NOMA, intrusion detection in sensor networks, and ISAC-driven perceptive mobile networks). We also provide comparative tables of algorithms, training topologies, and system-level trade-offs in latency, spectral efficiency, energy, privacy, and robustness. Finally, we identify open issues including scalability, non-stationarity, security against poisoning and backdoors, communication overhead, and real-time safety, and outline research directions toward 6G-native sense-communicate-compute-learn systems.

AI.tldr: 该论文是关于多智能体深度学习在无线系统中应用的综述，重点分析了2021-2025年的研究进展，涵盖分布式感知和无线通信领域，并提出了面向6G系统的研究方向。
AI.motivation: 5G-Advanced和6G愿景加强了感知、通信和计算的紧密耦合，形成了去中心化、部分可观测、时变和资源受限的控制问题，需要多智能体深度学习框架来解决这些挑战。
AI.method: 采用任务驱动的分类法，从四个维度进行系统综述：(1)学习形式化（马尔可夫博弈、Dec-POMDPs、CTDE），(2)神经网络架构（基于GNN的无线资源管理、注意力策略、分层学习、空中聚合），(3)先进技术（联邦强化学习、通信高效的联邦深度RL、无服务器边缘学习编排），(4)应用领域（MEC卸载切片、UAV异构网络、传感器网络入侵检测、ISAC驱动的感知移动网络）。
AI.result: 提供了算法比较表、训练拓扑结构以及系统级权衡（延迟、频谱效率、能耗、隐私、鲁棒性）的分析，识别了当前研究的现状和技术水平。
AI.conclusion: 指出了可扩展性、非平稳性、安全防护、通信开销和实时安全性等开放问题，并提出了面向6G原生感知-通信-计算-学习系统的研究方向。

title: Optimization-Embedded Active Multi-Fidelity Surrogate Learning for Multi-Condition Airfoil Shape Optimization
summary: Active multi-fidelity surrogate modeling is developed for multi-condition airfoil shape optimization to reduce high-fidelity CFD cost while retaining RANS-level accuracy. The framework couples a low-fidelity-informed Gaussian process regression transfer model with uncertainty-triggered sampling and a synchronized elitism rule embedded in a hybrid genetic algorithm. Low-fidelity XFOIL evaluations provide inexpensive features, while sparse RANS simulations are adaptively allocated when predictive uncertainty exceeds a threshold; elite candidates are mandatorily validated at high fidelity, and the population is re-evaluated to prevent evolutionary selection based on outdated fitness values produced by earlier surrogate states. The method is demonstrated for a two-point problem at $Re=6\times10^6$ with cruise at $α=2^\circ$ (maximize $E=L/D$) and take-off at $α=10^\circ$ (maximize $C_L$) using a 12-parameter CST representation. Independent multi-fidelity surrogates per flight condition enable decoupled refinement. The optimized design improves cruise efficiency by 41.05% and take-off lift by 20.75% relative to the best first-generation individual. Over the full campaign, only 14.78% (cruise) and 9.5% (take-off) of evaluated individuals require RANS, indicating a substantial reduction in high-fidelity usage while maintaining consistent multi-point performance.

AI.tldr: 开发了主动多保真度代理建模方法用于多工况翼型优化，通过结合低保真度信息的高斯过程迁移模型、不确定性触发采样和遗传算法中的同步精英规则，大幅减少高保真度CFD计算成本，同时保持RANS级精度。
AI.motivation: 多工况翼型形状优化需要大量高保真度CFD计算，成本高昂。需要开发能减少高保真度计算需求的方法，同时保持设计精度。
AI.method: 耦合低保真度信息的高斯过程回归迁移模型与不确定性触发采样，嵌入同步精英规则的混合遗传算法。使用XFOIL进行低保真度评估，当预测不确定性超过阈值时自适应分配稀疏RANS模拟，精英候选强制进行高保真度验证，种群重新评估以防止基于过时代理状态的进化选择。
AI.result: 优化设计相比第一代最佳个体，巡航效率提高41.05%，起飞升力提高20.75%。在整个优化过程中，仅需对14.78%（巡航）和9.5%（起飞）的个体进行RANS计算，显著减少高保真度使用量。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效减少多工况翼型优化中的高保真度计算成本，同时保持设计性能，为复杂气动优化问题提供了高效的计算框架。

title: A New Fractional Step Structure Preserving Method for The Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert Equation
summary: In this paper, we propose a structure preserving method using a Crank-Nicolson's type method with an implicit Gauss-Seidel fractional iteration. Such a method is of first-order accuracy in time and second-order accuracy in space, stable and length preserving. Such a proposed method brings great benefits for the theoretical analysis. The numerical accuracy, norm preserving and stability are verified for 1D and 3D tests.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于Crank-Nicolson格式和隐式Gauss-Seidel分数迭代的结构保持方法，具有时间一阶、空间二阶精度，且稳定并保持长度
AI.motivation: 开发一种能够保持结构特性（如长度保持）的数值方法，便于理论分析，同时保证数值稳定性和精度
AI.method: 采用Crank-Nicolson类型方法结合隐式Gauss-Seidel分数迭代，构建时间一阶精度、空间二阶精度的结构保持算法
AI.result: 方法在1D和3D测试中验证了数值精度、范数保持和稳定性，证明其有效性
AI.conclusion: 提出的结构保持方法在理论和数值上都具有优势，为相关问题的分析提供了有效工具

title: Facial beauty prediction fusing transfer learning and broad learning system
summary: Facial beauty prediction (FBP) is an important and challenging problem in the fields of computer vision and machine learning. Not only it is easily prone to overfitting due to the lack of large-scale and effective data, but also difficult to quickly build robust and effective facial beauty evaluation models because of the variability of facial appearance and the complexity of human perception. Transfer Learning can be able to reduce the dependence on large amounts of data as well as avoid overfitting problems. Broad learning system (BLS) can be capable of quickly completing models building and training. For this purpose, Transfer Learning was fused with BLS for FBP in this paper. Firstly, a feature extractor is constructed by way of CNNs models based on transfer learning for facial feature extraction, in which EfficientNets are used in this paper, and the fused features of facial beauty extracted are transferred to BLS for FBP, called E-BLS. Secondly, on the basis of E-BLS, a connection layer is designed to connect the feature extractor and BLS, called ER-BLS. Finally, experimental results show that, compared with the previous BLS and CNNs methods existed, the accuracy of FBP was improved by E-BLS and ER-BLS, demonstrating the effectiveness and superiority of the method presented, which can also be widely used in pattern recognition, object detection and image classification.

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合迁移学习和宽度学习系统（BLS）的面部美感预测方法，通过EfficientNets特征提取和BLS快速建模，提高了预测精度。
AI.motivation: 面部美感预测面临数据不足易过拟合、人脸外观多变、人类感知复杂等挑战，需要快速构建鲁棒有效的模型。
AI.method: 1. 使用基于迁移学习的EfficientNets构建特征提取器（E-BLS）；2. 设计连接层连接特征提取器和BLS（ER-BLS）；3. 将提取的面部特征转移到BLS进行预测。
AI.result: E-BLS和ER-BLS相比现有BLS和CNN方法提高了面部美感预测的准确率，证明了方法的有效性和优越性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的迁移学习与宽度学习系统融合方法能有效解决面部美感预测问题，并可广泛应用于模式识别、目标检测和图像分类等领域。

title: Rubric-Guided Fine-tuning of SpeechLLMs for Multi-Aspect, Multi-Rater L2 Reading-Speech Assessment
comment: Accepted to LREC 2026. This publication is part of the project Responsible AI for Voice Diagnostics (RAIVD) with file number NGF.1607.22.013 of the research programme NGF AiNed Fellowship Grants, which is financed by the Dutch Research Council (NWO)
summary: Reliable and interpretable automated assessment of second-language (L2) speech remains a central challenge, as large speech-language models (SpeechLLMs) often struggle to align with the nuanced variability of human raters. To address this, we introduce a rubric-guided reasoning framework that explicitly encodes multi-aspect human assessment criteria: accuracy, fluency, and prosody, while calibrating model uncertainty to capture natural rating variability. We fine-tune the Qwen2-Audio-7B-Instruct model using multi-rater human judgments and develop an uncertainty-calibrated regression approach supported by conformal calibration for interpretable confidence intervals. Our Gaussian uncertainty modeling and conformal calibration approach achieves the strongest alignment with human ratings, outperforming regression and classification baselines. The model reliably assesses fluency and prosody while highlighting the inherent difficulty of assessing accuracy. Together, these results demonstrate that rubric-guided, uncertainty-calibrated reasoning offers a principled path toward trustworthy and explainable SpeechLLM-based speech assessment.

AI.tldr: 提出基于评分标准的推理框架，通过不确定性校准来提升语音评估模型与人类评分者的一致性
AI.motivation: 当前大型语音语言模型在第二语言语音评估中难以与人类评分者的细微差异对齐，需要更可靠和可解释的自动化评估方法
AI.method: 使用评分标准引导的推理框架，明确编码准确性、流利度和韵律等多方面评估标准；采用Qwen2-Audio-7B-Instruct模型微调，结合多评分者人类判断；开发不确定性校准回归方法，支持置信区间解释
AI.result: 高斯不确定性建模和符合校准方法在人类评分对齐方面表现最佳，优于回归和分类基线；模型能可靠评估流利度和韵律，但准确性评估仍具挑战性
AI.conclusion: 评分标准引导、不确定性校准的推理为构建可信赖、可解释的语音语言模型语音评估提供了原则性路径

title: Cascade-Aware Multi-Agent Routing: Spatio-Temporal Sidecars and Geometry-Switching
summary:
A common architectural pattern in advanced AI reasoning systems is the symbolic graph network: specialized agents or modules connected by delegation edges, routing tasks through a dynamic execution graph. Current schedulers optimize load and fitness but are geometry-blind: they do not model how failures propagate differently in tree-like versus cyclic regimes. In tree-like delegation, a single failure can cascade exponentially; in dense cyclic graphs, failures tend to self-limit. We identify this observability gap, quantify its system-level cost, and propose a lightweight mitigation.
  We formulate online geometry control for route-risk estimation on time-indexed execution graphs with route-local failure history. Our approach combines (i) a Euclidean spatio-temporal propagation baseline, (ii) a hyperbolic route-risk model with temporal decay (and optional burst excitation), and (iii) a learned geometry selector over structural features. The selector is a compact MLP (9->12->1) using six topology statistics plus three geometry-aware signals: BFS shell-growth slope, cycle-rank norm, and fitted Poincare curvature. On the Genesis 3 benchmark distribution, adaptive switching improves win rate in the hardest non_tree regime from 64-72% (fixed hyperbolic variants) to 92%, and achieves 87.2% overall win rate.
  To measure total system value, we compare against Genesis 3 routing without any spatio-temporal sidecar, using only native bandit/LinUCB signals (team fitness and mean node load). This baseline achieves 50.4% win rate overall and 20% in tree-like regimes; the full sidecar recovers 87.2% overall (+36.8 pp), with +48 to +68 pp gains in tree-like settings, consistent with a cascade-sensitivity analysis. Overall, a 133-parameter sidecar substantially mitigates geometry-blind failure propagation in one high-capability execution-graph system.

AI.tldr: 论文提出一种轻量级几何感知调度器，用于符号图网络中的故障传播控制，通过自适应几何选择器在欧几里得和双曲模型间切换，显著提升系统性能。
AI.motivation: 当前AI推理系统中的符号图网络调度器存在几何盲区：它们无法建模树状结构与循环结构中故障传播的差异。树状委托中单个故障可能指数级级联，而密集循环图中故障往往自限。这种可观测性差距导致系统级成本。
AI.method: 提出在线几何控制方法，结合：(1)欧几里得时空传播基线；(2)带时间衰减的双曲路径风险模型；(3)基于结构特征的几何选择器（9->12->1 MLP）。选择器使用六个拓扑统计量和三个几何感知信号：BFS壳增长斜率、循环秩范数和拟合的庞加莱曲率。
AI.result: 在Genesis 3基准测试中，自适应切换将最难非树状区域的胜率从64-72%提升到92%，整体胜率达87.2%。相比仅使用原生信号（50.4%胜率）的基线，整体提升36.8个百分点，在树状设置中提升48-68个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 仅133个参数的轻量级辅助系统能显著缓解符号图网络中几何盲故障传播问题，证明了在高级AI推理系统中考虑执行图几何结构的重要性。

authors: Krishna Kumar Neelakanta Pillai Santha Kumari Amma
title: Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning for Dynamic Pricing: Balancing Profitability,Stability and Fairness
summary: Dynamic pricing in competitive retail markets requires strategies that adapt to fluctuating demand and competitor behavior. In this work, we present a systematic empirical evaluation of multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) approaches-specifically MAPPO and MADDPG-for dynamic price optimization under competition. Using a simulated marketplace environment derived from real-world retail data, we benchmark these algorithms against an Independent DDPG (IDDPG) baseline, a widely used independent learner in MARL literature. We evaluate profit performance, stability across random seeds, fairness, and training efficiency. Our results show that MAPPO consistently achieves the highest average returns with low variance, offering a stable and reproducible approach for competitive price optimization, while MADDPG achieves slightly lower profit but the fairest profit distribution among agents. These findings demonstrate that MARL methods-particularly MAPPO-provide a scalable and stable alternative to independent learning approaches for dynamic retail pricing.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了多智能体强化学习（MAPPO和MADDPG）在竞争性动态定价中的应用，发现MAPPO在利润和稳定性方面表现最佳，而MADDPG在公平性方面最优。
AI.motivation: 竞争性零售市场的动态定价需要能够适应需求波动和竞争对手行为的策略。传统独立学习方法可能无法充分捕捉多智能体交互的复杂性。
AI.method: 使用基于真实零售数据构建的模拟市场环境，系统评估MAPPO和MADDPG两种多智能体强化学习方法，并与独立DDPG（IDDPG）基线进行比较。评估指标包括利润表现、随机种子稳定性、公平性和训练效率。
AI.result: MAPPO始终获得最高的平均回报且方差低，为竞争性价格优化提供了稳定可复现的方法；MADDPG利润略低但实现了最公平的利润分配。两种方法都优于独立学习基线。
AI.conclusion: 多智能体强化学习方法（特别是MAPPO）为动态零售定价提供了可扩展且稳定的替代方案，优于传统的独立学习方法。

title: Entrainment of magnetic fluid by a moving boundary of a plane gap
summary: A fluid mechanics problem is solved which technological prototype is a fluid acoustic contact that is an inherent element of ultrasonic non-destructive testing procedures. It is well known that the acoustic contact established with an ordinary fluid suffers from essential disadvantage that is the loss of stability due to the gravity-induced fluid leakage in the course of dynamic scanning. The use of magnetic fluid (MF) is one of the ways to resolve the issue. A compact portion of MF held in place by a permanent magnet enables one to maintain a stable acoustic contact (fluid bridge) under arbitrary orientation of the ultrasonic sensor and, simultaneously, to radically minimize the drain of the contact fluid. The model system under consideration comprises a MF bridge that fills a flat gap, one of whose boundaries moves with constant velocity. Due to its wetting by the fluid, the receding plane carries away a fluid film thus depleting the contact. Theoretical expressions are obtained which define the profile of the film in the dynamic regime and the dependencies of the magnetic fluid drain on the boundary velocity, gap height and configuration of the imposed magnetic field. On that basis the optimal parameters are evaluated which ensure effective retention of the fluid contact under minimal drain of the fluid from it.

AI.tldr: 使用磁性流体作为超声无损检测中的声学接触介质，通过磁场稳定流体桥，减少重力引起的流体泄漏，提高动态扫描时的稳定性。
AI.motivation: 传统流体声学接触在动态扫描中因重力导致流体泄漏而失去稳定性，需要一种能保持稳定接触同时最小化流体流失的解决方案。
AI.method: 使用磁性流体（MF）和永磁体创建稳定的流体桥，研究MF桥在平面间隙中的动态行为，其中一个边界以恒定速度移动，分析流体薄膜轮廓和磁性流体流失与边界速度、间隙高度和磁场配置的关系。
AI.result: 获得了定义动态状态下薄膜轮廓的理论表达式，以及磁性流体流失与边界速度、间隙高度和磁场配置的依赖关系，在此基础上评估了确保流体接触有效保持同时最小化流体流失的最佳参数。
AI.conclusion: 磁性流体结合永磁体能够有效解决超声无损检测中声学接触的稳定性问题，在任意传感器方向下都能保持稳定接触，同时显著减少流体流失。

title: On the validity limits of the parametrisation method for invariant manifolds: an assessment of practical criteria for vibrating systems
summary: The parametrisation method for invariant manifolds is a powerful technique for deriving reduced-order models in the context of nonlinear vibrating systems, allowing accurate computations of nonlinear normal modes. Thanks to arbitrary order asymptotic expansions, converged results are within reach and directly applicable to finite element structures. However, since it relies on a local theory and asymptotic expansions, the results are only valid up to a given amplitude, which defines the convergence radius of the approximation. The aim of this contribution is to investigate the validity limits of the approach and review the existing error estimates, with the concrete objective of proposing a practical approach to estimate the validity range during the computation, thus producing safe bounds within which the reduced-order model can be used. Three different criteria are assessed. The first one uses the error in the invariance equation as the distance to the fixed point increases. The second one is adapted from an upper bound criterion derived for normal form transforms and based on the potential singularities of the homological operator. The third one uses Cauchy and d'Alembert convergence rules for series. The criteria are tested on a number of different examples that are representative of the situations encountered when dealing with nonlinear vibrations. The Duffing equation serves as a first benchmark that allows considering conservative oscillations, forced systems at primary resonance, and superharmonic resonance. The investigations are then extended to a vibrating system with two degrees of freedom. Finally, the different criteria are assessed on a finite element beam structure, and guidelines are formulated to generalise their practical use and produce accurate and easy-to-use error bounds in the context of model order reduction for nonlinear vibrating structures.

AI.tldr: 本文研究参数化方法在非线性振动系统降阶模型中的有效性限制，提出三种实用准则来估计近似解的有效范围，并在不同示例中验证这些准则。
AI.motivation: 参数化方法虽然能准确计算非线性模态，但由于依赖局部理论和渐近展开，结果只在特定振幅范围内有效。需要建立实用方法来估计降阶模型的有效使用范围。
AI.method: 提出三种有效性判断准则：1) 不变方程误差随固定点距离的变化；2) 基于同调算子奇异性的上界准则；3) 使用柯西和达朗贝尔级数收敛规则。在Duffing方程、两自由度系统和有限元梁结构上进行测试。
AI.result: 三种准则在不同非线性振动场景中进行了评估，包括保守振荡、主共振强迫系统和超谐波共振。准则在有限元梁结构上也得到验证，为非线性振动结构降阶模型提供了准确易用的误差边界。
AI.conclusion: 建立了实用的误差估计准则来界定参数化方法在非线性振动降阶模型中的有效范围，为工程应用提供了安全的使用边界和指导原则。

title: Script-to-Slide Grounding: Grounding Script Sentences to Slide Objects for Automatic Instructional Video Generation
comment: The 21st International Conference on E-Service and Knowledge Management (ESKM 2025-Winter)
summary: While slide-based videos augmented with visual effects are widely utilized in education and research presentations, the video editing process -- particularly applying visual effects to ground spoken content to slide objects -- remains highly labor-intensive. This study aims to develop a system that automatically generates such instructional videos from slides and corresponding scripts. As a foundational step, this paper proposes and formulates Script-to-Slide Grounding (S2SG), defined as the task of grounding script sentences to their corresponding slide objects. Furthermore, as an initial step, we propose ``Text-S2SG,'' a method that utilizes a large language model (LLM) to perform this grounding task for text objects. Our experiments demonstrate that the proposed method achieves high performance (F1-score: 0.924). The contribution of this work is the formalization of a previously implicit slide-based video editing process into a computable task, thereby paving the way for its automation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Script-to-Slide Grounding (S2SG)任务，利用大语言模型自动将脚本句子与幻灯片对象进行关联，为自动化教学视频生成奠定基础。
AI.motivation: 基于幻灯片的教学视频制作中，将视觉特效与脚本内容关联到幻灯片对象的过程非常耗时费力，需要自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 提出S2SG任务定义，并开发Text-S2SG方法，利用大语言模型将脚本句子与幻灯片中的文本对象进行关联。
AI.result: 实验显示该方法性能优异，F1分数达到0.924，证明了大语言模型在该任务上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 将隐式的幻灯片视频编辑过程形式化为可计算任务，为自动化教学视频生成开辟了新途径。

title: LLM NL2SQL Robustness: Surface Noise vs. Linguistic Variation in Traditional and Agentic Settings
summary: Robustness evaluation for Natural Language to SQL (NL2SQL) systems is essential because real-world database environments are dynamic, noisy, and continuously evolving, whereas conventional benchmark evaluations typically assume static schemas and well-formed user inputs. In this work, we introduce a robustness evaluation benchmark containing approximately ten types of perturbations and conduct evaluations under both traditional and agentic settings. We assess multiple state-of-the-art large language models (LLMs), including Grok-4.1, Gemini-3-Pro, Claude-Opus-4.6, and GPT-5.2. Our results show that these models generally maintain strong performance under several perturbations; however, notable performance degradation is observed for surface-level noise (e.g., character-level corruption) and linguistic variation that preserves semantics while altering lexical or syntactic forms. Furthermore, we observe that surface-level noise causes larger performance drops in traditional pipelines, whereas linguistic variation presents greater challenges in agentic settings. These findings highlight the remaining challenges in achieving robust NL2SQL systems, particularly in handling linguistic variability.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一个NL2SQL系统的鲁棒性评估基准，包含约10种扰动类型，在传统和智能体两种设置下评估了多个SOTA LLM，发现模型在多数扰动下表现稳定，但在字符级噪声和语义保留的语言变体上性能显著下降。
AI.motivation: 现实世界的数据库环境是动态、嘈杂且不断演变的，而传统的NL2SQL基准评估通常假设静态模式和格式良好的用户输入，因此需要建立鲁棒性评估框架来测试系统在实际环境中的表现。
AI.method: 引入包含约10种扰动类型的鲁棒性评估基准，在传统管道和智能体两种设置下评估多个SOTA LLM（包括Grok-4.1、Gemini-3-Pro、Claude-Opus-4.6和GPT-5.2），分析不同扰动类型对性能的影响。
AI.result: 模型在多数扰动下表现稳定，但在表面级噪声（如字符级损坏）和语义保留的语言变体（词汇或句法形式改变）上性能显著下降。表面级噪声对传统管道影响更大，而语言变体对智能体设置挑战更大。
AI.conclusion: NL2SQL系统在鲁棒性方面仍面临挑战，特别是在处理语言变异性方面。研究结果强调了需要开发更强大的系统来处理现实世界中的动态和嘈杂环境。

title: How Clued up are LLMs? Evaluating Multi-Step Deductive Reasoning in a Text-Based Game Environment
summary: Deducing whodunit proves challenging for LLM agents. In this paper, we implement a text-based multi-agent version of the classic board game Clue as a rule-based testbed for evaluating multi-step deductive reasoning, with six agents drawn from GPT-4o-mini and Gemini-2.5-Flash. We further investigate whether fine-tuning on structured logic puzzles transfers to improved in-game reasoning and gameplay. Across 18 simulated games, agents achieve only four correct wins, indicating difficulty in maintaining consistent deductive reasoning over the course of a full game. Additionally, we find that fine-tuning does not reliably improve performance and, in some cases, appears to increase reasoning volume without improving reasoning precision.

AI.tldr: LLM智能体在文本版Clue游戏中表现不佳，仅4/18获胜，微调对推理能力提升有限
AI.motivation: 评估LLM智能体在多步演绎推理任务中的表现，特别是能否在完整游戏过程中保持一致的推理能力，并研究微调对推理能力的迁移效果
AI.method: 构建基于规则的文本版Clue游戏测试平台，使用GPT-4o-mini和Gemini-2.5-Flash的6个智能体进行18场模拟游戏，并研究在结构化逻辑谜题上的微调是否改善游戏推理
AI.result: 智能体表现不佳，仅4场获胜，表明在完整游戏中维持一致演绎推理存在困难；微调未能可靠提升性能，有时甚至增加推理量而不提高推理精度
AI.conclusion: 当前LLM智能体在多步演绎推理任务中仍有局限，微调对复杂推理能力的迁移效果有限，需要更有效的方法来提升智能体的长期推理一致性

title: From Language to Action in Arabic: Reliable Structured Tool Calling via Data-Centric Fine-Tuning
summary: Function-calling language models are essential for agentic AI systems that translate natural language into executable structured actions, yet existing models exhibit severe structural instability when applied to Arabic. We present AISA-AR-FunctionCall, a production-oriented Arabic function-calling framework built on a 270M-parameter FunctionGemma backbone and trained through systematic dataset auditing, schema repair, tool-aware prompt restructuring, and full-parameter supervised fine-tuning. On a held-out test set, fine-tuning reduces parse failures from 87\% to below 1\%, improves function name accuracy by more than eightfold, and substantially enhances argument alignment across dialects and domains. Error analysis reveals a transition from structural collapse to semantic misalignment, suggesting that serialization stability and decision-level reasoning are separable challenges. We further explore a reasoning-augmented LoRA variant that introduces explicit intermediate reasoning prior to tool invocation. All datasets and models are publicly released under the AISA framework.

AI.tldr: 开发了面向阿拉伯语的函数调用框架AISA-AR-FunctionCall，基于270M参数的FunctionGemma模型，通过系统数据集审计、模式修复、工具感知提示重构和全参数监督微调，将解析失败率从87%降至1%以下
AI.motivation: 现有函数调用语言模型在处理阿拉伯语时表现出严重的结构不稳定性，需要专门针对阿拉伯语的函数调用框架来改善这一问题
AI.method: 基于270M参数的FunctionGemma骨干网络，采用系统数据集审计、模式修复、工具感知提示重构和全参数监督微调的方法，并探索了推理增强的LoRA变体，在工具调用前引入显式中间推理
AI.result: 在测试集上，微调将解析失败率从87%降至1%以下，函数名称准确率提高八倍以上，显著增强了跨方言和领域的参数对齐。错误分析显示问题从结构崩溃转向语义错位
AI.conclusion: 序列化稳定性和决策级推理是可分离的挑战，AISA-AR-FunctionCall框架有效解决了阿拉伯语函数调用的结构不稳定性问题，所有数据集和模型已公开发布

title: Adaptive near-contact repulsion in conservative Allen-Cahn phase-field lattice Boltzmann multiphase model
summary: Unresolved thin-film dynamics often causes spurious coalescence in diffuse-interface simulations of multiphase flows. We address this issue by introducing a fully local repulsive near-contact flux in a conservative Allen--Cahn phase-field model coupled to lattice Boltzmann hydrodynamics. The interaction activates only for oppositely oriented nearby interfaces, with a strength that self-adjusts based upon an analytical estimate of the local film thickness extracted from the phase field. The resulting method circumvents nonlocal geometric procedures, preserves computational efficiency, and is well suited to massively parallel implementations. Tests on collision benchmarks and three-dimensional bubble swarms demonstrate robust suppression of artificial merging and physically consistent near-contact dynamics.

AI.tldr: 提出一种局部排斥通量方法，解决相场模拟中薄膜动力学导致的虚假聚并问题
AI.motivation: 解决多相流扩散界面模拟中未解决的薄膜动力学问题，该问题常导致虚假的聚并现象
AI.method: 在保守Allen-Cahn相场模型中引入完全局部的排斥近接触通量，耦合格子玻尔兹曼流体动力学。该方法仅对方向相反的邻近界面激活，强度基于从相场提取的局部薄膜厚度分析估计值自适应调整
AI.result: 方法避免了非局部几何过程，保持了计算效率，适合大规模并行实现。碰撞基准测试和三维气泡群模拟显示能稳健抑制人工合并，实现物理一致的近接触动力学
AI.conclusion: 提出的局部排斥通量方法有效解决了相场模拟中的虚假聚并问题，实现了物理正确的近接触动力学，同时保持了计算效率和并行性

title: Decoupled Divergence-Free Neural Networks Basis Method for Incompressible Fluid Problems
summary: We propose a decoupled divergence-free neural networks basis (Decoupled-DFNN) method for solving incompressible flow problems, including the Stokes and Navier-Stokes equations. To ensure the divergence free property exactly, the velocity field is represented as the curl of a stream function in two dimensions and as the curl of a vector potential in three dimensions. Beyond classical stream-function or velocity-vorticity formulations, we further utilize the properties of the curl operator to derive two specific decoupled subproblems for the velocity (through the stream function or vector potential) and the pressure, respectively. The proposed formulations enable a sequential solution strategy, in which the velocity and pressure are solved independently. To resolve the inherent nonlinearity of the Navier-Stokes equations, we employ a Gauss-Newton linearization strategy, transforming the nonlinear velocity subproblem into a sequence of linear subproblems. These decoupled subproblems for velocity and pressure are subsequently solved using the TransNet framework. Compared with existing methods, the proposed approach reduces computational cost while strictly preserving the incompressibility constraint.

AI.tldr: 提出Decoupled-DFNN方法，通过流函数/矢量势表示速度场确保严格无散度，将不可压缩流问题解耦为速度和压力子问题，采用顺序求解策略降低计算成本。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在求解不可压缩流（Stokes和Navier-Stokes方程）时，需要同时满足无散度约束和求解压力场，计算成本高且难以严格保持无散度条件。
AI.method: 1. 使用流函数（2D）或矢量势（3D）的旋度表示速度场，确保严格无散度；2. 利用旋度算子性质推导解耦的速度和压力子问题；3. 采用顺序求解策略；4. 对Navier-Stokes非线性问题使用Gauss-Newton线性化；5. 使用TransNet框架求解子问题。
AI.result: 相比现有方法，该方法在严格保持不可压缩约束的同时降低了计算成本，实现了速度和压力的独立求解。
AI.conclusion: Decoupled-DFNN方法通过解耦策略和严格的无散度表示，为求解不可压缩流问题提供了一种高效且精确的数值方法。

title: Look Where It Matters: High-Resolution Crops Retrieval for Efficient VLMs
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) typically process images at a native high-resolution, forcing a trade-off between accuracy and computational efficiency: high-resolution inputs capture fine details but incur significant computational costs, while low-resolution inputs advocate for efficiency, they potentially miss critical visual information, like small text. We present AwaRes, a spatial-on-demand framework that resolves this accuracy-efficiency trade-off by operating on a low-resolution global view and using tool-calling to retrieve only high-resolution segments needed for a given query. We construct supervised data automatically: a judge compares low- vs.\ high-resolution answers to label whether cropping is needed, and an oracle grounding model localizes the evidence for the correct answer, which we map to a discrete crop set to form multi-turn tool-use trajectories. We train our framework with cold-start SFT followed by multi-turn GRPO with a composite reward that combines semantic answer correctness with explicit crop-cost penalties. Project page: https://nimrodshabtay.github.io/AwaRes

AI.tldr: AwaRes是一个空间按需框架，通过低分辨率全局视图和工具调用检索高分辨率片段，解决视觉语言模型中精度与效率的权衡问题。
AI.motivation: 视觉语言模型通常需要在高分辨率下处理图像，这导致了精度和计算效率之间的权衡：高分辨率能捕捉细节但计算成本高，低分辨率效率高但可能丢失关键视觉信息（如小文本）。
AI.method: 1. 使用低分辨率全局视图，通过工具调用仅检索查询所需的高分辨率片段；2. 自动构建监督数据：通过比较低分辨率和高分辨率答案判断是否需要裁剪，使用oracle grounding模型定位证据；3. 通过冷启动SFT和多回合GRPO训练，结合语义答案正确性和裁剪成本惩罚的复合奖励。
AI.result: 提出了AwaRes框架，能够根据查询需求动态选择高分辨率区域，在保持计算效率的同时提高对细节敏感任务（如小文本识别）的准确性。
AI.conclusion: AwaRes通过空间按需的方法有效解决了视觉语言模型中精度与效率的权衡问题，实现了在低计算成本下保持高精度的视觉理解能力。

title: Evaluating Ill-Defined Tasks in Large Language Models
summary: Many evaluations of Large Language Models (LLMs) target tasks that are inherently ill-defined, with unclear input and output spaces and ambiguous success criteria. We analyze why existing evaluation benchmarks and metrics fail to provide reliable or diagnostic signals of model capability for such tasks. We examine two case studies: Complex Instruction Following (CIF), where we identify recurring issues including limited coverage of real-world instruction complexity, sensitivity to instruction phrasing, inconsistent and non-comparable metrics, and instability introduced by LLM-based judges; and Natural Language to Mermaid Sequence Diagrams (NL2Mermaid), where we show how multi-faceted evaluation criteria can yield actionable insights beyond aggregate scores. Together, these case studies show that current evaluations frequently conflate distinct failure modes, yielding scores that are unstable, non-diagnostic, and difficult to act upon. Our findings expose fundamental limitations in existing evaluation practices for ill-defined tasks and motivate more robust, interpretable evaluation designs.

AI.tldr: 论文分析现有大语言模型评估方法在定义模糊任务上的局限性，通过复杂指令遵循和自然语言转Mermaid序列图两个案例研究，揭示当前评估存在覆盖不足、指标不一致、LLM评委不稳定等问题，提出需要更稳健、可解释的评估设计。
AI.motivation: 当前大语言模型的许多评估针对的是定义模糊的任务，这些任务输入输出空间不明确，成功标准模糊。现有评估基准和指标未能为这类任务提供可靠或诊断性的模型能力信号，需要分析其失败原因并改进评估方法。
AI.method: 采用两个案例研究：1) 复杂指令遵循任务，分析其存在的覆盖范围有限、对指令措辞敏感、指标不一致且不可比较、LLM评委引入的不稳定性等问题；2) 自然语言转Mermaid序列图任务，展示多维度评估标准如何提供超越聚合分数的可操作见解。
AI.result: 研究发现当前评估经常混淆不同的失败模式，导致分数不稳定、无法诊断且难以采取行动。复杂指令遵循评估存在系统性缺陷，而自然语言转Mermaid序列图的多维度评估能提供更深入的洞察。这些发现暴露了现有评估实践的根本局限性。
AI.conclusion: 现有评估方法在定义模糊任务上存在根本缺陷，需要设计更稳健、可解释的评估方案。多维度评估标准比单一聚合分数更有价值，未来评估应避免混淆不同失败模式，提供更诊断性的信号来指导模型改进。

title: AI Scientist via Synthetic Task Scaling
summary: With the advent of AI agents, automatic scientific discovery has become a tenable goal. Many recent works scaffold agentic systems that can perform machine learning research, but don't offer a principled way to train such agents -- and current LLMs often generate plausible-looking but ineffective ideas. To make progress on training agents that can learn from doing, we provide a novel synthetic environment generation pipeline targeting machine learning agents. Our pipeline automatically synthesizes machine learning challenges compatible with the SWE-agent framework, covering topic sampling, dataset proposal, and code generation. The resulting synthetic tasks are 1) grounded in real machine learning datasets, because the proposed datasets are verified against the Huggingface API and are 2) verified for higher quality with a self-debugging loop. To validate the effectiveness of our synthetic tasks, we tackle MLGym, a benchmark for machine learning tasks. From the synthetic tasks, we sample trajectories from a teacher model (GPT-5), then use the trajectories to train a student model (Qwen3-4B and Qwen3-8B). The student models trained with our synthetic tasks achieve improved performance on MLGym, raising the AUP metric by 9% for Qwen3-4B and 12% for Qwen3-8B.

AI.tldr: 提出一个针对机器学习代理的合成环境生成管道，用于训练能够从实践中学习的AI代理，通过在MLGym基准测试上提升性能验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 随着AI代理的发展，自动科学发现成为可行目标。现有代理系统缺乏训练代理的原则性方法，且当前LLM常生成看似合理但无效的想法。需要训练能够从实践中学习的代理。
AI.method: 开发合成环境生成管道，自动合成与SWE-agent框架兼容的机器学习挑战，包括主题采样、数据集提议和代码生成。合成任务基于真实机器学习数据集（通过Huggingface API验证），并通过自调试循环确保高质量。
AI.result: 使用合成任务从教师模型（GPT-5）采样轨迹，然后用这些轨迹训练学生模型（Qwen3-4B和Qwen3-8B）。在MLGym基准测试上，学生模型性能显著提升：Qwen3-4B的AUP指标提高9%，Qwen3-8B提高12%。
AI.conclusion: 提出的合成环境生成管道能有效训练机器学习代理，通过基于真实数据集的合成任务和自调试机制确保质量，显著提升代理在机器学习任务上的性能。

title: What on Earth is AlphaEarth? Hierarchical structure and functional interpretability for global land cover
summary: Geospatial foundation models generate high-dimensional embeddings that achieve strong predictive performance, yet their internal organization remains obscure, limiting their scientific use. Recent interpretability studies relate Google AlphaEarth Foundations (GAEF) embeddings to continuous environmental variables, but it is still unclear whether the embedding space exhibits a functional or hierarchical organization, in which some dimensions act as specialized representations while others encode shared or broader geospatial structure. In this work, we propose a functional interpretability framework that reverse-engineers the role of embedding dimensions by characterizing their contribution to land cover structure from observed classification behavior. The approach combines large-scale experimentation with a structural analysis of embedding-class relationships based on feature importance patterns and progressive ablation. Our results show that embedding dimensions exhibit consistent and non-uniform functional behavior, allowing them to be categorized along a hierarchical functional spectrum: specialist dimensions associated with specific land cover classes, low- and mid-generalist dimensions capturing shared characteristics between classes, and highgeneralist dimensions reflecting broader environmental gradients. Critically, we find that accurate land cover classification (98% of baseline performance) can be achieved using as few as 2 to 12 of the 64 available dimensions, depending on the class. This demonstrates substantial redundancy in the embedding space and offers a pathway toward significant reductions in computational cost. Together, these findings reveal that AlphaEarth embeddings are not only physically informative, but also functionally organized into a hierarchical structure, providing practical guidance for dimension selection in operational classification tasks.

AI.tldr: GAEF嵌入维度具有层次化功能组织：从特定类别专家到共享特征中低通才，再到环境梯度高通才维度，仅需2-12个维度即可达到98%基线性能。
AI.motivation: 地理空间基础模型生成高维嵌入具有强大预测性能，但其内部组织不透明，限制了科学应用。需要理解嵌入空间是否具有功能或层次组织，以及维度如何编码不同地理空间结构。
AI.method: 提出功能可解释性框架，通过特征重要性模式和渐进消融分析，结合大规模实验和嵌入-类别关系结构分析，逆向工程嵌入维度的功能角色。
AI.result: 嵌入维度表现出一致且非均匀的功能行为，可分为层次化功能谱系：专家维度（特定土地覆盖类别）、低中通才维度（类别间共享特征）、高通才维度（更广泛环境梯度）。仅需2-12个维度即可达到98%基线性能。
AI.conclusion: AlphaEarth嵌入不仅具有物理信息性，而且功能组织成层次结构，为操作分类任务中的维度选择提供实用指导，展示了嵌入空间中的显著冗余，可实现计算成本显著降低。

title: Coalescence of viscous blisters under an elastic sheet
summary: We study the coalescence of identical viscous blisters beneath an elastic sheet both experimentally and numerically. Using a time-resolved synthetic schlieren technique, we measure the evolution of the thickness field of the merging blisters and more specifically the dynamics of the coalescence region. To explain this dynamics, we develop a one-dimensional model based on the lubrication approximation, from which we derive scalings to predict the growth of the coalescence neck. We also numerically solve the full non-linear equation to assess the theory and compare to experiments. Our model illustrates that, at short times, the dynamics of coalescence is mainly controlled by the bending of the elastic sheet, leading to a relationship between the coalescence speed and the radius of curvature of the interface at the coalescence neck.

AI.tldr: 研究弹性薄片下相同粘性水泡的合并过程，通过实验和数值模拟分析合并区域动力学，建立一维润滑近似模型预测合并颈生长规律。
AI.motivation: 研究弹性薄片下粘性水泡的合并动力学，特别是合并区域的演化规律，理解弹性弯曲在合并过程中的主导作用。
AI.method: 采用时间分辨合成纹影技术测量合并水泡厚度场演化，建立基于润滑近似的一维模型推导合并颈生长标度律，并通过数值求解完整非线性方程验证理论并与实验对比。
AI.result: 模型表明在短时间尺度上，合并动力学主要由弹性薄片的弯曲控制，合并速度与合并颈处界面曲率半径存在特定关系。
AI.conclusion: 弹性薄片下粘性水泡的合并过程在早期阶段受弹性弯曲主导，建立的理论模型能有效预测合并颈的生长规律，为理解此类流体-结构相互作用提供了理论框架。

title: State-dependent temperature control in Langevin diffusions using numerical exploratory Hamiltonian-Jacobi-Bellman equations
summary: Choosing how much noise to add in Langevin dynamics is essential for making these algorithms effective in challenging optimization problems. One promising approach is to determine this noise by solving Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman (HJB) equations and their exploratory variants. Though these ideas have been demonstrated to work well in one dimension, extension to high-dimensional minimization has been limited by two unresolved numerical challenges: setting reliable control bounds and stably computing the second-order information (Hessians) required by the equations. These issues and the broader impact of HJB parameters have not been systematically examined. This work provides the first such investigation. We introduce principled control bounds and develop a physics-informed neural network framework that embeds the structure of exploratory HJB equations directly into training, stabilizing computation, and enabling accurate estimation of state-dependent noise in high-dimensional problems. Numerical experiments demonstrate that the resulting method remains robust and effective well beyond low-dimensional test cases.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于物理信息神经网络求解探索性HJB方程的方法，用于稳定计算高维优化中状态依赖的噪声
AI.motivation: 朗之万动力学中噪声大小的选择对优化效果至关重要，但现有基于HJB方程的方法在高维问题中面临控制边界设置和二阶信息计算不稳定两大挑战
AI.method: 引入原则性控制边界，开发物理信息神经网络框架，将探索性HJB方程结构直接嵌入训练过程，稳定计算并实现高维问题中状态依赖噪声的准确估计
AI.result: 数值实验表明该方法在超越低维测试案例的高维问题中保持鲁棒性和有效性
AI.conclusion: 首次系统研究了HJB参数的影响，提出的框架解决了高维优化中噪声选择的关键挑战，为复杂优化问题提供了稳定有效的解决方案

title: AgriChat: A Multimodal Large Language Model for Agriculture Image Understanding
summary: The deployment of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) in agriculture is currently stalled by a critical trade-off: the existing literature lacks the large-scale agricultural datasets required for robust model development and evaluation, while current state-of-the-art models lack the verified domain expertise necessary to reason across diverse taxonomies. To address these challenges, we propose the Vision-to-Verified-Knowledge (V2VK) pipeline, a novel generative AI-driven annotation framework that integrates visual captioning with web-augmented scientific retrieval to autonomously generate the AgriMM benchmark, effectively eliminating biological hallucinations by grounding training data in verified phytopathological literature. The AgriMM benchmark contains over 3,000 agricultural classes and more than 607k VQAs spanning multiple tasks, including fine-grained plant species identification, plant disease symptom recognition, crop counting, and ripeness assessment. Leveraging this verifiable data, we present AgriChat, a specialized MLLM that presents broad knowledge across thousands of agricultural classes and provides detailed agricultural assessments with extensive explanations. Extensive evaluation across diverse tasks, datasets, and evaluation conditions reveals both the capabilities and limitations of current agricultural MLLMs, while demonstrating AgriChat's superior performance over other open-source models, including internal and external benchmarks. The results validate that preserving visual detail combined with web-verified knowledge constitutes a reliable pathway toward robust and trustworthy agricultural AI. The code and dataset are publicly available at https://github.com/boudiafA/AgriChat .

AI.tldr: 提出V2VK管道自动生成AgriMM基准，包含3000+农业类别和607k+视觉问答，并基于此开发了农业专用多模态大模型AgriChat，在多项农业任务上表现优于现有开源模型。
AI.motivation: 当前农业多模态大模型面临两大挑战：缺乏大规模农业数据集用于模型开发和评估，以及现有模型缺乏经过验证的领域专业知识来跨不同分类进行推理。
AI.method: 提出Vision-to-Verified-Knowledge (V2VK)管道，结合视觉描述和基于网络的科学检索，自动生成AgriMM基准数据集。基于该数据集开发了专门的农业多模态大模型AgriChat。
AI.result: AgriMM基准包含3000+农业类别和607k+视觉问答，涵盖植物物种识别、病害症状识别、作物计数和成熟度评估等任务。AgriChat在多项农业任务上表现优于其他开源模型。
AI.conclusion: 保持视觉细节与网络验证知识相结合是构建稳健可信农业AI的可靠途径。AgriChat展示了在农业领域的优越性能，代码和数据集已公开。

title: Large Reasoning Models Struggle to Transfer Parametric Knowledge Across Scripts
summary: In this work, we analyze shortcomings in cross-lingual knowledge transfer in large, modern reasoning LLMs. We demonstrate that the perceived gap in knowledge transfer is primarily a script barrier. First, we conduct an observational data analysis on the performance of thinking models on two datasets with local knowledge from around the world, ECLeKTic and MultiLoKo. Our regression analysis shows that script match - not language or family - is the primary predictor of knowledge transfer failure once model capability and question difficulty are accounted for. We further this finding by providing the LLMs with the key entities of the questions in their source language and find that this disproportionately improves cross-script questions. We then posit that these LLMs could be reasoning better at test-time. To evaluate this, we develop a synthetic generation pipeline to design SFT samples to encourage the model to better reason about transliteration ambiguities when trying to fetch parametric knowledge at inference-time. We show that teaching two models to reason better reduces the cross-script transfer gap. As a result, we conclude that there is potential to improve cross-lingual parametric knowledge transfer during post-training.

AI.tldr: 研究发现现代推理大语言模型中的跨语言知识迁移主要受文字脚本障碍影响，而非语言或语系差异。通过改进推理机制可以显著减少跨脚本知识迁移差距。
AI.motivation: 分析现代大型推理语言模型在跨语言知识迁移中的不足，特别是识别影响知识转移的主要障碍因素。
AI.method: 1) 在ECLeKTic和MultiLoKo数据集上进行观察性数据分析；2) 回归分析确定脚本匹配是知识迁移失败的主要预测因素；3) 提供源语言关键实体测试模型表现；4) 开发合成生成管道创建SFT样本，训练模型更好处理音译歧义。
AI.result: 回归分析显示脚本匹配（而非语言或语系）是知识迁移失败的主要预测因素；提供源语言关键实体能显著改善跨脚本问题；通过SFT训练改进推理机制可减少跨脚本知识迁移差距。
AI.conclusion: 跨语言参数知识迁移的主要障碍是文字脚本差异，通过后训练改进模型的推理机制可以有效提升跨脚本知识转移能力。

title: Draft-and-Prune: Improving the Reliability of Auto-formalization for Logical Reasoning
summary: Auto-formalization (AF) translates natural-language reasoning problems into solver-executable programs, enabling symbolic solvers to perform sound logical deduction. In practice, however, AF pipelines are currently brittle: programs may fail to execute, or execute but encode incorrect semantics. While prior work largely mitigates syntactic failures via repairs based on solver feedback, reducing semantics failures remains a major bottleneck. We propose Draft-and-Prune (D&P), an inference-time framework that improves AF-based logical reasoning via diversity and verification. D&P first drafts multiple natural-language plans and conditions program generation on them. It further prunes executable but contradictory or ambiguous formalizations, and aggregates predictions from surviving paths via majority voting. Across four representative benchmarks (AR-LSAT, ProofWriter, PrOntoQA, LogicalDeduction), D&P substantially strengthens AF-based reasoning without extra supervision. On AR-LSAT, in the AF-only setting, D&P achieves 78.43% accuracy with GPT-4 and 78.00% accuracy with GPT-4o, significantly outperforming the strongest AF baselines MAD-LOGIC and CLOVER. D&P then attains near-ceiling performance on the other benchmarks, including 100% on PrOntoQA and LogicalDeduction.

AI.tldr: Draft-and-Prune (D&P) 是一个推理时框架，通过多样化和验证改进自动形式化的逻辑推理，显著提升多个基准测试的性能。
AI.motivation: 当前自动形式化（AF）管道脆弱，程序可能执行失败或编码错误语义。虽然先前工作通过基于求解器反馈的修复缓解了语法失败，但减少语义失败仍然是主要瓶颈。
AI.method: Draft-and-Prune (D&P) 框架：1）起草多个自然语言计划，并基于这些计划生成程序；2）修剪可执行但矛盾或模糊的形式化；3）通过多数投票从存活路径中聚合预测。
AI.result: 在四个代表性基准测试（AR-LSAT、ProofWriter、PrOntoQA、LogicalDeduction）上，D&P 显著增强了基于 AF 的推理。在 AR-LSAT 上，使用 GPT-4 达到 78.43% 准确率，GPT-4o 达到 78.00%，大幅超越最强基线 MAD-LOGIC 和 CLOVER。在其他基准测试上达到接近天花板性能，包括 PrOntoQA 和 LogicalDeduction 的 100%。
AI.conclusion: Draft-and-Prune 框架通过多样化和验证有效解决了自动形式化中的语义失败问题，显著提升了逻辑推理性能，无需额外监督。

title: HoloByte: Continuous Hyperspherical Distillation for Tokenizer-Free Modeling
summary: Sequence modeling universally relies on discrete subword tokenization to circumvent the $\mathcal{O}(N^2)$ computational intractability of native byte-level attention. However, this heuristic quantization imposes artificial morphological boundaries, enforces vocabulary dependence, and fractures the continuity of the optimization landscape. To resolve this dichotomy, we introduce \textbf{HoloByte}: a strictly tokenizer-free framework utilizing Continuous Hyperspherical Distillation. HoloByte partitions discrete byte sequences into fixed-capacity chunks and projects them into a continuous, strictly bounded hyperspherical manifold via an invertible, dimension-preserving orthogonal rotation operator. This spatial superposition allows a macroscopic transformer to operate exclusively on compressed continuous representations, formally reducing the exact attention time complexity from $\mathcal{O}(N^2D)$ to $\mathcal{O}\left( \frac{N^2}{W^2}D + ND^2 \right)$. A localized causal micro-decoder subsequently unbinds these representations to compute exact byte-level distributions. To govern this continuous trajectory, we propose a dual-objective formulation incorporating a mathematically precise Holographic Latent Mean Squared Error, which strictly bounds the gradient and guarantees asymptotic stability. Theoretically, we derive the minimal embedding dimension $D = Ω(W \ln |\mathcal{V}|)$ required to ensure error-free discrete recovery from the continuous manifold. Empirically, under strictly matched parameter constraints, HoloByte is systematically outperforming a comparable discrete Byte-Pair Encoding (BPE) baseline. These results establish Continuous Hyperspherical Distillation as a mathematically rigorous and computationally tractable foundation for vocabulary-invariant sequence modeling. The code is available at https://github.com/VladimerKhasia/HoloByte

AI.tldr: HoloByte：一种无分词器的序列建模框架，通过连续超球面蒸馏将字节序列投影到连续流形，降低注意力复杂度，实现词汇表无关的建模。
AI.motivation: 传统基于子词分词的序列建模存在三个问题：1) 强加人工形态边界；2) 依赖词汇表；3) 破坏优化景观的连续性。需要一种无分词器的解决方案来避免这些限制。
AI.method: HoloByte采用连续超球面蒸馏技术：1) 将离散字节序列分块；2) 通过可逆正交旋转算子投影到连续有界超球面流形；3) 宏观Transformer在压缩连续表示上操作；4) 局部因果微解码器恢复字节级分布；5) 使用全息潜在均方误差的双目标优化。
AI.result: 理论上推导出确保无误差离散恢复的最小嵌入维度D = Ω(W ln|V|)。在严格匹配参数约束下，HoloByte系统性地优于可比较的BPE基线，证明了连续超球面蒸馏的数学严谨性和计算可行性。
AI.conclusion: 连续超球面蒸馏为词汇表无关的序列建模提供了数学严谨且计算可行的基础，HoloByte框架成功避免了传统分词方法的局限性。

title: Anisotropic Permeability Tensor Prediction from Porous Media Microstructure via Physics-Informed Progressive Transfer Learning with Hybrid CNN-Transformer
summary: Accurate prediction of permeability tensors from pore-scale microstructure images is essential for subsurface flow modeling, yet direct numerical simulation requires hours per sample, fundamentally limiting large-scale uncertainty quantification and reservoir optimization workflows. A physics-informed deep learning framework is presented that resolves this bottleneck by combining a MaxViT hybrid CNN-Transformer architecture with progressive transfer learning and differentiable physical constraints. MaxViT's multi-axis attention mechanism simultaneously resolves grain-scale pore-throat geometry via block-local operations and REV-scale connectivity statistics through grid-global operations, providing the spatial hierarchy that permeability tensor prediction physically requires. Training on 20000 synthetic porous media samples spanning three orders of magnitude in permeability, a three-phase progressive curriculum advances from an ImageNet-pretrained baseline with D4-equivariant augmentation and tensor transformation, through component-weighted loss prioritizing off-diagonal coupling, to frozen-backbone transfer learning with porosity conditioning via Feature-wise Linear Modulation (FiLM). Onsager reciprocity and positive definiteness are enforced via differentiable penalty terms. On a held-out test set of 4000 samples, the framework achieves variance-weighted R2 = 0.9960 (R2_Kxx = 0.9967, R2_Kxy = 0.9758), a 33% reduction in unexplained variance over the supervised baseline. The results offer three transferable principles for physics-informed scientific machine learning: large-scale visual pretraining transfers effectively across domain boundaries; physical constraints are most robustly integrated as differentiable architectural components; and progressive training guided by diagnostic failure-mode analysis enables unambiguous attribution of performance gains across methodological stages.

AI.tldr: 提出基于MaxViT混合CNN-Transformer架构的物理信息深度学习框架，通过渐进式迁移学习和可微分物理约束，从孔隙尺度微结构图像高效预测渗透率张量，相比直接数值模拟大幅提升计算效率。
AI.motivation: 孔隙尺度微结构图像预测渗透率张量对地下流动建模至关重要，但直接数值模拟每个样本需要数小时，严重限制了大尺度不确定性量化和储层优化工作流程，需要开发高效替代方法。
AI.method: 采用MaxViT混合CNN-Transformer架构，结合渐进式迁移学习：1) 使用ImageNet预训练基线和D4等变增强；2) 引入张量变换和分量加权损失函数；3) 冻结骨干网络进行迁移学习，通过FiLM进行孔隙度条件化。通过可微分惩罚项强制执行Onsager互易性和正定性约束。
AI.result: 在4000个测试样本上，框架达到方差加权R²=0.9960（Kxx的R²=0.9967，Kxy的R²=0.9758），相比监督基线减少了33%的未解释方差，显著提升了预测精度。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为物理信息科学机器学习提供了三个可转移原则：大规模视觉预训练能有效跨域迁移；物理约束应作为可微分架构组件集成；基于诊断故障模式分析的渐进式训练能明确归因性能提升。

title: Translation Invariance of Neural Operators for the FitzHugh-Nagumo Model
summary: Neural Operators (NOs) are a powerful deep learning framework designed to learn the solution operator that arise from partial differential equations. This study investigates NOs ability to capture the stiff spatio-temporal dynamics of the FitzHugh-Nagumo model, which describes excitable cells. A key contribution of this work is evaluating the translation invariance using a novel training strategy. NOs are trained using an applied current with varying spatial locations and intensities at a fixed time, and the test set introduces a more challenging out-of-distribution scenario in which the applied current is translated in both time and space. This approach significantly reduces the computational cost of dataset generation. Moreover we benchmark seven NOs architectures: Convolutional Neural Operators (CNOs), Deep Operator Networks (DONs), DONs with CNN encoder (DONs-CNN), Proper Orthogonal Decomposition DONs (POD-DONs), Fourier Neural Operators (FNOs), Tucker Tensorized FNOs (TFNOs), Localized Neural Operators (LocalNOs). We evaluated these models based on training and test accuracy, efficiency, and inference speed. Our results reveal that CNOs performs well on translated test dynamics. However, they require higher training costs, though their performance on the training set is similar to that of the other considered architectures. In contrast, FNOs achieve the lowest training error, but have the highest inference time. Regarding the translated dynamics, FNOs and their variants provide less accurate predictions. Finally, DONs and their variants demonstrate high efficiency in both training and inference, however they do not generalize well to the test set. These findings highlight the current capabilities and limitations of NOs in capturing complex ionic model dynamics and provide a comprehensive benchmark including their application to scenarios involving translated dynamics.

AI.tldr: 该研究评估了7种神经算子架构在捕捉FitzHugh-Nagumo模型刚烈时空动力学方面的表现，特别关注平移不变性，发现不同架构在训练成本、推理速度和泛化能力方面各有优劣。
AI.motivation: 研究神经算子（NOs）捕捉描述可兴奋细胞的FitzHugh-Nagumo模型刚烈时空动力学的能力，特别关注评估平移不变性，为复杂离子模型动力学提供全面基准测试。
AI.method: 采用新颖的训练策略：在固定时间使用不同空间位置和强度的外加电流训练NOs，测试集引入更具挑战性的分布外场景（电流在时间和空间上平移）。评估7种架构：CNOs、DONs、DONs-CNN、POD-DONs、FNOs、TFNOs、LocalNOs，基于训练/测试精度、效率和推理速度进行基准测试。
AI.result: CNOs在平移测试动力学上表现良好但训练成本较高；FNOs训练误差最低但推理时间最长，对平移动力学预测精度较差；DONs及其变体训练和推理效率高但测试集泛化能力不足。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了不同神经算子架构在捕捉复杂离子模型动力学方面的能力与局限性，为涉及平移动力学的场景应用提供了全面基准，表明没有单一架构在所有指标上表现最优，需根据具体应用需求权衡选择。

title: GenLie: A Global-Enhanced Lie Detection Network under Sparsity and Semantic Interference
comment: Accepted to IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP) 2026
summary: Video-based lie detection aims to identify deceptive behaviors from visual cues. Despite recent progress, its core challenge lies in learning sparse yet discriminative representations. Deceptive signals are typically subtle and short-lived, easily overwhelmed by redundant information, while individual and contextual variations introduce strong identity-related noise. To address this issue, we propose GenLie, a Global-Enhanced Lie Detection Network that performs local feature modeling under global supervision. Specifically, sparse and subtle deceptive cues are captured at the local level, while global supervision and optimization ensure robust and discriminative representations by suppressing identity-related noise. Experiments on three public datasets, covering both high- and low-stakes scenarios, show that GenLie consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods. Source code is available at https://github.com/AliasDictusZ1/GenLie.

AI.tldr: GenLie是一个用于视频谎言检测的全局增强网络，通过局部特征建模和全局监督来学习稀疏但具有判别性的欺骗行为表示。
AI.motivation: 视频谎言检测的核心挑战在于学习稀疏但具有判别性的表示。欺骗信号通常微妙且短暂，容易被冗余信息淹没，而个体和上下文变化会引入强烈的身份相关噪声。
AI.method: 提出GenLie网络，在全局监督下进行局部特征建模。局部层面捕捉稀疏微妙的欺骗线索，全局监督和优化通过抑制身份相关噪声来确保鲁棒且具有判别性的表示。
AI.result: 在三个公共数据集（涵盖高风险和低风险场景）上的实验表明，GenLie始终优于最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: GenLie通过全局监督下的局部特征建模，有效解决了视频谎言检测中稀疏欺骗信号学习和身份噪声抑制的问题，在多种场景下表现出优越性能。

title: Ensemble Self-Training for Unsupervised Machine Translation
summary: We present an ensemble-driven self-training framework for unsupervised neural machine translation (UNMT). Starting from a primary language pair, we train multiple UNMT models that share the same translation task but differ in an auxiliary language, inducing structured diversity across models. We then generate pseudo-translations for the primary pair using token-level ensemble decoding, averaging model predictions in both directions. These ensemble outputs are used as synthetic parallel data to further train each model, allowing the models to improve via shared supervision. At deployment time, we select a single model by validation performance, preserving single-model inference cost. Experiments show statistically significant improvements over single-model UNMT baselines, with mean gains of 1.7 chrF when translating from English and 0.67 chrF when translating into English.

AI.tldr: 提出基于集成学习的自训练框架用于无监督神经机器翻译，通过多模型共享监督提升性能，同时保持单模型推理成本
AI.motivation: 无监督机器翻译通常依赖单模型，性能有限。本文旨在通过集成学习提升无监督翻译质量，同时避免增加推理时的计算成本
AI.method: 1) 训练多个共享主要语言对但使用不同辅助语言的UNMT模型；2) 使用词级集成解码生成伪翻译；3) 将集成输出作为合成平行数据进一步训练每个模型；4) 部署时根据验证性能选择单个模型
AI.result: 相比单模型UNMT基线获得统计显著改进：英译其他语言平均提升1.7 chrF，其他语言译英平均提升0.67 chrF
AI.conclusion: 集成驱动的自训练框架能有效提升无监督机器翻译性能，通过多模型协作生成更高质量的伪翻译数据，同时保持部署时的单模型推理效率

title: Graph-Native Cognitive Memory for AI Agents: Formal Belief Revision Semantics for Versioned Memory Architectures
summary: While individual components for AI agent memory exist in prior systems, their architectural synthesis and formal grounding remain underexplored. We present Kumiho, a graph-native cognitive memory architecture grounded in formal belief revision semantics. The structural primitives required for cognitive memory -- immutable revisions, mutable tag pointers, typed dependency edges, URI-based addressing -- are identical to those required for managing agent-produced work as versionable assets, enabling a unified graph-native architecture that serves both purposes. The central formal contribution is a correspondence between the AGM belief revision framework and the operational semantics of a property graph memory system, proving satisfaction of the basic AGM postulates (K*2--K*6) and Hansson's belief base postulates (Relevance, Core-Retainment). The architecture implements a dual-store model (Redis working memory, Neo4j long-term graph) with hybrid fulltext and vector retrieval. On LoCoMo (token-level F1), Kumiho achieves 0.565 overall F1 (n=1,986) including 97.5% adversarial refusal accuracy.
