On LoCoMo-Plus, a Level-2 cognitive memory benchmark testing implicit constraint recall, Kumiho achieves 93.3% judge accuracy (n=401); independent reproduction by the benchmark authors yielded results in the mid-80% range, still substantially outperforming all published baselines (best: Gemini 2.5 Pro, 45.7%). Three architectural innovations drive the results: prospective indexing (LLM-generated future-scenario implications indexed at write time), event extraction (structured causal events preserved in summaries), and client-side LLM reranking. The architecture is model-decoupled: switching the answer model from GPT-4o-mini (~88%) to GPT-4o (93.3%) improves end-to-end accuracy without pipeline changes, at a total evaluation cost of ~$14 for 401 entries.

AI.tldr: Kumiho是一个基于形式信念修正语义的图原生认知记忆架构，通过统一图结构同时支持AI代理的记忆管理和工作资产管理，在认知记忆基准测试中显著优于现有基线。
AI.motivation: 现有AI代理系统中的记忆组件缺乏体系化架构设计和形式化理论基础，需要统一的架构来同时处理认知记忆和代理工作资产管理。
AI.method: 提出基于属性图的统一架构，使用不可变修订、可变标签指针、类型化依赖边和URI寻址等结构原语；实现双存储模型（Redis工作记忆+Neo4j长期图）；采用前瞻索引、事件提取和客户端LLM重排三项创新技术。
AI.result: 在LoCoMo基准上达到0.565总体F1分数（n=1,986），包含97.5%的对抗性拒绝准确率；在LoCoMo-Plus基准上达到93.3%的评估准确率（n=401），显著优于所有已发布的基线（最佳基线Gemini 2.5 Pro为45.7%）。
AI.conclusion: Kumiho通过形式化信念修正语义与图原生架构的结合，为AI代理提供了统一的认知记忆系统，在多个基准测试中表现出色，且具有模型解耦特性，能够灵活切换底层LLM模型。

title: MHPO: Modulated Hazard-aware Policy Optimization for Stable Reinforcement Learning
summary: Regulating the importance ratio is critical for the training stability of Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) based frameworks. However, prevailing ratio control methods, such as hard clipping, suffer from non-differentiable boundaries and vanishing gradient regions, failing to maintain gradient fidelity. Furthermore, these methods lack a hazard-aware mechanism to adaptively suppress extreme deviations, leaving the optimization process vulnerable to abrupt policy shifts. To address these challenges, we propose Modulated Hazard-aware Policy Optimization (MHPO), a novel framework designed for robust and stable reinforcement learning. The proposed MHPO introduces a Log-Fidelity Modulator (LFM) to map unbounded importance ratios into a bounded, differentiable domain. This mechanism effectively prevents high-variance outlier tokens from destabilizing the loss landscape while ensuring global gradient stability. Complementarily, a Decoupled Hazard Penalty (DHP) integrates cumulative hazard functions from survival analysis to independently regulate positive and negative policy shifts. By shaping the optimization landscape with hazard-aware penalties, the proposed MHPO achieves fine-grained regulation of asymmetric policy shifts simultaneously mitigating mode collapse from over-expansion and preventing policy erosion from catastrophic contraction within a stabilized trust region. Extensive evaluations on diverse reasoning benchmarks across both text-based and vision-language tasks demonstrate that MHPO consistently outperforms existing methods, achieving superior performance while significantly enhancing training stability.

AI.tldr: MHPO提出了一种新的强化学习框架，通过Log-Fidelity调制器和解耦危险惩罚机制，解决GRPO训练中重要性比率调节的稳定性问题，在多种推理任务上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有重要性比率控制方法（如硬裁剪）存在不可微边界和梯度消失区域，无法保持梯度保真度，且缺乏危险感知机制来自适应抑制极端偏差，导致优化过程容易受到突然策略变化的影响。
AI.method: 提出MHPO框架：1) Log-Fidelity调制器(LFM)将无界重要性比率映射到有界可微域，防止高方差异常值破坏损失景观；2) 解耦危险惩罚(DHP)集成生存分析中的累积危险函数，独立调节正负策略偏移，在稳定信任区域内同时缓解过度扩展的模式崩溃和灾难性收缩的策略侵蚀。
AI.result: 在多种文本和视觉语言推理基准测试中，MHPO始终优于现有方法，实现了卓越性能，同时显著提高了训练稳定性。
AI.conclusion: MHPO通过创新的调制器和危险感知惩罚机制，有效解决了GRPO训练中的稳定性问题，为强化学习提供了更稳健和稳定的优化框架。

title: Beyond Muon: MUD (MomentUm Decorrelation) for Faster Transformer Training
summary: Orthogonalized-momentum optimizers such as Muon improve transformer training by approximately whitening/orthogonalizing matrix-valued momentum updates via a short polar-decomposition iteration. However, polar-factor approximations typically require multiple large matrix multiplications, and the resulting overhead can be substantial and hardware-dependent. We introduce MUD (MomentUm Decorrelation), a complementary whitening approach that replaces Muon's polar update with a triangular (Cholesky-like) whitening surrogate inspired by classical Gram--Schmidt and Gauss-Seidel ideas. We show that row-orthonormal matrices are fixed points of the MUD map, relate the inner step to symmetric Gauss-Seidel preconditioning of the Gram matrix, and prove quadratic local convergence near the fixed point. In terms of time-to-perplexity, MUD yields consistent 10-50\% wall-clock improvements over tuned AdamW and Muon in time-to-perplexity, typically converging slightly slower per step than Muon but with substantially lower optimizer overhead -- relative to Muon, MUD improves peak tokens/s by roughly $1.3-2.6\times$ across most settings and up to nearly $3\times$ on GPT-2 large on an A100. We also demonstrate training a ESM-2 150M protein language model, where MUD matches Muon-level validation perplexity in significantly less wall-clock time.

AI.tldr: MUD是一种新的优化器，通过三角白化替代Muon的极分解，显著降低计算开销，在保持性能的同时提升训练速度1.3-3倍。
AI.motivation: Muon等正交动量优化器通过极分解实现动量白化，但需要多次大矩阵乘法，计算开销大且硬件依赖性强。需要一种更高效的白化方法。
AI.method: 提出MUD（MomentUm Decorrelation），用三角（类Cholesky）白化替代Muon的极分解更新，灵感来自经典Gram-Schmidt和Gauss-Seidel思想。证明行正交矩阵是MUD映射的不动点，将内部步骤关联到Gram矩阵的对称Gauss-Seidel预处理。
AI.result: MUD在时间困惑度上比调优的AdamW和Muon提升10-50%的挂钟时间，收敛速度略慢于Muon但优化器开销显著降低。相对于Muon，在大多数设置下峰值tokens/s提升1.3-2.6倍，在GPT-2 large上达到近3倍。在ESM-2 150M蛋白质语言模型训练中，MUD在显著更少的挂钟时间内达到Muon水平的验证困惑度。
AI.conclusion: MUD通过三角白化方法有效解决了正交动量优化器的计算开销问题，在保持训练质量的同时大幅提升了训练效率，是Transformer训练中一个有前景的优化器选择。

title: TDMM-LM: Bridging Facial Understanding and Animation via Language Models
summary: Text-guided human body animation has advanced rapidly, yet facial animation lags due to the scarcity of well-annotated, text-paired facial corpora. To close this gap, we leverage foundation generative models to synthesize a large, balanced corpus of facial behavior. We design prompts suite covering emotions and head motions, generate about 80 hours of facial videos with multiple generators, and fit per-frame 3D facial parameters, yielding large-scale (prompt and parameter) pairs for training. Building on this dataset, we probe language models for bidirectional competence over facial motion via two complementary tasks: (1) Motion2Language: given a sequence of 3D facial parameters, the model produces natural-language descriptions capturing content, style, and dynamics; and (2) Language2Motion: given a prompt, the model synthesizes the corresponding sequence of 3D facial parameters via quantized motion tokens for downstream animation. Extensive experiments show that in this setting language models can both interpret and synthesize facial motion with strong generalization. To best of our knowledge, this is the first work to cast facial-parameter modeling as a language problem, establishing a unified path for text-conditioned facial animation and motion understanding.

AI.tldr: 利用基础生成模型合成大规模面部行为数据集，通过语言模型实现面部运动与文本描述的双向转换，建立文本条件面部动画的统一框架
AI.motivation: 文本引导的人体动画发展迅速，但面部动画因缺乏高质量文本配对的面部数据集而滞后。需要填补这一空白，建立文本与面部运动之间的桥梁。
AI.method: 1. 设计涵盖情绪和头部运动的提示词套件，使用多个生成器合成约80小时面部视频；2. 提取每帧3D面部参数，构建大规模（提示词-参数）配对数据集；3. 基于该数据集训练语言模型执行双向任务：Motion2Language（从3D面部参数生成文本描述）和Language2Motion（从文本生成量化运动令牌用于动画）。
AI.result: 实验表明，在此设置下语言模型能够很好地解释和合成面部运动，并具有较强的泛化能力。这是首个将面部参数建模视为语言问题的工作。
AI.conclusion: 通过将面部参数建模为语言问题，建立了文本条件面部动画和运动理解的统一路径，为面部动画领域提供了新的解决方案。

title: Evaluating LLM-Simulated Conversations in Modeling Inconsistent and Uncollaborative Behaviors in Human Social Interaction
summary: Simulating human conversations using large language models (LLMs) has emerged as a scalable methodology for modeling human social interaction. However, simulating human conversations is challenging because they inherently involve inconsistent and uncollaborative behaviors, such as misunderstandings and interruptions. Analysis comparing inconsistent and uncollaborative behaviors in human- and LLM-generated conversations remains limited, although reproducing these behaviors is integral to simulating human-like and complex social interaction. In this work, we introduce CoCoEval, an evaluation framework that analyzes LLM-simulated conversations by detecting 10 types of inconsistent and uncollaborative behaviors at the turn level using an LLM-as-a-Judge. Using CoCoEval, we evaluate GPT-4.1, GPT-5.1, and Claude Opus 4 by comparing the frequencies of detected behaviors in conversations simulated by each model and in human conversations across academic, business, and governmental meetings, as well as debates. Our analysis shows that (1) under vanilla prompting, LLM-simulated conversations exhibit far fewer inconsistent and uncollaborative behaviors than human conversations; (2) prompt engineering does not provide reliable control over these behaviors, as our results show that different prompts lead to their under- or overproduction; and (3) supervised fine-tuning on human conversations can lead LLMs to overproduce a narrow set of behaviors, such as repetition. Our findings highlight the difficulty of simulating human conversations, raising concerns about the use of LLMs as a proxy for human social interaction.

AI.tldr: CoCoEval框架评估LLM模拟对话中的不一致和不合作行为，发现LLM对话比人类对话更少此类行为，提示工程难以可靠控制，微调会导致行为过度产生，凸显模拟人类对话的困难。
AI.motivation: 模拟人类对话对建模社会互动很重要，但现有研究对LLM模拟对话中不一致和不合作行为的分析有限，而这些行为是模拟真实人类社交互动的关键。
AI.method: 提出CoCoEval评估框架，使用LLM-as-a-Judge方法在对话轮次层面检测10种不一致和不合作行为，评估GPT-4.1、GPT-5.1和Claude Opus 4在学术、商业、政府会议和辩论场景中的表现。
AI.result: 1) 基础提示下LLM对话比人类对话少很多不一致不合作行为；2) 提示工程无法可靠控制这些行为，不同提示会导致行为不足或过度产生；3) 在人类对话上微调会使LLM过度产生特定行为（如重复）。
AI.conclusion: 模拟人类对话具有挑战性，LLM难以准确再现人类社交互动中的复杂行为，对使用LLM作为人类社交互动代理表示担忧。

title: Contrastive Reasoning Alignment: Reinforcement Learning from Hidden Representations
summary: We propose CRAFT, a red-teaming alignment framework that leverages model reasoning capabilities and hidden representations to improve robustness against jailbreak attacks. Unlike prior defenses that operate primarily at the output level, CRAFT aligns large reasoning models to generate safety-aware reasoning traces by explicitly optimizing objectives defined over the hidden state space. Methodologically, CRAFT integrates contrastive representation learning with reinforcement learning to separate safe and unsafe reasoning trajectories, yielding a latent-space geometry that supports robust, reasoning-level safety alignment. Theoretically, we show that incorporating latent-textual consistency into GRPO eliminates superficially aligned policies by ruling them out as local optima. Empirically, we evaluate CRAFT on multiple safety benchmarks using two strong reasoning models, Qwen3-4B-Thinking and R1-Distill-Llama-8B, where it consistently outperforms state-of-the-art defenses such as IPO and SafeKey. Notably, CRAFT delivers an average 79.0% improvement in reasoning safety and 87.7% improvement in final-response safety over the base models, demonstrating the effectiveness of hidden-space reasoning alignment.

AI.tldr: CRAFT是一个利用模型推理能力和隐藏表示来提升对抗越狱攻击鲁棒性的红队对齐框架，通过隐藏状态空间优化实现安全感知推理轨迹对齐。
AI.motivation: 现有防御主要在输出层面操作，缺乏对推理过程的深度安全对齐。需要利用模型的推理能力和隐藏表示来构建更鲁棒的安全对齐框架。
AI.method: CRAFT结合对比表示学习和强化学习，在隐藏状态空间分离安全与不安全推理轨迹，通过潜在-文本一致性优化GRPO，消除表面对齐策略。
AI.result: 在多个安全基准测试中，CRAFT在Qwen3-4B-Thinking和R1-Distill-Llama-8B模型上优于IPO和SafeKey等SOTA防御，推理安全平均提升79.0%，最终响应安全提升87.7%。
AI.conclusion: 隐藏空间推理对齐能有效提升模型对抗越狱攻击的鲁棒性，CRAFT框架为安全对齐提供了新的方向。

title: Integrating Explainable Machine Learning and Mixed-Integer Optimization for Personalized Sleep Quality Intervention
summary: Sleep quality is influenced by a complex interplay of behavioral, environmental, and psychosocial factors, yet most computational studies focus mainly on predictive risk identification rather than actionable intervention design. Although machine learning models can accurately predict subjective sleep outcomes, they rarely translate predictive insights into practical intervention strategies. To address this gap, we propose a personalized predictive-prescriptive framework that integrates interpretable machine learning with mixed-integer optimization. A supervised classifier trained on survey data predicts sleep quality, while SHAP-based feature attribution quantifies the influence of modifiable factors. These importance measures are incorporated into a mixed-integer optimization model that identifies minimal and feasible behavioral adjustments, while modelling resistance to change through a penalty mechanism. The framework achieves strong predictive performance, with a test F1-score of 0.9544 and an accuracy of 0.9366. Sensitivity and Pareto analyses reveal a clear trade-off between expected improvement and intervention intensity, with diminishing returns as additional changes are introduced. At the individual level, the model generates concise recommendations, often suggesting one or two high-impact behavioral adjustments and sometimes recommending no change when expected gains are minimal. By integrating prediction, explanation, and constrained optimization, this framework demonstrates how data-driven insights can be translated into structured and personalized decision support for sleep improvement.

AI.tldr: 提出一个结合可解释机器学习与混合整数优化的个性化预测-处方框架，将睡眠质量预测转化为可行的行为干预建议
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注睡眠质量的风险预测，但很少将预测结果转化为实际的干预策略，缺乏从预测到行动的可操作框架
AI.method: 使用监督分类器预测睡眠质量，SHAP特征归因量化可修改因素的影响，混合整数优化模型识别最小可行行为调整，并通过惩罚机制建模改变阻力
AI.result: 测试F1分数0.9544，准确率0.9366；敏感性分析显示预期改善与干预强度之间存在权衡；个体层面生成简洁建议（通常1-2个高影响力调整）
AI.conclusion: 通过整合预测、解释和约束优化，该框架展示了如何将数据驱动的洞察转化为结构化、个性化的睡眠改善决策支持

title: Solution for 10th Competition on Ambivalence/Hesitancy (AH) Video Recognition Challenge using Divergence-Based Multimodal Fusion
summary: We address the Ambivalence/Hesitancy (A/H) Video Recognition Challenge at the 10th ABAW Competition (CVPR 2026). We propose a divergence-based multimodal fusion that explicitly measures cross-modal conflict between visual, audio, and textual channels. Visual features are encoded as Action Units (AUs) extracted via Py-Feat, audio via Wav2Vec 2.0, and text via BERT. Each modality is processed by a BiLSTM with attention pooling and projected into a shared embedding space. The fusion module computes pairwise absolute differences between modality embeddings, directly capturing the incongruence that characterizes A/H. On the BAH dataset, our approach achieves a Macro F1 of 0.6808 on the validation test set, outperforming the challenge baseline of 0.2827. Statistical analysis across 1{,}132 videos confirms that temporal variability of AUs is the dominant visual discriminator of A/H.

AI.tldr: 提出基于分歧的多模态融合方法，通过显式测量视觉、音频和文本模态间的冲突来识别矛盾/犹豫视频，在BAH数据集上取得0.6808的Macro F1分数，显著优于基线0.2827。
AI.motivation: 针对第10届ABAW竞赛中的矛盾/犹豫视频识别挑战，现有方法未能有效捕捉多模态间的冲突特征，而矛盾/犹豫状态通常表现为不同模态信息的不一致。
AI.method: 采用基于分歧的多模态融合方法：视觉特征通过Py-Feat提取动作单元，音频通过Wav2Vec 2.0编码，文本通过BERT编码；各模态经BiLSTM和注意力池化处理，投影到共享嵌入空间；融合模块计算模态嵌入间的绝对差异，直接捕捉表征矛盾/犹豫的模态冲突。
AI.result: 在BAH数据集验证集上获得0.6808的Macro F1分数，显著优于挑战基线0.2827；统计分析1132个视频证实动作单元的时间变异性是识别矛盾/犹豫的主要视觉判别特征。
AI.conclusion: 基于分歧的多模态融合方法能有效捕捉矛盾/犹豫状态中的模态冲突，动作单元的时间变异性是关键视觉线索，该方法在矛盾/犹豫视频识别任务中表现出色。

title: Knowledge Localization in Mixture-of-Experts LLMs Using Cross-Lingual Inconsistency
summary: Modern LLMs continue to exhibit significant variance in behavior across languages, such as being able to recall factual information in some languages but not others. While typically studied as a problem to be mitigated, in this work, we propose leveraging this cross-lingual inconsistency as a tool for interpretability in mixture-of-experts (MoE) LLMs. Our knowledge localization framework contrasts routing for sets of languages where the model correctly recalls information from languages where it fails. This allows us to isolate model components that play a functional role in answering about a piece of knowledge. Our method proceeds in two stages: (1) querying the model with difficult factual questions across a diverse set of languages to generate "success" and "failure" activation buckets and then (2) applying a statistical contrastive analysis to the MoE router logits to identify experts important for knowledge. To validate the necessity of this small number of experts for answering a knowledge question, we deactivate them and re-ask the question. We find that despite only deactivating about 20 out of 6000 experts, the model no longer answers correctly in over 40% of cases. Generally, this method provides a realistic and scalable knowledge localization approach to address increasingly complex LLMs.

AI.tldr: 利用MoE LLMs中的跨语言不一致性进行知识定位，通过对比成功和失败语言的路由模式来识别负责特定知识的关键专家模块
AI.motivation: 现代LLMs在不同语言间存在行为差异，通常被视为需要缓解的问题。本文提出利用这种跨语言不一致性作为MoE LLMs可解释性工具，将问题转化为机会。
AI.method: 两阶段方法：1) 在多语言中查询困难事实问题，生成"成功"和"失败"激活桶；2) 对MoE路由器logits进行统计对比分析，识别对知识重要的专家。通过停用这些专家验证其必要性。
AI.result: 仅停用约20个专家（共6000个），模型在超过40%的情况下不再正确回答问题。证明该方法能有效定位负责特定知识的关键专家模块。
AI.conclusion: 该方法提供了一种现实且可扩展的知识定位方法，能够应对日益复杂的LLMs，为模型可解释性研究提供了新视角。

title: InfoDensity: Rewarding Information-Dense Traces for Efficient Reasoning
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) with extended reasoning capabilities often generate verbose and redundant reasoning traces, incurring unnecessary computational cost. While existing reinforcement learning approaches address this by optimizing final response length, they neglect the quality of intermediate reasoning steps, leaving models vulnerable to reward hacking. We argue that verbosity is not merely a length problem, but a symptom of poor intermediate reasoning quality. To investigate this, we conduct an empirical study tracking the conditional entropy of the answer distribution across reasoning steps. We find that high-quality reasoning traces exhibit two consistent properties: low uncertainty convergence and monotonic progress. These findings suggest that high-quality reasoning traces are informationally dense, that is, each step contributes meaningful entropy reduction relative to the total reasoning length. Motivated by this, we propose InfoDensity, a reward framework for RL training that combines an AUC-based reward and a monotonicity reward as a unified measure of reasoning quality, weighted by a length scaling term that favors achieving equivalent quality more concisely. Experiments on mathematical reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that InfoDensity matches or surpasses state-of-the-art baselines in accuracy while significantly reducing token usage, achieving a strong accuracy-efficiency trade-off.

AI.tldr: 提出InfoDensity奖励框架，通过衡量推理质量而非仅长度来优化LLM推理过程，在保持准确率的同时显著减少计算成本
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习方法仅优化最终响应长度，忽略了中间推理步骤的质量，导致模型容易奖励黑客攻击。研究发现冗余推理是中间推理质量差的表现，而非简单的长度问题
AI.method: 提出InfoDensity奖励框架，结合基于AUC的奖励和单调性奖励作为推理质量的统一度量，并通过长度缩放项鼓励在保持质量的前提下更简洁的推理
AI.result: 在数学推理基准测试中，InfoDensity在准确率上匹配或超越现有最优方法，同时显著减少token使用量，实现了良好的准确率-效率权衡
AI.conclusion: 通过关注推理质量而非仅长度，InfoDensity能够有效减少冗余推理，为LLM推理优化提供了更有效的方法

title: Minimum-Action Learning: Energy-Constrained Symbolic Model Selection for Physical Law Identification from Noisy Data
summary: Identifying physical laws from noisy observational data is a central challenge in scientific machine learning. We present Minimum-Action Learning (MAL), a framework that selects symbolic force laws from a pre-specified basis library by minimizing a Triple-Action functional combining trajectory reconstruction, architectural sparsity, and energy-conservation enforcement. A wide-stencil acceleration-matching technique reduces noise variance by 10,000x, transforming an intractable problem (SNR ~0.02) into a learnable one (SNR ~1.6); this preprocessing is the critical enabler shared by all methods tested, including SINDy variants. On two benchmarks -- Kepler gravity and Hooke's law -- MAL recovers the correct force law with Kepler exponent p = 3.01 +/- 0.01 at ~0.07 kWh (40% reduction vs. prediction-error-only baselines). The raw correct-basis rate is 40% for Kepler and 90% for Hooke; an energy-conservation-based criterion discriminates the true force law in all cases, yielding 100% pipeline-level identification. Basis library sensitivity experiments show that near-confounders degrade selection (20% with added r^{-2.5} and r^{-1.5}), while distant additions are harmless, and the conservation diagnostic remains informative even when the correct basis is absent. Direct comparison with noise-robust SINDy variants, Hamiltonian Neural Networks, and Lagrangian Neural Networks confirms MAL's distinct niche: interpretable, energy-constrained model selection that combines symbolic basis identification with dynamical rollout validation.

AI.tldr: MAL框架通过最小化三动作函数（轨迹重建、架构稀疏性、能量守恒）从预设基函数库中选择符号力定律，结合宽模板加速度匹配技术降低噪声方差10000倍，在开普勒引力和胡克定律基准测试中实现100%管道级识别。
AI.motivation: 从噪声观测数据中识别物理定律是科学机器学习中的核心挑战，现有方法在处理高噪声数据时存在困难，需要开发既能处理噪声又能保持物理约束的符号模型选择框架。
AI.method: 提出最小动作学习（MAL）框架：1）使用宽模板加速度匹配技术将噪声方差降低10000倍；2）通过最小化三动作函数（轨迹重建、架构稀疏性、能量守恒）从基函数库中选择符号力定律；3）结合能量守恒准则进行模型选择。
AI.result: 在开普勒引力基准中恢复指数p=3.01±0.01，能耗降低40%；原始正确基函数选择率为开普勒40%、胡克定律90%；通过能量守恒准则实现100%管道级识别；与噪声鲁棒SINDy变体、哈密顿神经网络和拉格朗日神经网络相比，MAL在可解释、能量约束的模型选择方面具有独特优势。
AI.conclusion: MAL框架成功解决了从高噪声数据中识别物理定律的挑战，通过结合噪声预处理、符号基函数选择和物理约束验证，实现了可解释、能量守恒的模型选择，为科学机器学习中的符号发现提供了有效工具。

title: KGS-GCN: Enhancing Sparse Skeleton Sensing via Kinematics-Driven Gaussian Splatting and Probabilistic Topology for Action Recognition
summary: Skeleton-based action recognition is widely utilized in sensor systems including human-computer interaction and intelligent surveillance. Nevertheless, current sensor devices typically generate sparse skeleton data as discrete coordinates, which inevitably discards fine-grained spatiotemporal details during highly dynamic movements. Moreover, the rigid constraints of predefined physical sensor topologies hinder the modeling of latent long-range dependencies. To overcome these limitations, we propose KGS-GCN, a graph convolutional network that integrates kinematics-driven Gaussian splatting with probabilistic topology. Our framework explicitly addresses the challenges of sensor data sparsity and topological rigidity by transforming discrete joints into continuous generative representations. Firstly, a kinematics-driven Gaussian splatting module is designed to dynamically construct anisotropic covariance matrices using instantaneous joint velocity vectors. This module enhances visual representation by rendering sparse skeleton sequences into multi-view continuous heatmaps rich in spatiotemporal semantics. Secondly, to transcend the limitations of fixed physical connections, a probabilistic topology construction method is proposed. This approach generates an adaptive prior adjacency matrix by quantifying statistical correlations via the Bhattacharyya distance between joint Gaussian distributions. Ultimately, the GCN backbone is adaptively modulated by the rendered visual features via a visual context gating mechanism. Empirical results demonstrate that KGS-GCN significantly enhances the modeling of complex spatiotemporal dynamics. By addressing the inherent limitations of sparse inputs, our framework offers a robust solution for processing low-fidelity sensor data. This approach establishes a practical pathway for improving perceptual reliability in real-world sensing applications.

AI.tldr: KGS-GCN：一种结合运动学驱动高斯泼溅与概率拓扑的图卷积网络，用于解决骨架动作识别中传感器数据稀疏性和拓扑刚性问题。
AI.motivation: 当前传感器设备生成的稀疏骨架数据会丢失细粒度时空细节，且预定义的物理传感器拓扑限制了长程依赖建模，需要克服这些限制来提升动作识别性能。
AI.method: 1. 运动学驱动高斯泼溅模块：利用瞬时关节速度向量动态构建各向异性协方差矩阵，将稀疏骨架序列渲染成富含时空语义的多视角连续热图；2. 概率拓扑构建方法：通过Bhattacharyya距离量化关节高斯分布间的统计相关性，生成自适应先验邻接矩阵；3. 视觉上下文门控机制：让GCN主干自适应地调制渲染的视觉特征。
AI.result: 实验结果表明KGS-GCN显著增强了复杂时空动态建模能力，为处理低保真传感器数据提供了鲁棒解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过解决稀疏输入的固有局限性，为现实世界传感应用中提高感知可靠性建立了实用途径。

title: Exploiting the English Grammar Profile for L2 grammatical analysis with LLMs
summary: Evaluating the grammatical competence of second language (L2) learners is essential both for providing targeted feedback and for assessing proficiency. To achieve this, we propose a novel framework leveraging the English Grammar Profile (EGP), a taxonomy of grammatical constructs mapped to the proficiency levels of the Common European Framework of Reference (CEFR), to detect learners' attempts at grammatical constructs and classify them as successful or unsuccessful. This detection can then be used to provide fine-grained feedback. Moreover, the grammatical constructs are used as predictors of proficiency assessment by using automatically detected attempts as predictors of holistic CEFR proficiency. For the selection of grammatical constructs derived from the EGP, rule-based and LLM-based classifiers are compared. We show that LLMs outperform rule-based methods on semantically and pragmatically nuanced constructs, while rule-based approaches remain competitive for constructs that rely purely on morphological or syntactic features and do not require semantic interpretation. For proficiency assessment, we evaluate both rule-based and hybrid pipelines and show that a hybrid approach combining a rule-based pre-filter with an LLM consistently yields the strongest performance. Since our framework operates on pairs of original learner sentences and their corrected counterparts, we also evaluate a fully automated pipeline using automatic grammatical error correction. This pipeline closely approaches the performance of semi-automated systems based on manual corrections, particularly for the detection of successful attempts at grammatical constructs. Overall, our framework emphasises learners' successful attempts in addition to unsuccessful ones, enabling positive, formative feedback and providing actionable insights into grammatical development.

AI.tldr: 提出基于英语语法档案（EGP）的框架，用于检测二语学习者的语法结构尝试并分类为成功/不成功，同时用于CEFR水平评估，结合规则和LLM方法。
AI.motivation: 评估二语学习者的语法能力对于提供针对性反馈和评估熟练度至关重要，但现有方法可能未能充分利用学习者的成功尝试来提供积极反馈。
AI.method: 使用英语语法档案（EGP）作为语法结构分类框架，结合规则基和LLM基分类器检测语法结构尝试，并开发混合管道用于熟练度评估，同时评估自动语法纠错的效果。
AI.result: LLM在语义和语用细微差别的语法结构上优于规则方法，而规则方法在纯形态或句法特征上仍有竞争力；混合方法（规则预过滤+LLM）表现最佳；自动纠错管道接近基于人工修正的半自动系统性能。
AI.conclusion: 该框架强调学习者的成功尝试，能够提供积极的形成性反馈，并为语法发展提供可操作的见解，结合规则和LLM方法的混合管道在语法结构检测和熟练度评估方面表现最佳。

title: Physics-informed offline reinforcement learning eliminates catastrophic fuel waste in maritime routing
summary: International shipping produces approximately 3% of global greenhouse gas emissions, yet voyage routing remains dominated by heuristic methods. We present PIER (Physics-Informed, Energy-efficient, Risk-aware routing), an offline reinforcement learning framework that learns fuel-efficient, safety-aware routing policies from physics-calibrated environments grounded in historical vessel tracking data and ocean reanalysis products, requiring no online simulator. Validated on one full year (2023) of AIS data across seven Gulf of Mexico routes (840 episodes per method), PIER reduces mean CO2 emissions by 10% relative to great-circle routing. However, PIER's primary contribution is eliminating catastrophic fuel waste: great-circle routing incurs extreme fuel consumption (>1.5x median) in 4.8% of voyages; PIER reduces this to 0.5%, a 9-fold reduction. Per-voyage fuel variance is 3.5x lower (p<0.001), with bootstrap 95% CI for mean savings [2.9%, 15.7%]. Partial validation against observed AIS vessel behavior confirms consistency with the fastest real transits while exhibiting 23.1x lower variance. Crucially, PIER is forecast-independent: unlike A* path optimization whose wave protection degrades 4.5x under realistic forecast uncertainty, PIER maintains constant performance using only local observations. The framework combines physics-informed state construction, demonstration-augmented offline data, and a decoupled post-hoc safety shield, an architecture that transfers to wildfire evacuation, aircraft trajectory optimization, and autonomous navigation in unmapped terrain.

AI.tldr: PIER是一个基于离线强化学习的船舶航线优化框架，利用物理校准环境和历史数据，无需在线模拟器，能显著减少燃料消耗和碳排放，同时提高安全性。
AI.motivation: 国际航运占全球温室气体排放的3%，但当前航线规划仍主要依赖启发式方法，存在燃料浪费和安全性问题，需要更智能、节能且安全的航线优化方案。
AI.method: PIER采用离线强化学习框架，结合物理信息状态构建、演示增强的离线数据，以及解耦的后验安全屏蔽，从物理校准环境中学习燃料效率和安全性策略。
AI.result: 在墨西哥湾7条航线一年数据验证中，PIER相比大圆航线平均减少10% CO2排放，将极端燃料消耗（>1.5倍中位数）从4.8%降至0.5%，燃料方差降低3.5倍，且不依赖天气预报。
AI.conclusion: PIER框架能有效优化船舶航线，显著减少燃料消耗和碳排放，提高安全性，且架构可推广到野火疏散、飞机轨迹优化和未知地形自主导航等应用。

title: Formal verification of tree-based machine learning models for lateral spreading
summary: Machine learning models for geotechnical hazard prediction can achieve high accuracy while learning physically inconsistent relationships from sparse or biased training data. Current remedies (post-hoc explainability, such as SHAP and LIME, and training-time constraints) either diagnose individual predictions approximately or restrict model capacity without providing exhaustive guarantees. This paper encodes trained tree ensembles as logical formulas in a Satisfiability Modulo Theories (SMT) solver and checks physical specifications across the entire input domain, not just sampled points. Four geotechnical specifications (water table depth, PGA monotonicity, distance safety, and flat-ground safety) are formalized as decidable logical formulas and verified via SMT against both XGBoost ensembles and Explainable Boosting Machines (EBMs) trained on the 2011 Christchurch earthquake lateral spreading dataset (7,291 sites, four features). The SMT solver either produces a concrete counterexample where a specification fails or proves that no violation exists. The unconstrained EBM (80.1% accuracy) violates all four specifications. A fully constrained EBM (67.2%) satisfies three of four specifications, demonstrating that iterative constraint application guided by verification can progressively improve physical consistency. A Pareto analysis of 33 model variants reveals a persistent trade-off, as none of the variants studied achieve both greater than 80% accuracy and full compliance with the specified set. SHAP analysis of specification counterexamples shows that the offending feature can rank last, demonstrating that post-hoc explanations do not substitute for formal verification. These results establish a verify-fix-verify engineering loop and a formal certification for deploying physically consistent ML models in safety-critical geotechnical applications.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出使用SMT求解器将训练好的树集成模型编码为逻辑公式，验证其在所有输入域上是否符合物理规范，而非仅采样点，为安全关键的地工应用提供形式化认证。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习模型在稀疏或有偏训练数据下可能学习到物理不一致的关系，而现有方法（如SHAP、LIME等后验解释性和训练时约束）要么只能近似诊断单个预测，要么限制模型能力而不提供全面保证。
AI.method: 将训练好的树集成模型（XGBoost和EBMs）编码为SMT求解器中的逻辑公式，将四个地工规范（地下水位深度、PGA单调性、距离安全性和平坦地面安全性）形式化为可判定的逻辑公式，通过SMT验证在整个输入域上的合规性。
AI.result: 无约束EBM（80.1%准确率）违反所有四个规范；完全约束EBM（67.2%准确率）满足其中三个规范；33个模型变体的帕累托分析显示准确率与规范合规性之间存在持久权衡；SHAP分析显示违规特征可能排名最后，证明后验解释不能替代形式验证。
AI.conclusion: 建立了验证-修复-验证的工程循环，为在安全关键的地工应用中部署物理一致的机器学习模型提供了形式化认证方法，证明形式验证对于确保模型物理一致性至关重要。

title: Omni IIE Bench: Benchmarking the Practical Capabilities of Image Editing Models
summary: While Instruction-based Image Editing (IIE) has achieved significant progress, existing benchmarks pursue task breadth via mixed evaluations. This paradigm obscures a critical failure mode crucial in professional applications: the inconsistent performance of models across tasks of varying semantic scales. To address this gap, we introduce Omni IIE Bench, a high-quality, human-annotated benchmark specifically designed to diagnose the editing consistency of IIE models in practical application scenarios. Omni IIE Bench features an innovative dual-track diagnostic design: (1) Single-turn Consistency, comprising shared-context task pairs of attribute modification and entity replacement; and (2) Multi-turn Coordination, involving continuous dialogue tasks that traverse semantic scales. The benchmark is constructed via an exceptionally rigorous multi-stage human filtering process, incorporating a quality standard enforced by computer vision graduate students and an industry relevance review conducted by professional designers. We perform a comprehensive evaluation of 8 mainstream IIE models using Omni IIE Bench. Our analysis quantifies, for the first time, a prevalent performance gap: nearly all models exhibit a significant performance degradation when transitioning from low-semantic-scale to high-semantic-scale tasks. Omni IIE Bench provides critical diagnostic tools and insights for the development of next-generation, more reliable, and stable IIE models.

AI.tldr: 提出了Omni IIE Bench基准，用于诊断指令图像编辑模型在不同语义尺度任务中的一致性表现，发现现有模型从低语义尺度到高语义尺度任务时性能显著下降。
AI.motivation: 现有指令图像编辑基准通过混合评估追求任务广度，但忽视了专业应用中关键的一致性失败模式：模型在不同语义尺度任务上的不一致表现。
AI.method: 构建高质量人工标注基准Omni IIE Bench，采用创新的双轨诊断设计：1) 单轮一致性（属性修改和实体替换的共享上下文任务对）；2) 多轮协调（跨越语义尺度的连续对话任务）。通过多阶段人工筛选流程构建，包括计算机视觉研究生执行的质量标准和专业设计师的行业相关性审查。
AI.result: 对8个主流IIE模型进行全面评估，首次量化了普遍存在的性能差距：几乎所有模型从低语义尺度任务过渡到高语义尺度任务时都表现出显著的性能下降。
AI.conclusion: Omni IIE Bench为开发下一代更可靠、更稳定的IIE模型提供了关键的诊断工具和见解。

title: Tabular LLMs for Interpretable Few-Shot Alzheimer's Disease Prediction with Multimodal Biomedical Data
summary: Accurate diagnosis of Alzheimer's disease (AD) requires handling tabular biomarker data, yet such data are often small and incomplete, where deep learning models frequently fail to outperform classical methods. Pretrained large language models (LLMs) offer few-shot generalization, structured reasoning, and interpretable outputs, providing a powerful paradigm shift for clinical prediction. We propose TAP-GPT Tabular Alzheimer's Prediction GPT, a domain-adapted tabular LLM framework built on TableGPT2 and fine-tuned for few-shot AD classification using tabular prompts rather than plain texts. We evaluate TAP-GPT across four ADNI-derived datasets, including QT-PAD biomarkers and region-level structural MRI, amyloid PET, and tau PET for binary AD classification. Across multimodal and unimodal settings, TAP-GPT improves upon its backbone models and outperforms traditional machine learning baselines in the few-shot setting while remaining competitive with state-of-the-art general-purpose LLMs. We show that feature selection mitigates degradation in high-dimensional inputs and that TAP-GPT maintains stable performance under simulated and real-world missingness without imputation. Additionally, TAP-GPT produces structured, modality-aware reasoning aligned with established AD biology and shows greater stability under self-reflection, supporting its use in iterative multi-agent systems. To our knowledge, this is the first systematic application of a tabular-specialized LLM to multimodal biomarker-based AD prediction, demonstrating that such pretrained models can effectively address structured clinical prediction tasks and laying the foundation for tabular LLM-driven multi-agent clinical decision-support systems. The source code is publicly available on GitHub: https://github.com/sophie-kearney/TAP-GPT.

AI.tldr: TAP-GPT：基于TableGPT2的表格专用LLM框架，用于阿尔茨海默病少样本分类，在缺失数据处理和可解释性方面表现优异
AI.motivation: 阿尔茨海默病诊断需要处理表格生物标志物数据，但这类数据通常样本小、不完整，传统深度学习方法难以超越经典方法。预训练大语言模型具有少样本泛化、结构化推理和可解释输出等优势，为临床预测提供了新范式。
AI.method: 提出TAP-GPT框架，基于TableGPT2进行领域适应，使用表格提示而非纯文本进行微调，专门用于阿尔茨海默病的少样本分类。在四个ADNI数据集上评估，包括QT-PAD生物标志物、结构MRI、淀粉样蛋白PET和tau PET等多模态数据。
AI.result: TAP-GPT在多模态和单模态设置下均优于其骨干模型和传统机器学习基线，在少样本场景表现优异。特征选择缓解了高维输入的性能下降，无需插补即可在模拟和真实缺失数据下保持稳定性能。模型产生结构化、模态感知的推理，与已知AD生物学一致，且在自反思下表现更稳定。
AI.conclusion: 这是首次系统地将表格专用LLM应用于多模态生物标志物的AD预测，证明预训练模型能有效处理结构化临床预测任务，为基于表格LLM的多智能体临床决策支持系统奠定了基础。

title: ShuttleEnv: An Interactive Data-Driven RL Environment for Badminton Strategy Modeling
summary: We present ShuttleEnv, an interactive and data-driven simulation environment for badminton, designed to support reinforcement learning and strategic behavior analysis in fast-paced adversarial sports. The environment is grounded in elite-player match data and employs explicit probabilistic models to simulate rally-level dynamics, enabling realistic and interpretable agent-opponent interactions without relying on physics-based simulation. In this demonstration, we showcase multiple trained agents within ShuttleEnv and provide live, step-by-step visualization of badminton rallies, allowing attendees to explore different play styles, observe emergent strategies, and interactively analyze decision-making behaviors. ShuttleEnv serves as a reusable platform for research, visualization, and demonstration of intelligent agents in sports AI. Our ShuttleEnv demo video URL: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1hTR4P16U27H2O0-w316bR73pxE2ucczX/view

AI.tldr: ShuttleEnv是一个基于数据的羽毛球交互式模拟环境，用于支持强化学习和战略行为分析，无需物理模拟即可实现真实的对抗交互。
AI.motivation: 为快速对抗性体育（如羽毛球）提供一个可重复使用的研究平台，支持强化学习、战略行为分析，并实现真实且可解释的智能体交互。
AI.method: 基于精英选手比赛数据，采用显式概率模型模拟回合级动态，实现无需物理仿真的真实对抗交互，并提供实时可视化分析。
AI.result: 开发了ShuttleEnv环境，展示了多个训练有素的智能体，提供实时回合可视化，支持探索不同打法风格、观察涌现策略和交互式决策分析。
AI.conclusion: ShuttleEnv作为一个可重复使用的平台，为体育AI领域的研究、可视化和智能体演示提供了有效工具。

title: Integrating Inductive Biases in Transformers via Distillation for Financial Time Series Forecasting
summary: Transformer-based models have been widely adopted for time-series forecasting due to their high representational capacity and architectural flexibility. However, many Transformer variants implicitly assume stationarity and stable temporal dynamics -- assumptions routinely violated in financial markets characterized by regime shifts and non-stationarity. Empirically, state-of-the-art time-series Transformers often underperform even vanilla Transformers on financial tasks, while simpler architectures with distinct inductive biases, such as CNNs and RNNs, can achieve stronger performance with substantially lower complexity. At the same time, no single inductive bias dominates across markets or regimes, suggesting that robust financial forecasting requires integrating complementary temporal priors. We propose TIPS (Transformer with Inductive Prior Synthesis), a knowledge distillation framework that synthesizes diverse inductive biases -- causality, locality, and periodicity -- within a unified Transformer. TIPS trains bias-specialized Transformer teachers via attention masking, then distills their knowledge into a single student model with regime-dependent alignment across inductive biases. Across four major equity markets, TIPS achieves state-of-the-art performance, outperforming strong ensemble baselines by 55%, 9%, and 16% in annual return, Sharpe ratio, and Calmar ratio, while requiring only 38% of the inference-time computation. Further analyses show that TIPS generates statistically significant excess returns beyond both vanilla Transformers and its teacher ensembles, and exhibits regime-dependent behavioral alignment with classical architectures during their profitable periods. These results highlight the importance of regime-dependent inductive bias utilization for robust generalization in non-stationary financial time series.

AI.tldr: TIPS框架通过知识蒸馏将因果性、局部性和周期性三种时序先验整合到统一Transformer中，在非平稳金融时序预测中实现SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 传统Transformer假设时序平稳性，但金融市场存在机制转换和非平稳性，导致SOTA时序Transformer在金融任务上表现不佳。不同归纳偏置在不同市场或机制中各有优势，需要整合互补的时序先验以实现稳健预测。
AI.method: 提出TIPS框架：1）通过注意力掩码训练具有特定归纳偏置（因果性、局部性、周期性）的Transformer教师模型；2）将教师知识蒸馏到单一学生模型中，实现机制依赖的归纳偏置对齐。
AI.result: 在四个主要股票市场中，TIPS在年化收益率、夏普比率和卡尔玛比率上分别超越强集成基线55%、9%和16%，同时推理计算量仅需38%。TIPS产生统计显著的超额收益，并在盈利期间与经典架构表现出机制依赖的行为对齐。
AI.conclusion: 机制依赖的归纳偏置利用对于非平稳金融时序的稳健泛化至关重要。TIPS通过整合互补时序先验，在保持Transformer灵活性的同时实现了更好的金融预测性能。

title: Joint Optimization of Storage and Loading for High-Performance 3D Point Cloud Data Processing
summary: With the rapid development of computer vision and deep learning, significant advancements have been made in 3D vision, partic- ularly in autonomous driving, robotic perception, and augmented reality. 3D point cloud data, as a crucial representation of 3D information, has gained widespread attention. However, the vast scale and complexity of point cloud data present significant chal- lenges for loading and processing and traditional algorithms struggle to handle large-scale datasets.The diversity of storage formats for point cloud datasets (e.g., PLY, XYZ, BIN) adds complexity to data handling and results in inefficiencies in data preparation. Al- though binary formats like BIN and NPY have been used to speed up data access, they still do not fully address the time-consuming data loading and processing phase. To overcome these challenges, we propose the .PcRecord format, a unified data storage solution designed to reduce the storage occupation and accelerate the processing of point cloud data. We also introduce a high-performance data processing pipeline equipped with multiple modules. By leveraging a multi-stage parallel pipeline architecture, our system optimizes the use of computational resources, significantly improving processing speed and efficiency. This paper details the im- plementation of this system and demonstrates its effectiveness in addressing the challenges of handling large-scale point cloud datasets.On average, our system achieves performance improvements of 6.61x (ModelNet40), 2.69x (S3DIS), 2.23x (ShapeNet), 3.09x (Kitti), 8.07x (SUN RGB-D), and 5.67x (ScanNet) with GPU and 6.9x, 1.88x, 1.29x, 2.28x, 25.4x, and 19.3x with Ascend.

AI.tldr: 提出.PcRecord统一存储格式和高性能数据处理流水线，显著提升大规模点云数据的加载和处理效率
AI.motivation: 点云数据规模大、格式多样，传统算法处理效率低，数据加载和处理耗时成为瓶颈
AI.method: 设计.PcRecord统一存储格式减少存储占用，构建多阶段并行流水线架构优化计算资源利用
AI.result: 在多个数据集上实现显著性能提升：ModelNet40(6.61x GPU/6.9x Ascend)、S3DIS(2.69x/1.88x)、ShapeNet(2.23x/1.29x)、Kitti(3.09x/2.28x)、SUN RGB-D(8.07x/25.4x)、ScanNet(5.67x/19.3x)
AI.conclusion: 提出的.PcRecord格式和并行处理系统有效解决了大规模点云数据处理的效率瓶颈问题

title: CODMAS: A Dialectic Multi-Agent Collaborative Framework for Structured RTL Optimization
summary: Optimizing Register Transfer Level (RTL) code is a critical step in Electronic Design Automation (EDA) for improving power, performance, and area (PPA). We present CODMAS (Collaborative Optimization via a Dialectic Multi-Agent System), a framework that combines structured dialectic reasoning with domain-aware code generation and deterministic evaluation to automate RTL optimization. At the core of CODMAS are two dialectic agents: the Articulator, inspired by rubber-duck debugging, which articulates stepwise transformation plans and exposes latent assumptions; and the Hypothesis Partner, which predicts outcomes and reconciles deviations between expected and actual behavior to guide targeted refinements. These agents direct a Domain-Specific Coding Agent (DCA) to generate architecture-aware Verilog edits and a Code Evaluation Agent (CEA) to verify syntax, functionality, and PPA metrics. We introduce RTLOPT, a benchmark of 120 Verilog triples (unoptimized, optimized, testbench) for pipelining and clock-gating transformations. Across proprietary and open LLMs, CODMAS achieves ~25% reduction in critical path delay for pipelining and ~22% power reduction for clock gating, while reducing functional and compilation failures compared to strong prompting and agentic baselines. These results demonstrate that structured multi-agent reasoning can significantly enhance automated RTL optimization and scale to more complex designs and broader optimization tasks.

AI.tldr: CODMAS是一个用于自动化RTL优化的多智能体框架，通过结构化辩证推理、领域感知代码生成和确定性评估，在流水线和时钟门控优化中显著降低关键路径延迟和功耗。
AI.motivation: RTL代码优化对提高芯片的功耗、性能和面积(PPA)至关重要，但传统方法依赖人工经验且效率有限。需要自动化工具来提升优化质量和效率。
AI.method: CODMAS采用辩证多智能体系统：Articulator智能体通过逐步转换计划揭示潜在假设；Hypothesis Partner智能体预测结果并协调偏差；Domain-Specific Coding Agent生成架构感知的Verilog代码；Code Evaluation Agent验证语法、功能和PPA指标。
AI.result: 在RTLOPT基准测试中，CODMAS在流水线优化中减少约25%的关键路径延迟，在时钟门控中减少约22%的功耗，同时相比基线方法减少了功能和编译失败。
AI.conclusion: 结构化多智能体推理能显著增强自动化RTL优化能力，可扩展到更复杂的设计和更广泛的优化任务。

title: A Progressive Visual-Logic-Aligned Framework for Ride-Hailing Adjudication
summary: The efficient adjudication of responsibility disputes is pivotal for maintaining marketplace fairness. However, the exponential surge in ride-hailing volume renders manual review intractable, while conventional automated methods lack the reasoning transparency required for quasi-judicial decisions. Although Multimodal LLMs offer a promising paradigm, they fundamentally struggle to bridge the gap between general visual semantics and rigorous evidentiary protocols, often leading to perceptual hallucinations and logical looseness. To address these systemic misalignments, we introduce RideJudge, a Progressive Visual-Logic-Aligned Framework. Instead of relying on generic pre-training, we bridge the semantic gap via SynTraj, a synthesis engine that grounds abstract liability concepts into concrete trajectory patterns. To resolve the conflict between massive regulation volume and limited context windows, we propose an Adaptive Context Optimization strategy that distills expert knowledge, coupled with a Chain-of-Adjudication mechanism to enforce active evidentiary inquiry. Furthermore, addressing the inadequacy of sparse binary feedback for complex liability assessment, we implement a novel Ordinal-Sensitive Reinforcement Learning mechanism that calibrates decision boundaries against hierarchical severity. Extensive experiments show that our RideJudge-8B achieves 88.41\% accuracy, surpassing 32B-scale baselines and establishing a new standard for interpretable adjudication.

AI.tldr: RideJudge：一个渐进式视觉-逻辑对齐框架，通过合成轨迹、自适应上下文优化和序数敏感强化学习，解决网约车责任判定中的语义鸿沟、法规复杂性和反馈稀疏问题，在8B规模上达到88.41%准确率。
AI.motivation: 网约车责任判定面临三大挑战：1) 手动审查无法应对指数级增长的订单量；2) 传统自动化方法缺乏准司法决策所需的推理透明度；3) 多模态大语言模型存在视觉语义与证据协议之间的鸿沟，导致感知幻觉和逻辑松散。
AI.method: 提出RideJudge框架：1) SynTraj合成引擎将抽象责任概念转化为具体轨迹模式；2) 自适应上下文优化策略提炼专家知识，配合裁决链机制进行主动证据查询；3) 序数敏感强化学习机制根据严重性层级校准决策边界。
AI.result: RideJudge-8B模型达到88.41%的准确率，超越了32B规模的基线模型，为可解释的裁决设立了新标准。
AI.conclusion: RideJudge通过渐进式视觉-逻辑对齐框架，有效解决了网约车责任判定中的系统性错位问题，在保持可解释性的同时实现了高精度决策。

title: Transformers Can Learn Rules They've Never Seen: Proof of Computation Beyond Interpolation
summary: A central question in the LLM debate is whether transformers can infer rules absent from training, or whether apparent generalisation reduces to similarity-based interpolation over observed examples. We test a strong interpolation-only hypothesis in two controlled settings: one where interpolation is ruled out by construction and proof, and one where success requires emitting intermediate symbolic derivations rather than only final answers. In Experiment 1, we use a cellular automaton with a pure XOR transition rule and remove specific local input patterns from training; since XOR is linearly inseparable, each held-out pattern's nearest neighbours have the opposite label, so similarity-based predictors fail on the held-out region. Yet a two-layer transformer recovers the rule (best 100%; 47/60 converged runs), and circuit extraction identifies XOR computation. Performance depends on multi-step constraint propagation: without unrolling, accuracy matches output bias (63.1%), while soft unrolling reaches 96.7%. In Experiment 2, we study symbolic operator chains over integers with one operator pair held out; the model must emit intermediate steps and a final answer in a proof-like format. Across all 49 holdout pairs, the transformer exceeds every interpolation baseline (mean 41.8%, up to 78.6%; mean KRR 4.3%; KNN and MLP score 0% on every pair), while removing intermediate-step supervision degrades performance. Together with a construction showing that a standard transformer block can implement exact local Boolean rules, these results provide an existence proof that transformers can learn rule structure not directly observed in training and express it explicitly, ruling out the strongest architectural form of interpolation-only accounts: that transformers cannot in principle discover and communicate unseen rules, while leaving open when such behaviour arises in large-scale language training.

AI.tldr: 论文通过两个实验证明Transformer能够学习训练数据中未出现的规则，而不仅仅是基于相似性的插值。实验1使用XOR规则细胞自动机，实验2使用符号操作链，都显示Transformer能发现并表达未见规则。
AI.motivation: 解决LLM辩论中的核心问题：Transformer是否能够推断训练数据中未出现的规则，还是仅仅基于观察到的示例进行相似性插值。作者旨在测试"纯插值"假说，证明Transformer具有规则发现能力。
AI.method: 设计了两个受控实验：1）使用线性不可分的XOR规则细胞自动机，移除特定局部输入模式，使相似性预测器失效；2）使用符号操作链，保留一对操作符不出现在训练中，要求模型输出中间步骤和最终答案。在两个实验中训练两层Transformer，并进行电路提取分析。
AI.result: 实验1：Transformer成功恢复XOR规则（最佳100%；47/60次收敛），性能依赖多步约束传播；实验2：在所有49个保留对中，Transformer超越所有插值基线（平均41.8%，最高78.6%），而移除中间步骤监督会降低性能。电路提取确认了XOR计算。
AI.conclusion: Transformer能够学习训练中未直接观察到的规则结构并明确表达，这排除了最强的"纯插值"架构假说。虽然证明了这种能力在原则上是可能的，但大型语言训练中何时出现这种行为仍待研究。

title: EmergeNav: Structured Embodied Inference for Zero-Shot Vision-and-Language Navigation in Continuous Environments
summary: Zero-shot vision-and-language navigation in continuous environments (VLN-CE) remains challenging for modern vision-language models (VLMs). Although these models encode useful semantic priors, their open-ended reasoning does not directly translate into stable long-horizon embodied execution. We argue that the key bottleneck is not missing knowledge alone, but missing an execution structure for organizing instruction following, perceptual grounding, temporal progress, and stage verification. We propose EmergeNav, a zero-shot framework that formulates continuous VLN as structured embodied inference. EmergeNav combines a Plan--Solve--Transition hierarchy for stage-structured execution, GIPE for goal-conditioned perceptual extraction, contrastive dual-memory reasoning for progress grounding, and role-separated Dual-FOV sensing for time-aligned local control and boundary verification. On VLN-CE, EmergeNav achieves strong zero-shot performance using only open-source VLM backbones and no task-specific training, explicit maps, graph search, or waypoint predictors, reaching 30.00 SR with Qwen3-VL-8B and 37.00 SR with Qwen3-VL-32B. These results suggest that explicit execution structure is a key ingredient for turning VLM priors into stable embodied navigation behavior.

AI.tldr: EmergeNav：一个零样本视觉语言导航框架，通过结构化执行层次将VLM先验知识转化为稳定的导航行为，无需任务特定训练或显式地图。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉语言模型（VLMs）在连续环境零样本视觉语言导航（VLN-CE）中存在挑战，虽然模型编码了有用的语义先验，但其开放推理无法直接转化为稳定的长时程具身执行。主要瓶颈在于缺乏组织指令跟随、感知接地、时间进度和阶段验证的执行结构。
AI.method: 提出EmergeNav框架，将连续VLN建模为结构化具身推理：1) Plan-Solve-Transition层次结构用于阶段化执行；2) GIPE用于目标条件感知提取；3) 对比双记忆推理用于进度接地；4) 角色分离的双视场感知用于时间对齐的局部控制和边界验证。
AI.result: 在VLN-CE上，仅使用开源VLM骨干网络（无需任务特定训练、显式地图、图搜索或路径点预测器），Qwen3-VL-8B达到30.00 SR，Qwen3-VL-32B达到37.00 SR的零样本性能。
AI.conclusion: 显式执行结构是将VLM先验知识转化为稳定具身导航行为的关键要素，结构化推理框架能有效提升零样本导航性能。

title: SYMDIREC: A Neuro-Symbolic Divide-Retrieve-Conquer Framework for Enhanced RTL Synthesis and Summarization
summary: Register-Transfer Level (RTL) synthesis and summarization are central to hardware design automation but remain challenging for Large Language Models (LLMs) due to rigid HDL syntax, limited supervision, and weak alignment with natural language. Existing prompting and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) methods have not incorporated symbolic planning, limiting their structural precision. We introduce SYMDIREC, a neuro-symbolic framework that decomposes RTL tasks into symbolic subgoals, retrieves relevant code via a fine-tuned retriever, and assembles verified outputs through LLM reasoning. Supporting both Verilog and VHDL without LLM fine-tuning, SYMDIREC achieves ~20% higher Pass@1 rates for synthesis and 15-20% ROUGE-L improvements for summarization over prompting and RAG baselines, demonstrating the benefits of symbolic guidance in RTL tasks.

AI.tldr: SYMDIREC是一个神经符号框架，通过符号规划分解RTL任务，结合微调检索器和LLM推理，在硬件设计自动化的RTL综合和总结任务上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM在RTL任务上面临挑战：硬件描述语言语法严格、监督数据有限、与自然语言对齐弱。现有提示和检索增强生成方法缺乏符号规划，限制了结构精度。
AI.method: SYMDIREC将RTL任务分解为符号子目标，通过微调检索器检索相关代码，利用LLM推理组装验证输出。支持Verilog和VHDL，无需LLM微调。
AI.result: 在RTL综合任务上Pass@1率提高约20%，在总结任务上ROUGE-L指标提升15-20%，优于提示和检索增强生成基线方法。
AI.conclusion: SYMDIREC证明了符号引导在RTL任务中的有效性，神经符号框架能显著提升硬件设计自动化的性能。

title: Towards Safer Large Reasoning Models by Promoting Safety Decision-Making before Chain-of-Thought Generation
summary: Large reasoning models (LRMs) achieved remarkable performance via chain-of-thought (CoT), but recent studies showed that such enhanced reasoning capabilities are at the expense of significantly degraded safety capabilities. In this paper, we reveal that LRMs' safety degradation occurs only after CoT is enabled, and this degradation is not observed when CoT is disabled. This observation motivates us to consider encouraging LRMs to make safety decisions before CoT generation. To this end, we propose a novel safety alignment method that promotes the safety decision-making of LRMs before starting CoT generation. Specifically, we first utilize a Bert-based classifier to extract safety decision signals from a safe model (e.g., a CoT-disabled LRM) and then integrate these signals into LRMs' safety alignment as auxiliary supervision. In this way, the safety gradients can be backpropagated to the LRMs' latent representations, effectively strengthening the LRMs' safety decision-making abilities against CoT generation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method substantially improves the safety capabilities of LRMs while effectively maintaining LRMs' general reasoning performance.

AI.tldr: 大型推理模型在使用思维链时会出现安全性下降，本文提出一种新方法让模型在开始思维链前先做安全决策，从而提升安全性同时保持推理能力。
AI.motivation: 研究发现大型推理模型在使用思维链（CoT）时推理能力显著提升，但安全性却大幅下降。这种安全性下降只在启用CoT时出现，禁用CoT时不会发生。这促使研究者思考如何让模型在开始CoT生成前先做出安全决策。
AI.method: 提出一种新颖的安全对齐方法：1）使用基于Bert的分类器从安全模型（如禁用CoT的LRM）中提取安全决策信号；2）将这些信号作为辅助监督集成到LRM的安全对齐中；3）让安全梯度反向传播到LRM的潜在表示，从而增强模型在CoT生成前的安全决策能力。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，该方法显著提升了大型推理模型的安全性，同时有效保持了模型的一般推理性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过让大型推理模型在开始思维链生成前先进行安全决策，可以有效解决CoT带来的安全性下降问题，实现安全性与推理能力的平衡。

title: Do Understanding and Generation Fight? A Diagnostic Study of DPO for Unified Multimodal Models
summary: Unified multimodal models share a language model backbone for both understanding and generating images. Can DPO align both capabilities simultaneously? We present the first systematic study of this question, applying DPO to Janus-Pro at 1B and 7B parameters under seven training strategies and two post-hoc methods. The central finding is negative: generation quality resists DPO alignment across all tested conditions on this architecture. No method improves generation CLIPScore at 7B (|Delta| < 0.2, p > 0.5 at n=200 per seed, 3 seeds); at 1B, all methods degrade generation, and the result holds across preference data types (real-vs-generated and model-vs-model) and the data volumes tested (150-288 pairs). Gradient analysis reveals why: understanding and generation gradients are near-orthogonal (cos ~ 0) with ~11-14x magnitude imbalance driven by VQ token count asymmetry (576 generation tokens vs. ~30-100 text tokens). This imbalance is the dominant interference mechanism in multi-task DPO; magnitude-balancing yields directionally positive understanding deltas (+0.01-0.04 VQA, though individually not significant), but the generation gap persists regardless. We identify discrete VQ tokenization as a likely structural bottleneck -- supported by the generation DPO loss converging to ln(2) -- and provide practical guidance for practitioners working with VQ-based unified models.

AI.tldr: DPO无法同时对齐统一多模态模型的理解和生成能力，因为两者梯度正交且幅度严重不平衡，VQ离散化是主要瓶颈
AI.motivation: 研究DPO（直接偏好优化）能否同时对齐统一多模态模型的理解和生成能力，这类模型使用语言模型作为主干来处理文本和图像
AI.method: 在Janus-Pro模型的1B和7B参数版本上，应用7种训练策略和2种后处理方法进行DPO对齐实验，分析梯度正交性和幅度不平衡问题
AI.result: DPO无法改善生成质量：7B模型生成CLIPScore无显著变化，1B模型生成质量反而下降；理解和生成梯度接近正交（cos~0），幅度相差11-14倍，VQ离散化导致生成损失收敛到ln(2)
AI.conclusion: VQ离散化是统一多模态模型DPO对齐的主要瓶颈，理解和生成任务的梯度正交性和幅度不平衡导致DPO无法同时对齐两种能力

title: PhysQuantAgent: An Inference Pipeline of Mass Estimation for Vision-Language Models
comment: Code and dataset will be available at https://github.com/hisasnow/PhysQuantAgent
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are increasingly applied to robotic perception and manipulation, yet their ability to infer physical properties required for manipulation remains limited. In particular, estimating the mass of real-world objects is essential for determining appropriate grasp force and ensuring safe interaction. However, current VLMs lack reliable mass reasoning capabilities, and most existing benchmarks do not explicitly evaluate physical quantity estimation under realistic sensing conditions. In this work, we propose PhysQuantAgent, a framework for real-world object mass estimation using VLMs, together with VisPhysQuant, a new benchmark dataset for evaluation. VisPhysQuant consists of RGB-D videos of real objects captured from multiple viewpoints, annotated with precise mass measurements. To improve estimation accuracy, we introduce three visual prompting methods that enhance the input image with object detection, scale estimation, and cross-sectional image generation to help the model comprehend the size and internal structure of the target object. Experiments show that visual prompting significantly improves mass estimation accuracy on real-world data, suggesting the efficacy of integrating spatial reasoning with VLM knowledge for physical inference.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PhysQuantAgent框架和VisPhysQuant基准数据集，用于通过视觉语言模型进行真实世界物体质量估计，并引入三种视觉提示方法提升估计精度。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉语言模型在机器人感知和操作中应用广泛，但缺乏可靠的物理属性推理能力，特别是质量估计能力。现有基准数据集大多未在真实传感条件下评估物理量估计，而准确的质量估计对于确定合适的抓握力和确保安全交互至关重要。
AI.method: 提出PhysQuantAgent框架，包含三种视觉提示方法：1) 物体检测增强输入图像；2) 尺度估计帮助模型理解物体大小；3) 横截面图像生成帮助理解物体内部结构。同时创建VisPhysQuant基准数据集，包含多视角RGB-D视频和精确质量标注。
AI.result: 实验表明视觉提示方法显著提高了真实世界数据的质量估计精度，证明了将空间推理与VLM知识结合进行物理推断的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过视觉提示增强视觉语言模型的输入，可以有效提升其对物理属性（特别是质量）的推理能力，为机器人安全操作提供了重要技术支持。

title: Anonymous-by-Construction: An LLM-Driven Framework for Privacy-Preserving Text
summary:
Responsible use of AI demands that we protect sensitive information without undermining the usefulness of data, an imperative that has become acute in the age of large language models. We address this challenge with an on-premise, LLM-driven substitution pipeline that anonymizes text by replacing personally identifiable information (PII) with realistic, type-consistent surrogates. Executed entirely within organizational boundaries using local LLMs, the approach prevents data egress while preserving fluency and task-relevant semantics.
  We conduct a systematic, multi-metric, cross-technique evaluation on the Action-Based Conversation Dataset, benchmarking against industry standards (Microsoft Presidio and Google DLP) and a state-of-the-art approach (ZSTS, in redaction-only and redaction-plus-substitution variants). Our protocol jointly measures privacy, semantic utility, and trainability under privacy via a lifecycle-ready criterion obtained by fine-tuning a compact encoder (BERT+LoRA) on sanitized text. In addition, we assess agentic Q&A performance by inserting an on-premise anonymization layer before the answering LLM and evaluating the quality of its responses. This intermediate, type-preserving substitution stage ensures that no sensitive content is exposed to third-party APIs, enabling responsible deployment of Q\&A agents without compromising confidentiality.
  Our method attains state-of-the-art privacy, minimal topical drift, strong factual utility, and low trainability loss, outperforming rule-based approaches and named-entity recognition (NER) baselines and ZSTS variants on the combined privacy--utility--trainability frontier. These results show that local LLM substitution yields anonymized corpora that are both responsible to use and operationally valuable: safe for agentic pipelines and suitable for downstream fine-tuning with limited degradation.

AI.tldr: 提出基于本地LLM的文本匿名化方法，通过类型一致的替代品替换PII，在保护隐私的同时保持语义实用性和可训练性，优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 在LLM时代，需要在保护敏感信息的同时不损害数据实用性。现有方法要么隐私保护不足，要么过度损害数据价值，需要一种平衡隐私保护与数据实用性的解决方案。
AI.method: 开发本地LLM驱动的替代管道，在组织边界内执行，用类型一致的现实替代品替换PII。评估采用多指标跨技术方法，包括隐私、语义效用、可训练性评估，并在问答代理前插入匿名化层。
AI.result: 方法在隐私保护、主题漂移控制、事实效用和可训练性损失方面达到最优，优于微软Presidio、谷歌DLP和ZSTS等基准方法，在隐私-效用-可训练性综合边界上表现最佳。
AI.conclusion: 本地LLM替代方法能生成既负责任又有操作价值的匿名化语料，既安全用于代理管道，又适合下游微调且性能损失有限，实现了隐私保护与数据实用性的平衡。

title: From Digital Twins to World Models:Opportunities, Challenges, and Applications for Mobile Edge General Intelligence
summary: The rapid evolution toward 6G and beyond communication systems is accelerating the convergence of digital twins and world models at the network edge. Traditional digital twins provide high-fidelity representations of physical systems and support monitoring, analysis, and offline optimization. However, in highly dynamic edge environments, they face limitations in autonomy, adaptability, and scalability. This paper presents a systematic survey of the transition from digital twins to world models and discusses its role in enabling edge general intelligence (EGI). First, the paper clarifies the conceptual differences between digital twins and world models and highlights the shift from physics-based, centralized, and system-centric replicas to data-driven, decentralized, and agent-centric internal models. This discussion helps readers gain a clear understanding of how this transition enables more adaptive, autonomous, and resource-efficient intelligence at the network edge. The paper reviews the design principles, architectures, and key components of world models, including perception, latent state representation, dynamics learning, imagination-based planning, and memory. In addition, it examines the integration of world models and digital twins in wireless EGI systems and surveys emerging applications in integrated sensing and communications, semantic communication, air-ground networks, and low-altitude wireless networks. Finally, this survey provides a systematic roadmap and practical insights for designing world-model-driven edge intelligence systems in wireless and edge computing environments. It also outlines key research challenges and future directions toward scalable, reliable, and interoperable world models for edge-native agentic AI.

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了从数字孪生向世界模型的演进，探讨其在实现边缘通用智能中的作用，包括概念差异、设计原则、架构组件、无线EGI系统集成以及应用场景，并提出了研究路线图和未来方向。
AI.motivation: 随着6G及后6G通信系统的发展，数字孪生与世界模型在网络边缘的融合加速。传统数字孪生在高度动态的边缘环境中面临自主性、适应性和可扩展性限制，需要向更智能的世界模型演进以支持边缘通用智能。
AI.method: 本文采用系统性综述方法：1) 澄清数字孪生与世界模型的概念差异；2) 回顾世界模型的设计原则、架构和关键组件（感知、潜在状态表示、动态学习、基于想象的规划、记忆）；3) 分析世界模型与数字孪生在无线EGI系统中的集成；4) 调查新兴应用场景；5) 提供设计路线图和实践见解。
AI.result: 论文明确了从物理驱动、集中式、系统中心的数字孪生向数据驱动、分布式、智能体中心的世界模型转变，这种转变能够实现更自适应、自主和资源高效的边缘智能。提出了世界模型驱动的边缘智能系统设计框架，并识别了关键应用领域。
AI.conclusion: 世界模型是实现边缘通用智能的关键演进方向，能够克服传统数字孪生在动态边缘环境中的局限性。未来研究需要解决可扩展性、可靠性和互操作性挑战，以推动边缘原生智能体AI的发展。

title: SCE-LITE-HQ: Smooth visual counterfactual explanations with generative foundation models
summary: Modern neural networks achieve strong performance but remain difficult to interpret in high-dimensional visual domains. Counterfactual explanations (CFEs) provide a principled approach to interpreting black-box predictions by identifying minimal input changes that alter model outputs. However, existing CFE methods often rely on dataset-specific generative models and incur substantial computational cost, limiting their scalability to high-resolution data. We propose SCE-LITE-HQ, a scalable framework for counterfactual generation that leverages pretrained generative foundation models without task-specific retraining. The method operates in the latent space of the generator, incorporates smoothed gradients to improve optimization stability, and applies mask-based diversification to promote realistic and structurally diverse counterfactuals. We evaluate SCE-LITE-HQ on natural and medical datasets using a desiderata-driven evaluation protocol. Results show that SCE-LITE-HQ produces valid, realistic, and diverse counterfactuals competitive with or outperforming existing baselines, while avoiding the overhead of training dedicated generative models.

AI.tldr: SCE-LITE-HQ：利用预训练生成基础模型的可扩展反事实解释框架，无需任务特定训练，在生成器潜在空间操作，通过平滑梯度和掩码多样化生成真实多样的反事实解释。
AI.motivation: 现代神经网络在视觉领域表现优异但难以解释。现有反事实解释方法依赖数据集特定生成模型且计算成本高，限制了在高分辨率数据上的可扩展性。
AI.method: 在预训练生成基础模型的潜在空间操作，无需任务特定重新训练；使用平滑梯度提高优化稳定性；应用基于掩码的多样化策略促进真实且结构多样的反事实生成。
AI.result: 在自然和医学数据集上评估，SCE-LITE-HQ生成有效、真实且多样的反事实解释，性能与现有基线相当或更优，同时避免了训练专用生成模型的开销。
AI.conclusion: SCE-LITE-HQ提供了一个可扩展的反事实解释框架，利用预训练生成模型避免了训练开销，在保持解释质量的同时提高了方法的可扩展性。

title: Behavior-Centric Extraction of Scenarios from Highway Traffic Data and their Domain-Knowledge-Guided Clustering using CVQ-VAE
comment: Accepted as a conference paper in IEEE Intelligent Vehicles Symposium (IV) 2026, Detroit, MI, United States
summary: Approval of ADS depends on evaluating its behavior within representative real-world traffic scenarios. A common way to obtain such scenarios is to extract them from real-world data recordings. These can then be grouped and serve as basis on which the ADS is subsequently tested. This poses two central challenges: how scenarios are extracted and how they are grouped. Existing extraction methods rely on heterogeneous definitions, hindering scenario comparability. For the grouping of scenarios, rule-based or ML-based methods can be utilized. However, while modern ML-based approaches can handle the complexity of traffic scenarios, unlike rule-based approaches, they lack interpretability and may not align with domain-knowledge. This work contributes to a standardized scenario extraction based on the Scenario-as-Specification concept, as well as a domain-knowledge-guided scenario clustering process. Experiments on the highD dataset demonstrate that scenarios can be extracted reliably and that domain-knowledge can be effectively integrated into the clustering process. As a result, the proposed methodology supports a more standardized process for deriving scenario categories from highway data recordings and thus enables a more efficient validation process of automated vehicles.

AI.tldr: 提出基于场景即规范概念的标准化场景提取方法，以及领域知识引导的场景聚类流程，用于从高速公路数据记录中推导场景类别，支持自动驾驶系统更高效的验证过程。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶系统（ADS）的批准需要评估其在真实交通场景中的行为。现有场景提取方法依赖异构定义，阻碍场景可比性；而场景聚类方法中，基于机器学习的方法缺乏可解释性且可能不符合领域知识。
AI.method: 基于"场景即规范"概念建立标准化场景提取框架，并开发领域知识引导的场景聚类流程。在highD数据集上进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验表明，场景可以被可靠地提取，领域知识可以有效地集成到聚类过程中。该方法支持从高速公路数据记录中推导场景类别的更标准化流程。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法学支持从高速公路数据记录中推导场景类别的更标准化过程，从而实现自动驾驶车辆更高效的验证过程。

title: Alignment Makes Language Models Normative, Not Descriptive
summary: Post-training alignment optimizes language models to match human preference signals, but this objective is not equivalent to modeling observed human behavior. We compare 120 base-aligned model pairs on more than 10,000 real human decisions in multi-round strategic games - bargaining, persuasion, negotiation, and repeated matrix games. In these settings, base models outperform their aligned counterparts in predicting human choices by nearly 10:1, robustly across model families, prompt formulations, and game configurations. This pattern reverses, however, in settings where human behavior is more likely to follow normative predictions: aligned models dominate on one-shot textbook games across all 12 types tested and on non-strategic lottery choices - and even within the multi-round games themselves, at round one, before interaction history develops. This boundary-condition pattern suggests that alignment induces a normative bias: it improves prediction when human behavior is relatively well captured by normative solutions, but hurts prediction in multi-round strategic settings, where behavior is shaped by descriptive dynamics such as reciprocity, retaliation, and history-dependent adaptation. These results reveal a fundamental trade-off between optimizing models for human use and using them as proxies for human behavior.

AI.tldr: 对齐模型在预测人类行为方面存在规范偏差：在多轮策略游戏中表现不如基础模型，但在单轮规范游戏中表现更好
AI.motivation: 研究后训练对齐是否真正让语言模型能够准确预测人类行为，特别是在复杂的多轮策略互动中
AI.method: 比较120个基础-对齐模型对在10,000多个真实人类决策上的表现，涵盖议价、说服、谈判和重复矩阵游戏等多轮策略场景
AI.result: 基础模型在多轮策略游戏中预测人类选择的能力比对齐模型强近10倍；但对齐模型在单轮教科书游戏和非策略彩票选择中表现更好
AI.conclusion: 对齐会引入规范偏差：在人类行为符合规范预测时改善预测，但在多轮策略互动中损害预测能力，揭示了优化模型供人类使用与作为人类行为代理之间的根本权衡

title: Proactive Knowledge Inquiry in Doctor-Patient Dialogue: Stateful Extraction, Belief Updating, and Path-Aware Action Planning
comment: 12 pages, 2 figures, 5 tables. Pilot concept demonstration under a controlled simulated setting
summary: Most automated electronic medical record (EMR) pipelines remain output-oriented: they transcribe, extract, and summarize after the consultation, but they do not explicitly model what is already known, what is still missing, which uncertainty matters most, or what question or recommendation should come next. We formulate doctor-patient dialogue as a proactive knowledge-inquiry problem under partial observability. The proposed framework combines stateful extraction, sequential belief updating, gap-aware state modeling, hybrid retrieval over objectified medical knowledge, and a POMDP-lite action planner. Instead of treating the EMR as the only target artifact, the framework treats documentation as the structured projection of an ongoing inquiry loop. To make the formulation concrete, we report a controlled pilot evaluation on ten standardized multi-turn dialogues together with a 300-query retrieval benchmark aggregated across dialogues. On this pilot protocol, the full framework reaches 83.3% coverage, 80.0% risk recall, 81.4% structural completeness, and lower redundancy than the chunk-only and template-heavy interactive baselines. These pilot results do not establish clinical generalization; rather, they suggest that proactive inquiry may be methodologically interesting under tightly controlled conditions and can be viewed as a conceptually appealing formulation worth further investigation for dialogue-based EMR generation. This work should be read as a pilot concept demonstration under a controlled simulated setting rather than as evidence of clinical deployment readiness. No implication of clinical deployment readiness, clinical safety, or real-world clinical utility should be inferred from this pilot protocol.

AI.tldr: 提出将医患对话建模为部分可观测下的主动知识查询问题，开发结合状态提取、信念更新、知识检索和POMDP-lite规划的框架，在受控模拟环境中验证可行性
AI.motivation: 现有电子病历系统多为输出导向，仅转录、提取和总结咨询内容，缺乏对已知信息、缺失信息、关键不确定性的建模，无法主动指导下一步问题或建议
AI.method: 将医患对话建模为部分可观测下的主动知识查询问题，结合状态提取、顺序信念更新、缺口感知状态建模、混合知识检索和POMDP-lite动作规划器
AI.result: 在10个标准化多轮对话和300个查询检索基准测试中，完整框架达到83.3%覆盖率、80.0%风险召回率、81.4%结构完整性，冗余度低于基线方法
AI.conclusion: 主动知识查询在严格受控条件下具有方法论意义，是对话式电子病历生成的概念性吸引人的框架，但仅为概念验证而非临床部署准备

title: Early Quantization Shrinks Codebook: A Simple Fix for Diversity-Preserving Tokenization
summary: Vector quantization is a technique in machine learning that discretizes continuous representations into a set of discrete vectors. It is widely employed in tokenizing data representations for large language models, diffusion models, and other generative models. Despite its prevalence, the characteristics and behaviors of vector quantization in generative models remain largely underexplored. In this study, we systematically investigate the issue of collapses in vector quantization, where collapsed representations are observed across discrete codebook tokens and continuous latent embeddings. By leveraging both synthetic and real datasets, we identify the severity of each type of collapses and triggering conditions. Our analysis reveals that random initialization and limited encoder capacity result in tokens collapse and embeddings collapse. Building on these findings, we propose potential solutions aimed at mitigating each collapse. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first comprehensive study examining representation collapsing problems in vector quantization.

AI.tldr: 首次系统研究向量量化在生成模型中的表示坍缩问题，识别两种坍缩类型及触发条件，并提出缓解方案
AI.motivation: 向量量化广泛用于大语言模型、扩散模型等生成模型的数据表示标记化，但其在生成模型中的特性和行为尚未得到充分探索，特别是表示坍缩问题
AI.method: 使用合成和真实数据集系统研究向量量化中的坍缩问题，识别离散码本标记和连续潜在嵌入的坍缩类型、严重程度及触发条件
AI.result: 发现随机初始化和有限编码器容量会导致标记坍缩和嵌入坍缩，并基于这些发现提出了针对每种坍缩的缓解方案
AI.conclusion: 这是首个全面研究向量量化中表示坍缩问题的工作，为理解和解决这一重要但被忽视的问题提供了系统分析

title: CineSRD: Leveraging Visual, Acoustic, and Linguistic Cues for Open-World Visual Media Speaker Diarization
summary: Traditional speaker diarization systems have primarily focused on constrained scenarios such as meetings and interviews, where the number of speakers is limited and acoustic conditions are relatively clean. To explore open-world speaker diarization, we extend this task to the visual media domain, encompassing complex audiovisual programs such as films and TV series. This new setting introduces several challenges, including long-form video understanding, a large number of speakers, cross-modal asynchrony between audio and visual cues, and uncontrolled in-the-wild variability. To address these challenges, we propose Cinematic Speaker Registration & Diarization (CineSRD), a unified multimodal framework that leverages visual, acoustic, and linguistic cues from video, speech, and subtitles for speaker annotation. CineSRD first performs visual anchor clustering to register initial speakers and then integrates an audio language model for speaker turn detection, refining annotations and supplementing unregistered off-screen speakers. Furthermore, we construct and release a dedicated speaker diarization benchmark for visual media that includes Chinese and English programs. Experimental results demonstrate that CineSRD achieves superior performance on the proposed benchmark and competitive results on conventional datasets, validating its robustness and generalizability in open-world visual media settings.

AI.tldr: CineSRD：面向影视等开放世界场景的统一多模态说话人日志系统，通过视觉锚点聚类和音频语言模型实现说话人注册与日志，在视觉媒体领域表现优异。
AI.motivation: 传统说话人日志系统主要针对会议、访谈等受限场景，无法处理影视等开放世界中的复杂挑战，包括长视频理解、大量说话人、跨模态异步和真实世界变异性。
AI.method: 提出CineSRD统一多模态框架，利用视频、语音和字幕的视觉、声学和语言线索。首先进行视觉锚点聚类注册初始说话人，然后集成音频语言模型进行说话人轮次检测，精炼标注并补充未注册的屏幕外说话人。
AI.result: 在构建的中英文视觉媒体说话人日志基准测试中表现优异，同时在传统数据集上也取得有竞争力的结果，验证了其在开放世界视觉媒体场景中的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: CineSRD成功将说话人日志任务扩展到影视等开放世界视觉媒体领域，通过多模态融合有效解决了该领域的独特挑战，为复杂视听节目的说话人分析提供了有效解决方案。

title: TharuChat: Bootstrapping Large Language Models for a Low-Resource Language via Synthetic Data and Human Validation
comment: 6 pages, 1 figure, 2 tables. Preprint. Code and dataset available on Hugging Face
summary:
The rapid proliferation of Large Language Models (LLMs) has created a profound digital divide, effectively excluding indigenous languages of the Global South from the AI revolution. The Tharu language, an Indo-Aryan vernacular spoken by approximately 1.7 million people across the Terai belt of Nepal and India, exemplifies this crisis. Despite a rich oral tradition, Tharu suffers from severe data scarcity and linguistic fragmentation, causing state-of-the-art multilingual models to routinely "hallucinate" or default to dominant high-resource neighbors like Hindi and Nepali due to contamination in pre-training corpora.
  This paper presents Tharu-LLaMA (3B), a specialized instruction-following model designed to address this exclusion. We introduce TharuChat, a novel dataset constructed via a LLM-to-Human bootstrapping pipeline. We utilized prompt-engineered Gemini models, fed with Rana Tharu grammar and folklore, to synthesize training data. Unlike curated gold-standard corpora, TharuChat reflects the noisy, heterogeneous linguistic reality of the region: it is predominantly anchored in Rana Tharu (~70%) while integrating elements of Dangaura and Kochila dialects. We provide a transparent analysis of the dataset's limitations, including dialectal code-mixing and residual Awadhi/Hindi influence. Through a rigorous empirical ablation study, we demonstrate that despite these imperfections, small-scale synthetic data is highly effective, increasing the dataset volume from 25% to 100% results in a linear reduction in perplexity from 6.42 to 2.88. The resulting model serves as a proof-of-concept for the preservation of under-resourced Himalayan languages via generative AI, achievable on consumer-grade hardware.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Tharu-LLaMA (3B)模型和TharuChat数据集，通过LLM-to-Human引导方法为资源匮乏的塔鲁语创建专门指令跟随模型，解决全球南方土著语言在AI革命中被排除的问题。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型的快速发展造成了深刻的数字鸿沟，将全球南方的土著语言排除在AI革命之外。塔鲁语作为印度-雅利安语系方言，约有170万使用者，面临严重的数据稀缺和语言碎片化问题，导致现有多语言模型经常产生"幻觉"或默认使用印地语、尼泊尔语等高资源语言。
AI.method: 采用LLM-to-Human引导管道构建TharuChat数据集，利用经过提示工程优化的Gemini模型，结合Rana Tharu语法和民间传说合成训练数据。数据集反映了该地区嘈杂、异质的语言现实，主要基于Rana Tharu方言（约70%），同时整合Dangaura和Kochila方言元素。
AI.result: 实证消融研究表明，尽管数据集存在方言混合和残余Awadhi/印地语影响等缺陷，小规模合成数据非常有效：数据集容量从25%增加到100%时，困惑度从6.42线性降低到2.88。模型可在消费级硬件上实现。
AI.conclusion: Tharu-LLaMA模型作为概念验证，展示了通过生成式AI保护资源匮乏的喜马拉雅地区语言的可行性，为其他低资源语言提供了可复制的框架。

title: When Only the Final Text Survives: Implicit Execution Tracing for Multi-Agent Attribution
summary: When a multi-agent system produces an incorrect or harmful answer, who is accountable if execution logs and agent identifiers are unavailable? Multi-agent language systems increasingly rely on structured interactions such as delegation and iterative refinement, yet the final output often obscures the underlying interaction topology and agent contributions. We introduce IET (Implicit Execution Tracing), a metadata-independent framework that enables token-level attribution directly from generated text and a simple mechanism for interaction topology reconstruction. During generation, agent-specific keyed signals are embedded into the token distribution, transforming the text into a self-describing execution trace detectable only with a secret key. At detection time, a transition-aware scoring method identifies agent handover points and reconstructs the interaction graph. Experiments show that IET recovers agent segments and coordination structure with high accuracy while preserving generation quality, enabling privacy-preserving auditing for multi-agent language systems.

AI.tldr: IET框架通过嵌入密钥信号实现多智能体系统的执行追踪，无需元数据即可从生成文本中恢复智能体贡献和交互拓扑
AI.motivation: 当多智能体系统产生错误或有害答案时，如果没有执行日志和智能体标识符，很难确定责任归属。当前多智能体语言系统依赖结构化交互，但最终输出往往掩盖了底层交互拓扑和智能体贡献。
AI.method: 提出IET（隐式执行追踪）框架：1）在生成过程中，将智能体特定的密钥信号嵌入到token分布中，使文本成为自描述的执行轨迹；2）在检测时，使用转移感知的评分方法识别智能体交接点并重建交互图。
AI.result: 实验表明，IET能够以高精度恢复智能体片段和协调结构，同时保持生成质量，实现了多智能体语言系统的隐私保护审计。
AI.conclusion: IET框架为多智能体系统提供了一种无需元数据的可追溯性解决方案，解决了责任归属问题，同时保护了隐私，支持对复杂多智能体交互的审计。

title: PRISM: Demystifying Retention and Interaction in Mid-Training
summary: We present PRISM, a comprehensive empirical study of mid-training design choices for large language models. Through controlled experiments across seven base models spanning four families (Granite, LLaMA, Mistral, Nemotron-H), two architecture types (dense Transformer and attention-Mamba hybrid), and scales from 3B to 24B parameters, we show that mid-training on approximately 27B high-quality tokens yields consistent gains of +15 to +40 points on math, +5 to +12 points on code, and +6 to +13 points on science benchmarks while preserving general performance. The full PRISM to RL pipeline improves macro-average across six reasoning benchmarks from under 12 to 29-42 (a 3-4x improvement), whereas RL applied directly to most of the base models remains substantially less effective, with AIME scores near zero. Data composition matters most at mid-training, not RL: including science data during mid-training unlocks +17 to +28 point GPQA-Diamond gains during RL, while changing the RL mix produces less than 2 point differences. Mechanistically, mid-training densely restructures over 90% of model weights, while RL makes sparse, front-loaded refinements to approximately 5% of parameters. Representation analysis (CKA) confirms that RL consistently preserves mid-training's representational geometry (over 0.998 CKA) across architectures. Crucially, RL applies identical weight changes regardless of starting point, yet only succeeds on mid-trained models, consistent with mid-training placing the model in a configuration from which RL can effectively improve performance. Our results demonstrate that retention-aware mid-training is highly effective for reliable reasoning enhancement and provide practical guidance for designing robust mid-training pipelines.

AI.tldr: PRISM研究表明，在大型语言模型训练中期加入约270亿高质量token的中间训练，能显著提升数学、代码和科学推理能力，同时保持通用性能，为RL微调创造有效起点。
AI.motivation: 研究旨在探索大型语言模型训练中期的设计选择，特别是如何通过中间训练提升模型的推理能力，并为后续的强化学习微调创造更好的起点。
AI.method: 对7个基础模型进行控制实验，涵盖4个模型家族、2种架构类型（密集Transformer和注意力-Mamba混合）、参数规模从30亿到240亿。采用约270亿高质量token进行中间训练，然后进行强化学习微调。通过权重分析、表示相似性分析（CKA）等方法研究机制。
AI.result: 中间训练使数学能力提升15-40分，代码能力提升5-12分，科学能力提升6-13分，同时保持通用性能。完整的PRISM到RL流程将六个推理基准的宏观平均从不到12分提升到29-42分（3-4倍提升）。中间训练重构了90%以上的模型权重，而RL只稀疏调整约5%的参数。
AI.conclusion: 中间训练对于可靠推理增强非常有效，数据组合在中间训练阶段比在RL阶段更重要。中间训练将模型置于RL可以有效改进的配置中，为设计稳健的中间训练流程提供了实用指导。

title: MSRAMIE: Multimodal Structured Reasoning Agent for Multi-instruction Image Editing
comment: 14 pages, 6 figures, 3 tables, appendix and references provided
