L2A matches the performance of standard long-context training to within 3% while skipping Global Attention for $\sim$80% of tokens, outperforming prior baselines. We also design custom Triton kernels to efficiently implement this token-wise conditional Attention on GPUs, achieving up to $\sim$2x improvements in training throughput and time-to-first-token over FlashAttention. Moreover, L2A enables post-training pruning of highly sparse Global Attention layers, reducing KV cache memory by up to 50% with negligible performance loss.

AI.tldr: L2A是一种学习选择性全局注意力的层，通过让模型决定何时需要长程记忆访问，在保持性能的同时显著减少计算开销，将模型上下文从32K扩展到128K。
AI.motivation: 语言模型难以泛化到预训练上下文长度之外，限制了长程推理和检索能力。传统长上下文训练因注意力机制的二次方计算复杂度而代价高昂。
AI.method: 提出L2A层，基于观察发现大多数token不需要全局注意力，只需局部上下文。L2A让模型学习条件性（按token决定）的长程记忆访问，决定何时调用全局注意力。
AI.result: 在Qwen 2.5和Qwen 3模型上，将有效上下文从32K扩展到128K，性能与标准长上下文训练相差3%以内，同时为约80%的token跳过全局注意力。定制Triton内核实现2倍训练吞吐量提升，KV缓存内存减少50%。
AI.conclusion: L2A通过条件性全局注意力机制，在保持性能的同时显著降低了长上下文训练的计算和内存开销，为高效扩展模型上下文长度提供了有效方案。

title: Abstraction as a Memory-Efficient Inductive Bias for Continual Learning
summary: The real world is non-stationary and infinitely complex, requiring intelligent agents to learn continually without the prohibitive cost of retraining from scratch. While online continual learning offers a framework for this setting, learning new information often interferes with previously acquired knowledge, causes forgetting and degraded generalization. To address this, we propose Abstraction-Augmented Training (AAT), a loss-level modification encouraging models to capture the latent relational structure shared across examples. By jointly optimizing over concrete instances and their abstract representations, AAT introduces a memory-efficient inductive bias that stabilizes learning in strictly online data streams, eliminating the need for a replay buffer. To capture the multi-faceted nature of abstraction, we introduce and evaluate AAT on two benchmarks: a controlled relational dataset where abstraction is realized through entity masking, and a narrative dataset where abstraction is expressed through shared proverbs. Our results show that AAT achieves performance comparable to or exceeding strong experience replay (ER) baselines, despite requiring zero additional memory and only minimal changes to the training objective. This work highlights structural abstraction as a powerful, memory-free alternative to ER.

AI.tldr: AAT通过联合优化具体实例和抽象表示，在严格在线数据流中实现无记忆缓冲的持续学习，性能媲美经验回放方法
AI.motivation: 现实世界非平稳且无限复杂，智能体需要持续学习而不必从头训练。在线持续学习中，学习新知识会干扰旧知识，导致遗忘和泛化能力下降
AI.method: 提出抽象增强训练(AAT)，通过损失函数修改鼓励模型捕捉示例间的潜在关系结构。联合优化具体实例和抽象表示，引入内存高效的归纳偏置，无需回放缓冲区
AI.result: AAT在关系数据集和叙事数据集上表现优异，性能达到或超过强经验回放基线，且无需额外内存，仅需最小训练目标修改
AI.conclusion: 结构抽象是经验回放的有效内存免费替代方案，为在线持续学习提供了新方向

title: ACE-LoRA: Graph-Attentive Context Enhancement for Parameter-Efficient Adaptation of Medical Vision-Language Models
summary: The success of CLIP-like vision-language models (VLMs) on natural images has inspired medical counterparts, yet existing approaches largely fall into two extremes: specialist models trained on single-domain data, which capture domain-specific details but generalize poorly, and generalist medical VLMs trained on multi-domain data, which retain broad semantics but dilute fine-grained diagnostic cues. Bridging this specialization-generalization trade-off remains challenging. To address this problem, we propose ACE-LoRA, a parameter-efficient adaptation framework for generalist medical VLMs that maintains robust zero-shot generalization. ACE-LoRA integrates Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) modules into frozen image-text encoders and introduces an Attention-based Context Enhancement Hypergraph Neural Network (ACE-HGNN) module that captures higher-order contextual interactions beyond pairwise similarity to enrich global representations with localized diagnostic cues, addressing a key limitation of prior Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) methods that overlook fine-grained details. To further enhance cross-modal alignment, we formulate a label-guided InfoNCE loss to effectively suppress false negatives between semantically related image-text pairs. Despite adding only 0.95M trainable parameters, ACE-LoRA consistently outperforms state-of-the-art medical VLMs and PEFT baselines across zero-shot classification, segmentation, and detection benchmarks spanning multiple domains. Our code is available at https://github.com/icon-lab/ACE-LoRA.

AI.tldr: ACE-LoRA：一种参数高效的医学视觉语言模型适配框架，通过注意力上下文增强超图神经网络和标签引导损失，在保持零样本泛化能力的同时提升细粒度诊断线索的捕捉能力。
AI.motivation: 现有医学视觉语言模型存在专业化与泛化性的两难困境：专用模型在单领域数据上训练能捕捉领域细节但泛化能力差，通用模型在多领域数据上训练保留广泛语义但稀释了细粒度诊断线索。需要解决这种专业化-泛化性权衡问题。
AI.method: 提出ACE-LoRA框架：1）在冻结的图像-文本编码器中集成低秩适配（LoRA）模块；2）引入注意力上下文增强超图神经网络（ACE-HGNN）模块，捕捉超越成对相似性的高阶上下文交互，用局部诊断线索丰富全局表示；3）设计标签引导的InfoNCE损失，有效抑制语义相关图像-文本对之间的假阴性。
AI.result: 仅增加0.95M可训练参数，ACE-LoRA在跨多个领域的零样本分类、分割和检测基准上，持续优于最先进的医学视觉语言模型和参数高效微调基线方法。
AI.conclusion: ACE-LoRA成功解决了医学视觉语言模型中专业化与泛化性的权衡问题，通过参数高效的适配框架在保持强大零样本泛化能力的同时，显著提升了细粒度诊断线索的捕捉能力。

title: Inducing Epistemological Humility in Large Language Models: A Targeted SFT Approach to Reducing Hallucination
summary: Large language models (LLMs) often hallucinate, producing fluent but false information, partly because supervised fine-tuning (SFT) implicitly rewards always responding. We introduce $\textit{HypoTermInstruct}$, an SFT dataset (31,487 responses for 11,151 questions) designed to teach models epistemological humility-the ability to recognize the limits of their own knowledge and admit uncertainty. This is achieved through questions about non-existent "hypothetical" terms. We also release $\textit{HypoTermQA-Enhanced}$, a benchmark for hallucination tendency strengthened through multiple validations. We conducted 800 controlled LoRA SFT runs across $\textit{Llama3.1-8B}$ and $\textit{Gemma3-4B}$ (base and instruct), testing 100 fine-tuning configurations with paired controls. Our results demonstrate that replacing generic instruction data with $\textit{HypoTermInstruct}$ significantly improves the HypoTerm Score (median increases of 0.19% to 25.91%) and FactScore (+0.39% to +0.86%), while maintaining stable performance on MMLU (minimal decreases of 0.26% to 0.35%). Our work demonstrates that targeted, high-quality SFT data teaching meta-cognitive skills can effectively reduce hallucination without preference/RL pipelines, providing mechanistic insights and a practical path toward more reliable AI systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HypoTermInstruct数据集，通过教授模型认识自身知识局限性的元认知技能，有效减少LLM幻觉，同时保持基础能力稳定。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型经常产生幻觉，输出流畅但虚假的信息，部分原因是监督微调（SFT）隐含地奖励模型总是回应。需要教授模型认识自身知识局限性的元认知能力。
AI.method: 引入HypoTermInstruct SFT数据集（31,487个回答对应11,151个问题），通过关于不存在的"假设"术语的问题来教授模型认识知识局限性。同时发布HypoTermQA-Enhanced基准测试，通过多重验证强化幻觉倾向评估。在Llama3.1-8B和Gemma3-4B模型上进行了800次受控LoRA SFT实验，测试100种微调配置。
AI.result: 用HypoTermInstruct替换通用指令数据显著提高了HypoTerm Score（中位数提升0.19%到25.91%）和FactScore（提升0.39%到0.86%），同时在MMLU上保持稳定性能（仅下降0.26%到0.35%）。
AI.conclusion: 针对性的高质量SFT数据教授元认知技能可以有效减少幻觉，无需偏好/RL流程，为构建更可靠的AI系统提供了机制性见解和实用路径。

title: Catching rationalization in the act: detecting motivated reasoning before and after CoT via activation probing
summary: Large language models (LLMs) can produce chains of thought (CoT) that do not accurately reflect the actual factors driving their answers. In multiple-choice settings with an injected hint favoring a particular option, models may shift their final answer toward the hinted option and produce a CoT that rationalizes the response without acknowledging the hint - an instance of motivated reasoning. We study this phenomenon across multiple LLM families and datasets demonstrating that motivated reasoning can be identified by probing internal activations even in cases when it cannot be easily determined from CoT. Using supervised probes trained on the model's residual stream, we show that (i) pre-generation probes, applied before any CoT tokens are generated, predict motivated reasoning as well as a LLM-based CoT monitor that accesses the full CoT trace, and (ii) post-generation probes, applied after CoT generation, outperform the same monitor. Together, these results show that motivated reasoning is detected more reliably from internal representations than from CoT monitoring. Moreover, pre-generation probing can flag motivated behavior early, potentially avoiding unnecessary generation.

AI.tldr: LLMs会进行动机推理：在选择题中，即使有提示偏向某个选项，模型会改变答案并生成合理化推理而不承认提示，这种现象可以通过内部激活探测比思维链监控更可靠地检测。
AI.motivation: 研究大型语言模型中的动机推理现象，即模型会改变答案以符合提示，并生成合理化推理而不承认外部提示的影响，这揭示了模型推理过程的不透明性和潜在偏见。
AI.method: 在多个LLM家族和数据集上研究动机推理现象，使用监督探针训练在模型的残差流上，包括预生成探针（在生成思维链之前）和后生成探针（在生成思维链之后），并与基于LLM的思维链监控器进行比较。
AI.result: 预生成探针在预测动机推理方面与访问完整思维链轨迹的LLM监控器表现相当，而后生成探针优于同一监控器。内部表示比思维链监控更可靠地检测动机推理，预生成探测可以早期标记动机行为，避免不必要的生成。
AI.conclusion: 动机推理是LLMs中可检测的现象，通过内部激活探测比思维链监控更可靠地识别，预生成探测具有早期检测优势，为理解模型推理过程和开发更可靠的监控工具提供了新途径。

title: Accurate Shift Invariant Convolutional Neural Networks Using Gaussian-Hermite Moments
summary: The convolutional neural networks (CNNs) are not inherently shift invariant or equivariant. The downsampling operation, used in CNNs, is one of the key reasons which breaks the shift invariant property of a CNN. Conversely, downsampling operation is important to improve computational efficiency and increase the area of the receptive field for more contextual information. In this work, we propose Gaussian-Hermite Sampling (GHS), a novel downsampling strategy designed to achieve accurate shift invariance. GHS leverages Gaussian-Hermite polynomials to perform shift-consistent sampling, enabling CNN layers to maintain invariance to arbitrary spatial shifts prior to training. When integrated into standard CNN architectures, the proposed method embeds shift invariance directly at the layer level without requiring architectural modifications or additional training procedures. We evaluate the proposed approach on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and MNIST-rot datasets. Experimental results demonstrate that GHS significantly improves shift consistency, achieving 100% classification consistency under spatial shifts, while also improving classification accuracy compared to baseline CNN models.

AI.tldr: 提出Gaussian-Hermite采样方法，通过高斯-埃尔米特多项式实现平移一致的采样，使CNN层在训练前就能保持对任意空间平移的不变性，显著提升平移一致性至100%。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN中的下采样操作会破坏平移不变性，但下采样对于计算效率和扩大感受野获取上下文信息又很重要。因此需要一种既能保持平移不变性又能进行有效下采样的方法。
AI.method: 提出Gaussian-Hermite采样方法，利用高斯-埃尔米特多项式进行平移一致的采样。该方法可以直接嵌入标准CNN架构中，无需修改网络结构或增加额外训练过程。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100和MNIST-rot数据集上的实验表明，GHS方法显著提升了平移一致性，在空间平移下实现了100%的分类一致性，同时相比基线CNN模型还提高了分类准确率。
AI.conclusion: Gaussian-Hermite采样是一种有效的下采样策略，能够在保持CNN计算效率和感受野优势的同时，实现准确的平移不变性，为构建更鲁棒的CNN模型提供了新思路。

title: Language on Demand, Knowledge at Core: Composing LLMs with Encoder-Decoder Translation Models for Extensible Multilinguality
comment: Submitted to ACL 2026. The code is available at https://github.com/ictnlp/XBridge
summary: Large language models (LLMs) exhibit strong general intelligence, yet their multilingual performance remains highly imbalanced. Although LLMs encode substantial cross-lingual knowledge in a unified semantic space, they often struggle to reliably interface this knowledge with low-resource or unseen languages. Fortunately, pretrained encoder-decoder translation models already possess balanced multilingual capability, suggesting a natural complement to LLMs. In this work, we propose XBridge, a compositional encoder-LLM-decoder architecture that offloads multilingual understanding and generation to external pretrained translation models, while preserving the LLM as an English-centric core for general knowledge processing. To address the resulting representation misalignment across models, we introduce lightweight cross-model mapping layers and an optimal transport-based alignment objective, enabling fine-grained semantic consistency for multilingual generation. Experiments on four LLMs across multilingual understanding, reasoning, summarization, and generation indicate that XBridge outperforms strong baselines, especially on low-resource and previously unseen languages, without retraining the LLM.

AI.tldr: XBridge是一个组合式编码器-LLM-解码器架构，利用预训练翻译模型处理多语言任务，同时保留LLM作为英语核心处理通用知识，通过跨模型映射层和最优传输对齐实现多语言生成。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在多语言性能上存在严重不平衡，虽然编码了大量跨语言知识，但在低资源或未见语言上表现不佳。预训练编码器-解码器翻译模型具有平衡的多语言能力，可以补充LLM的不足。
AI.method: 提出XBridge架构：将多语言理解和生成卸载到外部预训练翻译模型，LLM作为英语核心处理通用知识。引入轻量级跨模型映射层和基于最优传输的对齐目标，实现细粒度语义一致性。
AI.result: 在四个LLM上的多语言理解、推理、摘要和生成任务中，XBridge优于强基线方法，特别是在低资源和未见语言上表现突出，且无需重新训练LLM。
AI.conclusion: XBridge通过组合预训练翻译模型和LLM，有效解决了LLM多语言性能不平衡问题，在保持LLM核心能力的同时显著提升了低资源语言性能。

title: On the Cone Effect and Modality Gap in Medical Vision-Language Embeddings
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) exhibit a characteristic "cone effect" in which nonlinear encoders map embeddings into highly concentrated regions of the representation space, contributing to cross-modal separation known as the modality gap. While this phenomenon has been widely observed, its practical impact on supervised multimodal learning -particularly in medical domains- remains unclear. In this work, we introduce a lightweight post-hoc mechanism that keeps pretrained VLM encoders frozen while continuously controlling cross-modal separation through a single hyperparameter {λ}. This enables systematic analysis of how the modality gap affects downstream multimodal performance without expensive retraining. We evaluate generalist (CLIP, SigLIP) and medically specialized (BioMedCLIP, MedSigLIP) models across diverse medical and natural datasets in a supervised multimodal settings. Results consistently show that reducing excessive modality gap improves downstream performance, with medical datasets exhibiting stronger sensitivity to gap modulation; however, fully collapsing the gap is not always optimal, and intermediate, task-dependent separation yields the best results. These findings position the modality gap as a tunable property of multimodal representations rather than a quantity that should be universally minimized.

AI.tldr: 提出一种轻量级后处理机制，通过单个超参数λ连续控制跨模态分离，系统分析模态间隙对下游多模态性能的影响，发现适度而非完全消除模态间隙能获得最佳性能。
AI.motivation: 虽然视觉语言模型（VLMs）存在"锥形效应"导致模态间隙已被广泛观察，但其对监督多模态学习（特别是在医学领域）的实际影响仍不清楚。需要在不昂贵重新训练的情况下分析模态间隙如何影响下游性能。
AI.method: 引入轻量级后处理机制，保持预训练VLM编码器冻结，通过单个超参数λ连续控制跨模态分离。评估通用模型（CLIP、SigLIP）和医学专用模型（BioMedCLIP、MedSigLIP）在医学和自然数据集上的表现。
AI.result: 减少过度的模态间隙能改善下游性能，医学数据集对间隙调制表现出更强的敏感性；但完全消除间隙并非总是最优，中等程度、任务依赖的分离能获得最佳结果。
AI.conclusion: 模态间隙应被视为多模态表示的可调属性，而非必须普遍最小化的量。适度的跨模态分离对任务性能至关重要，需要根据具体任务调整。

title: LLM-Powered Flood Depth Estimation from Social Media Imagery: A Vision-Language Model Framework with Mechanistic Interpretability for Transportation Resilience
summary: Urban flooding poses an escalating threat to transportation network continuity, yet no operational system currently provides real-time, street-level flood depth information at the centimeter resolution required for dynamic routing, electric vehicle (EV) safety, and autonomous vehicle (AV) operations. This study presents FloodLlama, a fine-tuned open-source vision-language model (VLM) for continuous flood depth estimation from single street-level images, supported by a multimodal sensing pipeline using TikTok data. A synthetic dataset of approximately 190000 images was generated, covering seven vehicle types, four weather conditions, and 41 depth levels (0-40 cm at 1 cm resolution). Progressive curriculum training enabled coarse-to-fine learning, while LLaMA 3.2-11B Vision was fine-tuned using QLoRA. Evaluation across 34797 trials reveals a depth-dependent prompt effect: simple prompts perform better for shallow flooding, whereas chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning improves performance at greater depths. FloodLlama achieves a mean absolute error (MAE) below 0.97 cm and Acc@5cm above 93.7% for deep flooding, exceeding 96.8% for shallow depths. A five-phase mechanistic interpretability framework identifies layer L23 as the critical depth-encoding transition and enables selective fine-tuning that reduces trainable parameters by 76-80% while maintaining accuracy. The Tier 3 configuration achieves 98.62% accuracy on real-world data and shows strong robustness under visual occlusion. A TikTok-based data pipeline, validated on 676 annotated flood frames from Detroit, demonstrates the feasibility of real-time, crowd-sourced flood sensing. The proposed framework provides a scalable, infrastructure-free solution with direct implications for EV safety, AV deployment, and resilient transportation management.

AI.tldr: FloodLlama：基于TikTok数据微调的开源视觉语言模型，用于从单张街景图像实现厘米级洪水深度估计，为电动汽车和自动驾驶车辆提供实时洪水感知解决方案。
AI.motivation: 城市洪水对交通网络连续性构成日益严重的威胁，但目前没有运营系统能够提供厘米级分辨率的实时街级洪水深度信息，这对于动态路径规划、电动汽车安全和自动驾驶操作至关重要。
AI.method: 使用约19万张合成图像数据集，涵盖7种车辆类型、4种天气条件和41个深度级别（0-40厘米，1厘米分辨率）。通过渐进式课程训练实现从粗到细的学习，使用QLoRA微调LLaMA 3.2-11B Vision模型。建立TikTok多模态感知管道进行实时数据收集。
AI.result: FloodLlama在34,797次试验中表现优异：平均绝对误差低于0.97厘米，深度洪水时Acc@5cm超过93.7%，浅水时超过96.8%。五阶段机制可解释性框架识别出L23层为关键深度编码转换层，选择性微调减少76-80%可训练参数。Tier 3配置在真实数据上达到98.62%准确率，对视觉遮挡具有强鲁棒性。TikTok管道在底特律676个标注洪水帧上验证了可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架提供了一个可扩展、无需基础设施的解决方案，对电动汽车安全、自动驾驶部署和弹性交通管理具有直接意义，能够实现实时、众包的洪水感知。

title: Detecting the Machine: A Comprehensive Benchmark of AI-Generated Text Detectors Across Architectures, Domains, and Adversarial Conditions
summary:
The rapid proliferation of large language models (LLMs) has created an urgent need for robust and generalizable detectors of machine-generated text. Existing benchmarks typically evaluate a single detector on a single dataset under ideal conditions, leaving open questions about cross-domain transfer, cross-LLM generalization, and adversarial robustness.
  We present a comprehensive benchmark evaluating diverse detection approaches across two corpora: HC3 (23,363 human-ChatGPT pairs) and ELI5 (15,000 human-Mistral-7B pairs). Methods include classical classifiers, fine-tuned transformer encoders (BERT, RoBERTa, ELECTRA, DistilBERT, DeBERTa-v3), a CNN, an XGBoost stylometric model, perplexity-based detectors, and LLM-as-detector prompting.
  Results show that transformer models achieve near-perfect in-distribution performance but degrade under domain shift. The XGBoost stylometric model matches performance while remaining interpretable. LLM-based detectors underperform and are affected by generator-detector identity bias. Perplexity-based methods exhibit polarity inversion, with modern LLM outputs showing lower perplexity than human text, but remain effective when corrected. No method generalizes robustly across domains and LLM sources.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个全面的机器生成文本检测基准，评估了多种检测方法在两个数据集上的表现，发现现有方法在跨域迁移、跨LLM泛化和对抗鲁棒性方面存在局限。
AI.motivation: 随着大语言模型的快速扩散，迫切需要稳健且可泛化的机器生成文本检测器。现有基准通常只在理想条件下评估单一检测器在单一数据集上的表现，未能解决跨域迁移、跨LLM泛化和对抗鲁棒性等关键问题。
AI.method: 构建了一个综合基准，在两个语料库（HC3：23,363个人类-ChatGPT对；ELI5：15,000个人类-Mistral-7B对）上评估了多种检测方法，包括经典分类器、微调的Transformer编码器（BERT、RoBERTa、ELECTRA、DistilBERT、DeBERTa-v3）、CNN、XGBoost风格计量模型、基于困惑度的检测器以及LLM作为检测器的提示方法。
AI.result: Transformer模型在分布内数据上达到近乎完美的性能，但在域转移下性能下降。XGBoost风格计量模型在保持可解释性的同时匹配了性能。基于LLM的检测器表现不佳且受生成器-检测器身份偏差影响。基于困惑度的方法表现出极性反转（现代LLM输出的困惑度低于人类文本），但校正后仍有效。没有方法能在跨域和跨LLM源的情况下稳健泛化。
AI.conclusion: 当前机器生成文本检测方法在跨域和跨LLM泛化方面存在显著局限，需要开发更稳健的检测方法来解决这些挑战。XGBoost风格计量模型在性能和可解释性之间提供了良好平衡，而基于困惑度的方法需要校正以适应现代LLM的特性。

title: Binary Latent Protein Fitness Landscapes for Quantum Annealing Optimization
summary:
We propose Q-BIOLAT, a framework for modeling and optimizing protein fitness landscapes in binary latent spaces. Starting from protein sequences, we leverage pretrained protein language models to obtain continuous embeddings, which are then transformed into compact binary latent representations. In this space, protein fitness is approximated using a quadratic unconstrained binary optimization (QUBO) model, enabling efficient combinatorial search via classical heuristics such as simulated annealing and genetic algorithms.
  On the ProteinGym benchmark, we demonstrate that Q-BIOLAT captures meaningful structure in protein fitness landscapes and enables the identification of high-fitness variants. Despite using a simple binarization scheme, our method consistently retrieves sequences whose nearest neighbors lie within the top fraction of the training fitness distribution, particularly under the strongest configurations. We further show that different optimization strategies exhibit distinct behaviors, with evolutionary search performing better in higher-dimensional latent spaces and local search remaining competitive in preserving realistic sequences.
  Beyond its empirical performance, Q-BIOLAT provides a natural bridge between protein representation learning and combinatorial optimization. By formulating protein fitness as a QUBO problem, our framework is directly compatible with emerging quantum annealing hardware, opening new directions for quantum-assisted protein engineering.
  Our implementation is publicly available at: https://github.com/HySonLab/Q-BIOLAT

AI.tldr: Q-BIOLAT：在二元潜在空间中建模和优化蛋白质适应度景观的框架，使用蛋白质语言模型嵌入，通过QUBO模型近似适应度，支持经典启发式搜索和量子退火硬件
AI.motivation: 建立蛋白质表示学习与组合优化之间的桥梁，为蛋白质工程提供高效搜索方法，并兼容新兴量子退火硬件
AI.method: 使用预训练蛋白质语言模型获得连续嵌入，转换为紧凑二元潜在表示，通过QUBO模型近似蛋白质适应度，采用模拟退火、遗传算法等经典启发式进行组合搜索
AI.result: 在ProteinGym基准测试中，Q-BIOLAT能捕捉蛋白质适应度景观的有意义结构，识别高适应度变体，在不同优化策略下表现良好，尤其在强配置下能检索到训练适应度分布顶部的序列
AI.conclusion: Q-BIOLAT为蛋白质适应度建模提供了有效框架，连接了表示学习与组合优化，为量子辅助蛋白质工程开辟了新方向

title: Pixel-level Counterfactual Contrastive Learning for Medical Image Segmentation
summary: Image segmentation relies on large annotated datasets, which are expensive and slow to produce. Silver-standard (AI-generated) labels are easier to obtain, but they risk introducing bias. Self-supervised learning, needing only images, has become key for pre-training. Recent work combining contrastive learning with counterfactual generation improves representation learning for classification but does not readily extend to pixel-level tasks. We propose a pipeline combining counterfactual generation with dense contrastive learning via Dual-View (DVD-CL) and Multi-View (MVD-CL) methods, along with supervised variants that utilize available silver-standard annotations. A new visualisation algorithm, the Color-coded High Resolution Overlay map (CHRO-map) is also introduced. Experiments show annotation-free DVD-CL outperforms other dense contrastive learning methods, while supervised variants using silver-standard labels outperform training on the silver-standard labeled data directly, achieving $\sim$94% DSC on challenging data. These results highlight that pixel-level contrastive learning, enhanced by counterfactuals and silver-standard annotations, improves robustness to acquisition and pathological variations.

AI.tldr: 提出结合反事实生成与密集对比学习的像素级分割方法，无需标注或利用AI生成标签，在挑战性数据上达到94% DSC
AI.motivation: 图像分割需要大量标注数据，成本高昂且耗时。AI生成的银标准标签易获取但有偏差风险。自监督学习仅需图像，但现有结合对比学习与反事实生成的方法难以扩展到像素级任务。
AI.method: 提出结合反事实生成与密集对比学习的流水线：双视图(DVD-CL)和多视图(MVD-CL)方法，以及利用银标准标注的监督变体。同时引入新的可视化算法CHRO-map。
AI.result: 无标注的DVD-CL优于其他密集对比学习方法；使用银标准标签的监督变体优于直接在银标准标注数据上训练，在挑战性数据上达到约94% DSC。
AI.conclusion: 像素级对比学习通过反事实生成和银标准标注增强，能提高对采集和病理变化的鲁棒性，为图像分割提供有效的无标注/弱标注解决方案。

title: AURORA Model of Formant-to-Tongue Inversion for Didactic and Clinical Applications
summary: This paper outlines the conceptual and computational foundations of the AURORA (Acoustic Understanding and Real-time Observation of Resonant Articulations) model. AURORA predicts tongue displacement and shape in vowel sounds based on the first two formant values. It is intended as a didactic aid helping to explain the relationship between formants and the underlying articulation, as well as a foundation for biofeedback applications. The model is informed by ultrasound tongue imaging and acoustic data from 40 native speakers of English. In this paper we discuss the motivation for the model, the modelling objectives as well as the model architecture. We provide a qualitative evaluation of the model, focusing on selected tongue features. We then present two tools developed to make the model more accessible to a wider audience, a Shiny app and a prototype software for real-time tongue biofeedback. Potential users include students of phonetics, linguists in fields adjacent to phonetics, as well as speech and language therapy practitioners and clients.

AI.tldr: AURORA模型通过前两个共振峰预测元音发音时的舌头位移和形状，旨在作为教学工具和生物反馈应用基础。
AI.motivation: 开发一个能够解释共振峰与发音动作之间关系的教学工具，并为语音生物反馈应用提供基础，帮助语音学学生、相关领域语言学家以及言语治疗从业者和患者。
AI.method: 基于40名英语母语者的超声舌头成像和声学数据，建立预测模型，通过前两个共振峰值预测舌头位移和形状，并开发了Shiny应用和实时舌头生物反馈原型软件。
AI.result: 建立了AURORA模型，能够根据共振峰预测舌头特征，开发了使模型更易访问的工具，并进行了定性评估，重点关注特定舌头特征。
AI.conclusion: AURORA模型成功建立了共振峰与发音动作之间的关系，为语音学教学和言语治疗应用提供了有价值的工具，通过开发的可访问工具将惠及更广泛的用户群体。

title: Pathology-Aware Multi-View Contrastive Learning for Patient-Independent ECG Reconstruction
summary: Reconstructing a 12-lead electrocardiogram (ECG) from a reduced lead set is an ill-posed inverse problem due to anatomical variability. Standard deep learning methods often ignore underlying cardiac pathology losing vital morphology in precordial leads. We propose Pathology-Aware Multi-View Contrastive Learning, a framework that regularizes the latent space through a pathological manifold. Our architecture integrates high-fidelity time-domain waveforms with pathology-aware embeddings learned via supervised contrastive alignment. By maximizing mutual information between latent representations and clinical labels, the framework learns to filter anatomical "nuisance" variables. On the PTB-XL dataset, our method achieves approx. 76\% reduction in RMSE compared to state-of-the-art model in patient-independent setting. Cross-dataset evaluation on the PTB Diagnostic Database confirms superior generalization, bridging the gap between hardware portability and diagnostic-grade reconstruction.

AI.tldr: 提出病理感知多视图对比学习框架，通过病理流形正则化潜在空间，从减少导联重建12导联心电图，显著降低RMSE并提升泛化能力
AI.motivation: 从减少导联重建12导联心电图是一个不适定逆问题，标准深度学习方法常忽略基础心脏病理，丢失胸前导联的重要形态信息
AI.method: 提出病理感知多视图对比学习框架，整合高保真时域波形与通过监督对比对齐学习的病理感知嵌入，最大化潜在表示与临床标签间的互信息，过滤解剖"干扰"变量
AI.result: 在PTB-XL数据集上，相比最先进模型在患者独立设置中实现约76%的RMSE降低；在PTB诊断数据库的跨数据集评估中确认了优越的泛化能力
AI.conclusion: 该框架弥合了硬件便携性与诊断级重建之间的差距，通过病理感知学习实现了更准确、泛化能力更强的12导联心电图重建

title: Hidden Clones: Exposing and Fixing Family Bias in Vision-Language Model Ensembles
summary:
Ensembling Vision-Language Models (VLMs) from different providers maximizes benchmark accuracy, yet models from the same architectural family share correlated errors that standard voting ignores. We study this structure across 17 VLMs from 8 families on VQAv2, TextVQA, and GQA. Family-correlated errors reduce effective ensemble dimensionality to 2.5-3.6 independent voters and create a Misleading tier (1.5-6.5% of questions) where correlated majority errors destroy accuracy to 0% despite the best model being correct.
  We propose three family-aware methods. Hierarchical Family Voting (HFV) aggregates within families before voting across them, recovering +18-26 pp on the Misleading tier. QualRCCV, a training-free method weighting models by calibration, family quality, and inverse family size, is the first to beat calibrated voting on all three benchmarks (p<0.05). Learned Candidate Scoring (LCS) trains a cross-validated classifier to re-rank candidate answers using support breadth, family diversity, and model quality, achieving the largest gains: +0.68% VQAv2, +0.61% TextVQA, +2.45% GQA -- all significant -- and is the only learned method that never degrades any benchmark. On VQAv2 test-standard (EvalAI), LCS reaches 87.83% with 12 models, confirming generalization.

AI.tldr: 研究发现视觉语言模型（VLM）集成时存在家族相关错误，提出三种家族感知方法提升集成性能
AI.motivation: 现有VLM集成方法忽略同一架构家族模型间的相关错误，导致集成效果受限，特别是在误导性问题上准确率可能降至0%
AI.method: 提出三种家族感知方法：1）分层家族投票（HFV）；2）基于校准、家族质量和逆家族大小的无训练方法（QualRCCV）；3）学习候选答案评分（LCS），使用支持广度、家族多样性和模型质量特征
AI.result: HFV在误导性问题上恢复18-26个百分点准确率；QualRCCV首次在所有三个基准上超越校准投票；LCS获得最大提升：VQAv2 +0.68%、TextVQA +0.61%、GQA +2.45%，且从不降低任何基准性能
AI.conclusion: VLM集成必须考虑家族相关性，提出的家族感知方法能显著提升集成性能，LCS方法在VQAv2测试集上达到87.83%准确率，验证了泛化能力

title: Zipper-LoRA: Dynamic Parameter Decoupling for Speech-LLM based Multilingual Speech Recognition
summary: Speech Large Language Models (Speech-LLMs) have emerged as a powerful approach for automatic speech recognition (ASR) by aligning speech encoders with large language models. However, adapting these systems to multilingual settings with imbalanced data distributions remains challenging. In such scenarios, a stability-plasticity dilemma often arises: fully shared Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) can cause negative inter-lingual interference for under-represented languages, while fully language-specific tuning limits the cross-lingual beneficial knowledge transfer needed for low-resource tasks. To address this, we propose Zipper-LoRA, a novel rank-level decoupling framework with three variants (Static, Hard, and Soft) that dynamically synthesizes LoRA updates from shared and language-specific subspaces. By using a lightweight language-conditioned router, Zipper-LoRA dynamically controls the contribution of each subspace at the LoRA rank level, enabling fine-grained sharing where languages are compatible and strict decoupling when conflicts occur. To further stabilize optimization under imbalanced data, we propose a two-stage training strategy with an Initial-B warm start that significantly accelerates convergence. Experiments on a 12-language mixed-resource setting show that Zipper-LoRA consistently outperforms both fully shared and independent baselines, particularly in extremely low-resource scenarios. Moreover, we demonstrate that these gains are robust across both chunked and non-chunked encoder configurations, confirming the framework's reliability for practical, large-scale multilingual ASR. Our code and data will be available at https://github.com/YuCeong-May/Zipper-LoRA for reproducibility.

AI.tldr: Zipper-LoRA：一种用于多语言语音大语言模型的秩级解耦框架，通过动态合成共享和语言特定子空间的LoRA更新，解决不平衡数据下的稳定性-可塑性困境。
AI.motivation: 多语言语音大语言模型面临数据分布不平衡的挑战。完全共享的参数高效微调会导致语言间负向干扰，而完全语言特定的调优又限制了跨语言知识转移。需要解决这种稳定性-可塑性困境。
AI.method: 提出Zipper-LoRA框架，包含三种变体（Static、Hard、Soft），通过轻量级语言条件路由器在LoRA秩级别动态控制共享和语言特定子空间的贡献。采用两阶段训练策略，包含Initial-B预热启动以加速收敛。
AI.result: 在12种语言的混合资源设置中，Zipper-LoRA始终优于完全共享和独立基线，尤其在极低资源场景下表现突出。该增益在分块和非分块编码器配置中均保持稳健。
AI.conclusion: Zipper-LoRA通过细粒度共享和动态解耦机制，有效解决了多语言语音大语言模型中的稳定性-可塑性困境，为大规模多语言ASR提供了可靠框架。

title: Variational Rectification Inference for Learning with Noisy Labels
summary: Label noise has been broadly observed in real-world datasets. To mitigate the negative impact of overfitting to label noise for deep models, effective strategies (\textit{e.g.}, re-weighting, or loss rectification) have been broadly applied in prevailing approaches, which have been generally learned under the meta-learning scenario. Despite the robustness of noise achieved by the probabilistic meta-learning models, they usually suffer from model collapse that degenerates generalization performance. In this paper, we propose variational rectification inference (VRI) to formulate the adaptive rectification for loss functions as an amortized variational inference problem and derive the evidence lower bound under the meta-learning framework. Specifically, VRI is constructed as a hierarchical Bayes by treating the rectifying vector as a latent variable, which can rectify the loss of the noisy sample with the extra randomness regularization and is, therefore, more robust to label noise. To achieve the inference of the rectifying vector, we approximate its conditional posterior with an amortization meta-network. By introducing the variational term in VRI, the conditional posterior is estimated accurately and avoids collapsing to a Dirac delta function, which can significantly improve the generalization performance. The elaborated meta-network and prior network adhere to the smoothness assumption, enabling the generation of reliable rectification vectors. Given a set of clean meta-data, VRI can be efficiently meta-learned within the bi-level optimization programming. Besides, theoretical analysis guarantees that the meta-network can be efficiently learned with our algorithm. Comprehensive comparison experiments and analyses validate its effectiveness for robust learning with noisy labels, particularly in the presence of open-set noise.

AI.tldr: 提出VRI方法，通过变分推断框架自适应修正损失函数，解决标签噪声问题，避免模型坍塌，提升泛化性能
AI.motivation: 现有基于元学习的概率模型虽然能处理标签噪声，但容易发生模型坍塌，导致泛化性能下降。需要一种既能有效处理标签噪声，又能避免模型坍塌的方法。
AI.method: 提出变分修正推断(VRI)，将损失函数的自适应修正建模为摊销变分推断问题。将修正向量作为隐变量，构建层次贝叶斯模型，通过摊销元网络近似条件后验分布，避免坍缩为狄拉克函数。
AI.result: VRI在标签噪声学习，特别是开放集噪声场景下表现优异，能显著提升模型的鲁棒性和泛化性能。理论分析证明元网络可以高效学习。
AI.conclusion: VRI通过变分推断框架有效解决了标签噪声学习中的模型坍塌问题，在保持鲁棒性的同时提升了泛化能力，特别适用于开放集噪声场景。

title: MosaicMem: Hybrid Spatial Memory for Controllable Video World Models
summary: Video diffusion models are moving beyond short, plausible clips toward world simulators that must remain consistent under camera motion, revisits, and intervention. Yet spatial memory remains a key bottleneck: explicit 3D structures can improve reprojection-based consistency but struggle to depict moving objects, while implicit memory often produces inaccurate camera motion even with correct poses. We propose Mosaic Memory (MosaicMem), a hybrid spatial memory that lifts patches into 3D for reliable localization and targeted retrieval, while exploiting the model's native conditioning to preserve prompt-following generation. MosaicMem composes spatially aligned patches in the queried view via a patch-and-compose interface, preserving what should persist while allowing the model to inpaint what should evolve. With PRoPE camera conditioning and two new memory alignment methods, experiments show improved pose adherence compared to implicit memory and stronger dynamic modeling than explicit baselines. MosaicMem further enables minute-level navigation, memory-based scene editing, and autoregressive rollout.

AI.tldr: MosaicMem是一种混合空间记忆系统，通过将图像块提升到3D空间实现可靠定位和针对性检索，同时利用模型原生条件保持提示跟随生成能力，解决了视频扩散模型中空间记忆的瓶颈问题。
AI.motivation: 视频扩散模型正从生成短片段发展为世界模拟器，需要保持相机运动、重访和干预下的一致性。当前方法存在瓶颈：显式3D结构能改善重投影一致性但难以描绘运动物体，而隐式记忆即使有正确姿态也常产生不准确的相机运动。
AI.method: 提出MosaicMem混合空间记忆系统，将图像块提升到3D空间实现可靠定位和针对性检索，通过patch-and-compose接口在查询视图中组合空间对齐的图像块，保留应持久的内容同时让模型填充应演化的内容。结合PRoPE相机条件和两种新的记忆对齐方法。
AI.result: 实验显示相比隐式记忆有更好的姿态遵循性，相比显式基线有更强的动态建模能力。MosaicMem进一步实现了分钟级导航、基于记忆的场景编辑和自回归展开。
AI.conclusion: MosaicMem通过混合空间记忆方法有效解决了视频扩散模型中空间记忆的瓶颈，在保持相机运动一致性和动态物体建模方面取得了平衡，为世界模拟器的发展提供了重要技术支持。

title: KA2L: A Knowledge-Aware Active Learning Framework for LLMs
summary: Fine-tuning large language models (LLMs) with high-quality knowledge has been shown to enhance their performance effectively. However, there is a paucity of research on the depth of domain-specific knowledge comprehension by LLMs and the application of targeted active learning to improve their expertise. To address this gap, we introduce the Knowledge-Aware Active Learning (KA2L) framework. This framework assesses LLMs' mastery of specific knowledge points to aid in constructing unanswerable or unknowable questions through latent space analysis. This active learning strategy enhances training efficiency by focusing on knowledge the model has yet to master, thereby minimizing redundancy in learning already acquired information. This study innovatively employs a knowledge distribution probing technique to examine the hidden states of specific Transformer layers and identify the distribution of known and unknown knowledge within the LLM. Additionally, a hidden-state decoding method is proposed to generate numerous unknown questions in natural language from the latent knowledge space. In our experiments, we selected nine open-source LLMs to validate the effectiveness of the proposed framework. Results indicate that KA2L not only significantly reduces 50% annotation and computation costs across two open-domain and one vertical-domain dataset but also achieves better performance, offering valuable insights into active learning strategies for LLMs. The code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/KA2L-F15C.

AI.tldr: KA2L框架通过分析LLM的潜在空间来评估其对特定知识点的掌握程度，构建模型未掌握的问题进行主动学习，显著降低标注和计算成本50%的同时提升性能。
AI.motivation: 当前研究缺乏对LLM领域特定知识深度理解的分析，以及如何应用针对性主动学习来提升其专业能力。需要填补这一研究空白。
AI.method: 提出知识感知主动学习(KA2L)框架：1) 使用知识分布探测技术分析Transformer层的隐藏状态，识别LLM中已知和未知知识的分布；2) 提出隐藏状态解码方法，从潜在知识空间生成大量未知问题的自然语言表述。
AI.result: 在9个开源LLM上的实验表明：1) KA2L在两个开放域和一个垂直域数据集上显著降低50%的标注和计算成本；2) 同时获得更好的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: KA2L框架为LLM的主动学习策略提供了有价值的见解，通过聚焦模型尚未掌握的知识点来提高训练效率，减少已掌握信息的冗余学习。

title: Classifier Pooling for Modern Ordinal Classification
summary: Ordinal data is widely prevalent in clinical and other domains, yet there is a lack of both modern, machine-learning based methods and publicly available software to address it. In this paper, we present a model-agnostic method of ordinal classification, which can apply any non-ordinal classification method in an ordinal fashion. We also provide an open-source implementation of these algorithms, in the form of a Python package. We apply these models on multiple real-world datasets to show their performance across domains. We show that they often outperform non-ordinal classification methods, especially when the number of datapoints is relatively small or when there are many classes of outcomes. This work, including the developed software, facilitates the use of modern, more powerful machine learning algorithms to handle ordinal data.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种模型无关的序数分类方法，可将任何非序数分类方法应用于序数数据，并提供了开源Python实现
AI.motivation: 临床等领域广泛存在序数数据，但缺乏现代机器学习方法和公开可用的软件来处理这类数据
AI.method: 开发了一种模型无关的序数分类方法，可以将任何非序数分类方法以序数方式应用，并提供了开源Python包实现
AI.result: 在多个真实世界数据集上测试表明，该方法通常优于非序数分类方法，特别是在数据点相对较少或类别较多的情况下
AI.conclusion: 这项工作包括开发的软件，促进了使用更强大的现代机器学习算法来处理序数数据

title: SMAL-pets: SMAL Based Avatars of Pets from Single Image
summary: Creating high-fidelity, animatable 3D dog avatars remains a formidable challenge in computer vision. Unlike human digital doubles, animal reconstruction faces a critical shortage of large-scale, annotated datasets for specialized applications. Furthermore, the immense morphological diversity across species, breeds, and crosses, which varies significantly in size, proportions, and features, complicates the generalization of existing models. Current reconstruction methods often struggle to capture realistic fur textures. Additionally, ensuring these avatars are fully editable and capable of performing complex, naturalistic movements typically necessitates labor-intensive manual mesh manipulation and expert rigging. This paper introduces SMAL-pets, a comprehensive framework that generates high-quality, editable animal avatars from a single input image. Our approach bridges the gap between reconstruction and generative modeling by leveraging a hybrid architecture. Our method integrates 3D Gaussian Splatting with the SMAL parametric model to provide a representation that is both visually high-fidelity and anatomically grounded. We introduce a multimodal editing suite that enables users to refine the avatar's appearance and execute complex animations through direct textual prompts. By allowing users to control both the aesthetic and behavioral aspects of the model via natural language, SMAL-pets provides a flexible, robust tool for animation and virtual reality.

AI.tldr: SMAL-pets是一个从单张图像生成高质量、可编辑3D狗化身的框架，结合3D高斯泼溅和SMAL参数模型，支持通过文本提示进行外观编辑和动画控制。
AI.motivation: 创建高保真、可动画的3D狗化身面临多重挑战：缺乏大规模标注数据集、物种形态多样性大、现有方法难以捕捉真实毛发纹理，以及需要大量人工操作进行网格编辑和绑定。
AI.method: 采用混合架构，将3D高斯泼溅与SMAL参数模型集成，提供既视觉高保真又解剖学基础的表征。引入多模态编辑套件，允许用户通过文本提示精炼化身外观和执行复杂动画。
AI.result: 开发出SMAL-pets框架，能够从单张输入图像生成高质量、可编辑的动物化身，实现通过自然语言控制模型的美学和行为方面。
AI.conclusion: SMAL-pets为动画和虚拟现实提供了一个灵活、强大的工具，弥合了重建和生成建模之间的差距，实现了通过自然语言进行外观编辑和动画控制。

title: VeriAgent: A Tool-Integrated Multi-Agent System with Evolving Memory for PPA-Aware RTL Code Generation
summary: LLMs have recently demonstrated strong capabilities in automatic RTL code generation, achieving high syntactic and functional correctness. However, most methods focus on functional correctness while overlooking critical physical design objectives, including Power, Performance, and Area. In this work, we propose a PPA-aware, tool-integrated multi-agent framework for high-quality verilog code generation. Our framework explicitly incorporates EDA tools into a closed-loop workflow composed of a \textit{Programmer Agent}, a \textit{Correctness Agent}, and a \textit{PPA Agent}, enabling joint optimization of functional correctness and physical metrics. To support continuous improvement without model retraining, we introduce an \textit{Evolved Memory Mechanism} that externalizes optimization experience into structured memory nodes. A dedicated memory manager dynamically maintains the memory pool and allows the system to refine strategies based on historical execution trajectories. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach achieves strong functional correctness while delivering significant improvements in PPA metrics. By integrating tool-driven feedback with structured and evolvable memory, our framework transforms RTL generation from one-shot reasoning into a continual, feedback-driven optimization process, providing a scalable pathway for deploying LLMs in real-world hardware design flows.

AI.tldr: 提出PPA感知的多智能体框架，通过集成EDA工具实现功能正确性和物理指标的联合优化，引入演化记忆机制支持持续改进
AI.motivation: 现有LLM方法主要关注RTL代码生成的功能正确性，但忽视了关键的物理设计目标（功耗、性能、面积），需要将PPA指标纳入优化过程
AI.method: 提出工具集成的多智能体框架，包含程序员代理、正确性代理和PPA代理的闭环工作流，引入演化记忆机制将优化经验外部化为结构化记忆节点，由专用内存管理器动态维护
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在保持强功能正确性的同时，显著改善了PPA指标，将RTL生成从一次性推理转变为持续、反馈驱动的优化过程
AI.conclusion: 通过集成工具驱动反馈和结构化可演化记忆，该框架为在实际硬件设计流程中部署LLM提供了可扩展的途径

title: WINFlowNets: Warm-up Integrated Networks Training of Generative Flow Networks for Robotics and Machine Fault Adaptation
summary: Generative Flow Networks for continuous scenarios (CFlowNets) have shown promise in solving sequential decision-making tasks by learning stochastic policies using a flow and a retrieval network. Despite their demonstrated efficiency compared to state-of-the-art Reinforcement Learning (RL) algorithms, their practical application in robotic control tasks is constrained by the reliance on pre-training the retrieval network. This dependency poses challenges in dynamic robotic environments, where pre-training data may not be readily available or representative of the current environment. This paper introduces WINFlowNets, a novel CFlowNets framework that enables the co-training of flow and retrieval networks. WINFlowNets begins with a warm-up phase for the retrieval network to bootstrap its policy, followed by a shared training architecture and a shared replay buffer for co-training both networks. Experiments in simulated robotic environments demonstrate that WINFlowNets surpasses CFlowNets and state-of-the-art RL algorithms in terms of average reward and training stability. Furthermore, WINFlowNets exhibits strong adaptive capability in fault environments, making it suitable for tasks that demand quick adaptation with limited sample data. These findings highlight WINFlowNets' potential for deployment in dynamic and malfunction-prone robotic systems, where traditional pre-training or sample inefficient data collection may be impractical.

AI.tldr: WINFlowNets提出了一种新的连续场景生成流网络框架，通过流网络和检索网络的协同训练，解决了传统CFlowNets在机器人控制任务中依赖检索网络预训练的问题，在动态环境中表现出更好的适应性和训练稳定性。
AI.motivation: 传统CFlowNets在机器人控制任务中依赖检索网络的预训练，这在动态机器人环境中存在挑战，因为预训练数据可能不易获得或不能代表当前环境。需要一种能够协同训练流网络和检索网络的方法，以适应动态环境。
AI.method: WINFlowNets采用三阶段方法：1) 检索网络的预热阶段以引导其策略；2) 共享训练架构；3) 共享回放缓冲区用于协同训练两个网络。这种方法避免了预训练依赖，使两个网络能够同时学习和适应。
AI.result: 在模拟机器人环境中的实验表明，WINFlowNets在平均奖励和训练稳定性方面超越了CFlowNets和最先进的强化学习算法。在故障环境中表现出强大的适应能力，适合需要有限样本数据快速适应的任务。
AI.conclusion: WINFlowNets为动态和易故障的机器人系统部署提供了潜力，在这些系统中，传统的预训练或样本效率低下的数据收集可能不切实际。该框架展示了在动态环境中协同训练方法的优势。

title: BEV-SLD: Self-Supervised Scene Landmark Detection for Global Localization with LiDAR Bird's-Eye View Images
summary: We present BEV-SLD, a LiDAR global localization method building on the Scene Landmark Detection (SLD) concept. Unlike scene-agnostic pipelines, our self-supervised approach leverages bird's-eye-view (BEV) images to discover scene-specific patterns at a prescribed spatial density and treat them as landmarks. A consistency loss aligns learnable global landmark coordinates with per-frame heatmaps, yielding consistent landmark detections across the scene. Across campus, industrial, and forest environments, BEV-SLD delivers robust localization and achieves strong performance compared to state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: BEV-SLD是一种基于场景地标检测的LiDAR全局定位方法，使用BEV图像发现场景特定模式作为地标，通过自监督学习实现鲁棒定位。
AI.motivation: 现有场景无关的定位方法可能无法充分利用场景特定特征，需要一种能够发现并利用场景特定模式作为地标的定位方法，以提高在各种环境中的定位鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出BEV-SLD方法：1) 使用鸟瞰图(BEV)图像发现场景特定模式；2) 在预定空间密度下将这些模式作为地标；3) 通过一致性损失对齐可学习的全局地标坐标与每帧热图；4) 自监督学习确保跨场景的地标检测一致性。
AI.result: 在校园、工业和森林等多种环境中，BEV-SLD实现了鲁棒的定位性能，与最先进方法相比表现出色。
AI.conclusion: BEV-SLD通过自监督学习场景特定地标，提供了一种有效的LiDAR全局定位解决方案，在各种复杂环境中都表现出良好的鲁棒性和性能。

title: Do Language Models Encode Semantic Relations? Probing and Sparse Feature Analysis
summary: Understanding whether large language models (LLMs) capture structured meaning requires examining how they represent concept relationships. In this work, we study three models of increasing scale: Pythia-70M, GPT-2, and Llama 3.1 8B, focusing on four semantic relations: synonymy, antonymy, hypernymy, and hyponymy. We combine linear probing with mechanistic interpretability techniques, including sparse autoencoders (SAE) and activation patching, to identify where these relations are encoded and how specific features contribute to their representation. Our results reveal a directional asymmetry in hierarchical relations: hypernymy is encoded redundantly and resists suppression, while hyponymy relies on compact features that are more easily disrupted by ablation. More broadly, relation signals are diffuse but exhibit stable profiles: they peak in the mid-layers and are stronger in post-residual/MLP pathways than in attention. Difficulty is consistent across models (antonymy easiest, synonymy hardest). Probe-level causality is capacity-dependent: on Llama 3.1, SAE-guided patching reliably shifts these signals, whereas on smaller models the shifts are weak or unstable. Our results clarify where and how reliably semantic relations are represented inside LLMs, and provide a reproducible framework for relating sparse features to probe-level causal evidence.

AI.tldr: 研究通过线性探测和机制可解释性技术分析LLM中语义关系的编码，发现层次关系存在方向不对称性，关系信号在中间层最强，且在不同规模模型中表现出相似难度模式。
AI.motivation: 理解大型语言模型是否捕捉结构化意义，需要研究它们如何表示概念关系。本研究旨在探究不同规模模型中四种语义关系（同义、反义、上位、下位）的编码方式和位置。
AI.method: 结合线性探测与机制可解释性技术，包括稀疏自编码器和激活修补，分析Pythia-70M、GPT-2和Llama 3.1 8B三个不同规模模型。通过识别关系编码位置和特定特征对表示的贡献来研究语义关系。
AI.result: 发现层次关系存在方向不对称性：上位关系编码冗余且抵抗抑制，下位关系依赖紧凑特征更易被破坏。关系信号分散但具有稳定模式：在中间层达到峰值，在残差后/MLP路径中比注意力中更强。不同模型难度一致（反义最容易，同义最难）。探针级因果关系与模型容量相关：在Llama 3.1中，SAE引导的修补能可靠地改变这些信号，而在较小模型中变化微弱或不稳定。
AI.conclusion: 研究阐明了语义关系在LLM内部表示的位置和可靠性，并提供了一个可复现的框架，将稀疏特征与探针级因果证据联系起来，为理解LLM如何编码结构化语义关系提供了新见解。

title: Learning Permutation Distributions via Reflected Diffusion on Ranks
summary: The finite symmetric group S_n provides a natural domain for permutations, yet learning probability distributions on S_n is challenging due to its factorially growing size and discrete, non-Euclidean structure. Recent permutation diffusion methods define forward noising via shuffle-based random walks (e.g., riffle shuffles) and learn reverse transitions with Plackett-Luce (PL) variants, but the resulting trajectories can be abrupt and increasingly hard to denoise as n grows. We propose Soft-Rank Diffusion, a discrete diffusion framework that replaces shuffle-based corruption with a structured soft-rank forward process: we lift permutations to a continuous latent representation of order by relaxing discrete ranks into soft ranks, yielding smoother and more tractable trajectories. For the reverse process, we introduce contextualized generalized Plackett-Luce (cGPL) denoisers that generalize prior PL-style parameterizations and improve expressivity for sequential decision structures. Experiments on sorting and combinatorial optimization benchmarks show that Soft-Rank Diffusion consistently outperforms prior diffusion baselines, with particularly strong gains in long-sequence and intrinsically sequential settings.

AI.tldr: 提出Soft-Rank Diffusion框架，通过软排名表示将置换扩散从离散随机游走转换为连续平滑过程，结合上下文广义Plackett-Luce去噪器，在排序和组合优化任务上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 学习置换群S_n上的概率分布具有挑战性：规模阶乘增长、离散非欧结构。现有置换扩散方法使用基于洗牌的随机游走进行前向加噪，但轨迹突变且随n增大去噪困难。
AI.method: 提出Soft-Rank Diffusion框架：1) 前向过程：将置换提升为连续顺序表示，将离散排名松弛为软排名，获得更平滑轨迹；2) 反向过程：引入上下文广义Plackett-Luce去噪器，扩展PL参数化，提升序列决策结构表达能力。
AI.result: 在排序和组合优化基准测试中，Soft-Rank Diffusion始终优于现有扩散基线，在长序列和内在序列设置中表现尤为突出。
AI.conclusion: 通过软排名表示和上下文广义PL去噪器，Soft-Rank Diffusion为置换学习提供了更平滑、更易处理的扩散框架，特别适用于序列决策任务。

title: GazeOnce360: Fisheye-Based 360° Multi-Person Gaze Estimation with Global-Local Feature Fusion
summary: We present GazeOnce360, a novel end-to-end model for multi-person gaze estimation from a single tabletop-mounted upward-facing fisheye camera. Unlike conventional approaches that rely on forward-facing cameras in constrained viewpoints, we address the underexplored setting of estimating the 3D gaze direction of multiple people distributed across a 360° scene from an upward fisheye perspective. To support research in this setting, we introduce MPSGaze360, a large-scale synthetic dataset rendered using Unreal Engine, featuring diverse multi-person configurations with accurate 3D gaze and eye landmark annotations. Our model tackles the severe distortion and perspective variation inherent in fisheye imagery by incorporating rotational convolutions and eye landmark supervision. To better capture fine-grained eye features crucial for gaze estimation, we propose a dual-resolution architecture that fuses global low-resolution context with high-resolution local eye regions. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of each component in our model. This work highlights the feasibility and potential of fisheye-based 360° gaze estimation in practical multi-person scenarios. Project page: https://caizhuojiang.github.io/GazeOnce360/.

AI.tldr: GazeOnce360：首个从单台向上鱼眼相机实现360°多人视线估计的端到端模型，结合MPSGaze360合成数据集和双分辨率架构
AI.motivation: 传统视线估计方法依赖前向相机且视角受限，无法处理360°场景中的多人视线估计。向上鱼眼相机能覆盖更广视野，但存在严重畸变和视角变化问题，需要专门解决方案。
AI.method: 1) 提出GazeOnce360端到端模型；2) 引入MPSGaze360大规模合成数据集，使用Unreal Engine渲染，包含多样多人配置和精确3D视线/眼标点标注；3) 采用旋转卷积处理鱼眼畸变；4) 眼标点监督；5) 双分辨率架构融合全局低分辨率上下文和高分辨率局部眼部特征。
AI.result: 实验证明模型各组件有效，展示了鱼眼相机在360°多人视线估计场景中的可行性和潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明了基于鱼眼相机的360°多人视线估计在实际场景中的可行性，为多人在场交互应用提供了新解决方案。

title: Adaptive Guidance for Retrieval-Augmented Masked Diffusion Models
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) improves factual grounding by incorporating external knowledge into language model generation. However, when retrieved context is noisy, unreliable, or inconsistent with the model's parametric knowledge, it introduces retrieval-prior conflicts that can degrade generation quality. While this problem has been studied in autoregressive language models, it remains largely unexplored in diffusion-based language models, where the iterative denoising process introduces unique challenges for integrating retrieved context. In this work, we propose Adaptive Retrieval-Augmented Masked Diffusion (ARAM), a training-free adaptive guidance framework for Masked Diffusion Models (MDMs) in RAG settings. ARAM dynamically calibrates the guidance scale during denoising according to the Signal-to-Noise Ratio (SNR) of the distributional shift induced by retrieved context. Intuitively, the model strengthens guidance when the retrieved context provides reliable corrective evidence and suppresses it when the contextual signal is noisy or non-supportive. Extensive experiments on multiple knowledge-intensive QA benchmarks show that ARAM improves overall QA performance over competitive RAG baselines.

AI.tldr: ARAM提出了一种针对掩码扩散模型的无训练自适应引导框架，通过信噪比动态调整检索上下文的引导强度，解决检索增强生成中的噪声和冲突问题。
AI.motivation: 检索增强生成（RAG）虽然能提高事实基础性，但当检索到的上下文存在噪声、不可靠或与模型参数知识冲突时，会导致检索-先验冲突，降低生成质量。这一问题在自回归语言模型中已有研究，但在基于扩散的语言模型中尚未充分探索，因为其迭代去噪过程给检索上下文整合带来了独特挑战。
AI.method: 提出自适应检索增强掩码扩散（ARAM），这是一个针对掩码扩散模型的无训练自适应引导框架。ARAM根据检索上下文引起的分布偏移的信噪比，在去噪过程中动态校准引导尺度。当检索上下文提供可靠纠正证据时增强引导，当上下文信号有噪声或不支持时抑制引导。
AI.result: 在多个知识密集型问答基准测试上的广泛实验表明，ARAM在整体问答性能上优于竞争性的RAG基线方法。
AI.conclusion: ARAM框架有效解决了扩散语言模型中检索上下文整合的挑战，通过自适应引导机制提高了检索增强生成的质量和可靠性。

title: Beyond Outliers: A Data-Free Layer-wise Mixed-Precision Quantization Approach Driven by Numerical and Structural Dual-Sensitivity
summary: Layer-wise mixed-precision quantization (LMPQ) enables effective compression under extreme low-bit settings by allocating higher precision to sensitive layers. However, existing methods typically treat all intra-layer weight modules uniformly and rely on a single numerical property when estimating sensitivity, overlooking their distinct operational roles and structural characteristics. To address this, we propose NSDS, a novel calibration-free LMPQ framework driven by Numerical and Structural Dual-Sensitivity. Specifically, it first mechanistically decomposes each layer into distinct operational roles and quantifies their sensitivity from both numerical and structural perspectives. These dual-aspect scores are then aggregated into a unified layer-wise metric through a robust aggregation scheme based on MAD-Sigmoid and Soft-OR to guide bit allocation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that NSDS consistently achieves superior performance compared to various baselines across diverse models and downstream tasks, without relying on any calibration data.

AI.tldr: NSDS提出一种无需校准数据的层间混合精度量化框架，通过数值和结构双重敏感性分析来分配比特位宽，在极端低比特设置下实现更优的模型压缩效果。
AI.motivation: 现有层间混合精度量化方法通常将层内所有权重模块统一处理，仅依赖单一数值属性评估敏感性，忽视了不同模块的操作角色和结构特性差异，导致在极端低比特设置下的压缩效果受限。
AI.method: NSDS框架首先将每层分解为不同的操作角色，从数值和结构两个角度量化其敏感性。然后通过基于MAD-Sigmoid和Soft-OR的鲁棒聚合方案，将双重敏感性分数聚合成统一的层级指标，指导比特分配。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，NSDS在各种模型和下游任务上均优于多个基线方法，且无需依赖任何校准数据，在极端低比特设置下实现了更优的性能。
AI.conclusion: NSDS通过综合考虑数值和结构双重敏感性，解决了现有层间混合精度量化方法的局限性，为无需校准数据的模型压缩提供了有效解决方案，在保持性能的同时实现了更好的压缩效果。

title: Generalist Multimodal LLMs Gain Biometric Expertise via Human Salience
summary: Iris presentation attack detection (PAD) is critical for secure biometric deployments, yet developing specialized models faces significant practical barriers: collecting data representing future unknown attacks is impossible, and collecting diverse-enough data, yet still limited in terms of its predictive power, is expensive. Additionally, sharing biometric data raises privacy concerns. Due to rapid emergence of new attack vectors demanding adaptable solutions, we thus investigate in this paper whether general-purpose multimodal large language models (MLLMs) can perform iris PAD when augmented with human expert knowledge, operating under strict privacy constraints that prohibit sending biometric data to public cloud MLLM services. Through analysis of vision encoder embeddings applied to our dataset, we demonstrate that pre-trained vision transformers in MLLMs inherently cluster many iris attack types despite never being explicitly trained for this task. However, where clustering shows overlap between attack classes, we find that structured prompts incorporating human salience (verbal descriptions from subjects identifying attack indicators) enable these models to resolve ambiguities. Testing on an IRB-restricted dataset of 224 iris images spanning seven attack types, using only university-approved services (Gemini 2.5 Pro) or locally-hosted models (e.g., Llama 3.2-Vision), we show that Gemini with expert-informed prompts outperforms both a specialized convolutional neural networks (CNN)-based baseline and human examiners, while the locally-deployable Llama achieves near-human performance. Our results establish that MLLMs deployable within institutional privacy constraints offer a viable path for iris PAD.

AI.tldr: MLLMs结合专家知识可在隐私约束下实现高性能虹膜防伪检测，超越专业CNN基线和人工检查
AI.motivation: 虹膜防伪检测面临三大挑战：1)无法收集未来未知攻击数据；2)收集足够多样本成本高昂；3)生物识别数据共享存在隐私问题。需要能在隐私约束下适应新攻击的解决方案。
AI.method: 使用通用多模态大语言模型进行虹膜防伪检测：1)分析MLLM视觉编码器嵌入，发现预训练视觉变换器能自然聚类多种攻击类型；2)当聚类重叠时，使用包含人类显著性（受试者描述攻击指标）的结构化提示解决歧义；3)在224张虹膜图像数据集上测试，使用大学批准服务或本地部署模型。
AI.result: 1) Gemini 2.5 Pro结合专家提示优于专业CNN基线和人工检查员；2)本地可部署的Llama 3.2-Vision达到接近人工的性能水平；3)预训练视觉变换器能自然聚类多种攻击类型，无需专门训练。
AI.conclusion: 在机构隐私约束下可部署的MLLMs为虹膜防伪检测提供了可行路径，能够结合专家知识解决未知攻击检测问题，同时保护生物识别数据隐私。

title: Harm or Humor: A Multimodal, Multilingual Benchmark for Overt and Covert Harmful Humor
summary: Dark humor often relies on subtle cultural nuances and implicit cues that require contextual reasoning to interpret, posing safety challenges that current static benchmarks fail to capture. To address this, we introduce a novel multimodal, multilingual benchmark for detecting and understanding harmful and offensive humor. Our manually curated dataset comprises 3,000 texts and 6,000 images in English and Arabic, alongside 1,200 videos that span English, Arabic, and language-independent (universal) contexts. Unlike standard toxicity datasets, we enforce a strict annotation guideline: distinguishing \emph{Safe} jokes from \emph{Harmful} ones, with the latter further classified into \emph{Explicit} (overt) and \emph{Implicit} (Covert) categories to probe deep reasoning. We systematically evaluate state-of-the-art (SOTA) open and closed-source models across all modalities. Our findings reveal that closed-source models significantly outperform open-source ones, with a notable difference in performance between the English and Arabic languages in both, underscoring the critical need for culturally grounded, reasoning-aware safety alignment. \textcolor{red}{Warning: this paper contains example data that may be offensive, harmful, or biased.}

AI.tldr: 提出一个多模态、多语言的幽默有害性检测基准，包含文本、图像和视频数据，强调文化背景和隐含推理的重要性。
AI.motivation: 当前静态基准无法捕捉依赖文化细微差别和隐含线索的黑色幽默，存在安全挑战，需要新的评估方法。
AI.method: 构建包含3000文本、6000图像和1200视频的多模态多语言数据集，采用严格标注指南区分安全、显性有害和隐性有害幽默，系统评估SOTA模型。
AI.result: 闭源模型显著优于开源模型，英语和阿拉伯语性能存在明显差距，凸显需要基于文化的推理感知安全对齐。
AI.conclusion: 需要开发能够理解文化背景和隐含推理的幽默安全检测系统，当前模型在跨语言和多模态任务上仍有不足。

title: Variational Kernel Design for Internal Noise: Gaussian Chaos Noise, Representation Compatibility, and Reliable Deep Learning
summary: Internal noise in deep networks is usually inherited from heuristics such as dropout, hard masking, or additive perturbation. We ask two questions: what correlation geometry should internal noise have, and is the implemented perturbation compatible with the representations it acts on? We answer these questions through Variational Kernel Design (VKD), a framework in which a noise mechanism is specified by a law family, a correlation kernel, and an injection operator, and is derived from learning desiderata. In a solved spatial subfamily, a quadratic maximum-entropy principle over latent log-fields yields a Gaussian optimizer with precision given by the Dirichlet Laplacian, so the induced geometry is the Dirichlet Green kernel. Wick normalization then gives a canonical positive mean-one gate, Gaussian Chaos Noise (GCh). For the sample-wise gate used in practice, we prove exact Gaussian control of pairwise log-ratio deformation, margin-sensitive ranking stability, and an exact expected intrinsic roughness budget; hard binary masks instead induce singular or coherence-amplified distortions on positive coherent representations. On ImageNet and ImageNet-C, GCh consistently improves calibration and under shift also improves NLL at competitive accuracy.

AI.tldr: 提出Variational Kernel Design框架设计神经网络内部噪声，推导出Gaussian Chaos Noise(GCh)门控机制，相比传统dropout等噪声方法在ImageNet上提升校准性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度网络内部噪声（如dropout、硬掩码、加性扰动）通常基于启发式设计，缺乏理论指导。本文旨在回答两个关键问题：内部噪声应具有何种相关几何结构？实现的扰动是否与作用表示兼容？
AI.method: 提出Variational Kernel Design(VKD)框架，通过法律族、相关核和注入算子指定噪声机制。在空间子问题中，基于潜在对数场的二次最大熵原理得到Dirichlet拉普拉斯精度的高斯优化器，Wick归一化后得到Gaussian Chaos Noise(GCh)门控机制。
AI.result: 理论证明GCh能精确控制成对对数比变形、边缘敏感排序稳定性，并提供精确的期望内在粗糙度预算。在ImageNet和ImageNet-C上，GCh在保持竞争力的准确率下，持续改善校准性，在分布偏移下也改善负对数似然。
AI.conclusion: VKD框架为神经网络内部噪声设计提供理论指导，推导出的GCh门控机制相比传统硬二值掩码能避免对正相干表示的奇异或相干放大失真，在实践中有更好的校准和鲁棒性表现。

title: Patient4D: Temporally Consistent Patient Body Mesh Recovery from Monocular Operating Room Video
summary: Recovering a dense 3D body mesh from monocular video remains challenging under occlusion from draping and continuously moving camera viewpoints. This configuration arises in surgical augmented reality (AR), where an anesthetized patient lies under surgical draping while a surgeon's head-mounted camera continuously changes viewpoint. Existing human mesh recovery (HMR) methods are typically trained on upright, moving subjects captured from relatively stable cameras, leading to performance degradation under such conditions. To address this, we present Patient4D, a stationarity-constrained reconstruction pipeline that explicitly exploits the stationarity prior. The pipeline combines image-level foundation models for perception with lightweight geometric mechanisms that enforce temporal consistency across frames. Two key components enable robust reconstruction: Pose Locking, which anchors pose parameters using stable keyframes, and Rigid Fallback, which recovers meshes under severe occlusion through silhouette-guided rigid alignment. Together, these mechanisms stabilize predictions while remaining compatible with off-the-shelf HMR models. We evaluate Patient4D on 4,680 synthetic surgical sequences and three public HMR video benchmarks. Under surgical drape occlusion, Patient4D achieves a 0.75 mean IoU, reducing failure frames from 30.5% to 1.3% compared to the best baseline. Our findings demonstrate that exploiting stationarity priors can substantially improve monocular reconstruction in clinical AR scenarios.

AI.tldr: Patient4D：一种利用静止先验的4D人体网格重建方法，专门针对手术AR场景中患者被遮盖且相机移动的情况，通过姿态锁定和刚性回退机制提升重建鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 在手术增强现实（AR）场景中，麻醉患者被手术遮盖物遮挡，同时外科医生的头戴式相机不断改变视角，现有的人体网格恢复（HMR）方法在这种条件下性能下降，因为它们通常在直立、移动的主体和相对稳定的相机视角下训练。
AI.method: 提出Patient4D重建流程，结合图像级基础模型感知和轻量级几何机制来强制执行跨帧的时间一致性。关键组件包括：1）姿态锁定：使用稳定关键帧锚定姿态参数；2）刚性回退：通过轮廓引导的刚性对齐在严重遮挡下恢复网格。
AI.result: 在4,680个合成手术序列和三个公共HMR视频基准上评估。在手术遮盖物遮挡下，Patient4D达到0.75的平均IoU，将失败帧从30.5%减少到1.3%（相比最佳基线）。
AI.conclusion: 利用静止先验可以显著改善临床AR场景中的单目重建，Patient4D的机制稳定预测同时保持与现成HMR模型的兼容性。

title: CoVerRL: Breaking the Consensus Trap in Label-Free Reasoning via Generator-Verifier Co-Evolution
summary: Label-free reinforcement learning enables large language models to improve reasoning capabilities without ground-truth supervision, typically by treating majority-voted answers as pseudo-labels. However, we identify a critical failure mode: as training maximizes self-consistency, output diversity collapses, causing the model to confidently reinforce systematic errors that evade detection. We term this the consensus trap. To escape it, we propose CoVerRL, a framework where a single model alternates between generator and verifier roles, with each capability bootstrapping the other. Majority voting provides noisy but informative supervision for training the verifier, while the improving verifier progressively filters self-consistent errors from pseudo-labels. This co-evolution creates a virtuous cycle that maintains high reward accuracy throughout training. Experiments across Qwen and Llama model families demonstrate that CoVerRL outperforms label-free baselines by 4.7-5.9\% on mathematical reasoning benchmarks. Moreover, self-verification accuracy improves from around 55\% to over 85\%, confirming that both capabilities genuinely co-evolve.

AI.tldr: CoVerRL框架通过让单个模型在生成器和验证器角色间交替，避免无标签强化学习中的"共识陷阱"，实现生成和验证能力的协同进化。
AI.motivation: 现有无标签强化学习方法依赖多数投票作为伪标签，但存在"共识陷阱"问题：随着训练最大化自一致性，输出多样性崩溃，模型会自信地强化系统性错误。
AI.method: 提出CoVerRL框架，单个模型在生成器和验证器角色间交替。多数投票为验证器训练提供有噪声但有信息的监督，而改进的验证器逐步从伪标签中过滤自一致错误，形成良性循环。
AI.result: 在Qwen和Llama模型系列上的实验显示，CoVerRL在数学推理基准上比无标签基线提升4.7-5.9%。自验证准确率从约55%提升至85%以上，证实两种能力真正协同进化。
AI.conclusion: CoVerRL通过生成器和验证器的协同进化机制，成功避免了无标签强化学习中的共识陷阱，实现了更稳健的能力提升。

title: Efficient Exploration at Scale
summary: We develop an online learning algorithm that dramatically improves the data efficiency of reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF). Our algorithm incrementally updates reward and language models as choice data is received. The reward model is fit to the choice data, while the language model is updated by a variation of reinforce, with reinforcement signals provided by the reward model. Several features enable the efficiency gains: a small affirmative nudge added to each reinforcement signal, an epistemic neural network that models reward uncertainty, and information-directed exploration. With Gemma large language models (LLMs), our algorithm matches the performance of offline RLHF trained on 200K labels using fewer than 20K labels, representing more than a 10x gain in data efficiency. Extrapolating from our results, we expect our algorithm trained on 1M labels to match offline RLHF trained on 1B labels. This represents a 1,000x gain. To our knowledge, these are the first results to demonstrate that such large improvements are possible.

AI.tldr: 提出一种在线学习算法，将RLHF的数据效率提升10倍以上，仅用不到2万标签就能达到传统离线RLHF使用20万标签的效果
AI.motivation: 传统RLHF需要大量人工标注数据，数据效率低下，限制了其在资源有限场景的应用。需要开发更高效的学习算法来减少对标注数据的依赖。
AI.method: 开发在线学习算法，增量更新奖励模型和语言模型。奖励模型拟合选择数据，语言模型通过改进的REINFORCE算法更新，奖励模型提供强化信号。关键技术包括：强化信号添加小正向激励、建模奖励不确定性的认知神经网络、信息导向探索。
AI.result: 使用Gemma大语言模型，仅需不到2万标签就能达到传统离线RLHF使用20万标签的性能，数据效率提升10倍以上。预计使用100万标签就能达到传统方法10亿标签的效果，实现1000倍效率提升。
AI.conclusion: 该在线学习算法显著提升了RLHF的数据效率，首次证明如此大规模效率提升是可能的，为资源有限场景下的RLHF应用开辟了新途径。

title: Visual Product Search Benchmark
summary: Reliable product identification from images is a critical requirement in industrial and commercial applications, particularly in maintenance, procurement, and operational workflows where incorrect matches can lead to costly downstream failures. At the core of such systems lies the visual search component, which must retrieve and rank the exact object instance from large and continuously evolving catalogs under diverse imaging conditions. This report presents a structured benchmark of modern visual embedding models for instance-level image retrieval, with a focus on industrial applications. A curated set of open-source foundation embedding models, proprietary multi-modal embedding systems, and domain-specific vision-only models are evaluated under a unified image-to-image retrieval protocol. The benchmark includes curated datasets, which includes industrial datasets derived from production deployments in Manufacturing, Automotive, DIY, and Retail, as well as established public benchmarks. Evaluation is conducted without post-processing, isolating the retrieval capability of each model. The results provide insight into how well contemporary foundation and unified embedding models transfer to fine-grained instance retrieval tasks, and how they compare to models explicitly trained for industrial applications. By emphasizing realistic constraints, heterogeneous image conditions, and exact instance matching requirements, this benchmark aims to inform both practitioners and researchers about the strengths and limitations of current visual embedding approaches in production-level product identification systems. An interactive companion website presenting the benchmark results, evaluation details, and additional visualizations is available at https://benchmark.nyris.io.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个针对工业应用中实例级图像检索的视觉嵌入模型基准测试，评估了开源基础模型、专有多模态系统和领域特定模型在统一检索协议下的表现。
AI.motivation: 工业应用中可靠的产品识别至关重要，错误的匹配会导致昂贵的下游故障。需要评估现代视觉嵌入模型在实际工业场景中的表现，为从业者和研究者提供指导。
AI.method: 使用统一图像到图像检索协议，评估开源基础嵌入模型、专有多模态嵌入系统和领域特定视觉模型。基准测试包括从制造、汽车、DIY和零售等生产部署中提取的工业数据集以及公共基准，评估时不进行后处理以隔离检索能力。
AI.result: 基准测试结果揭示了当代基础模型和统一嵌入模型在细粒度实例检索任务中的迁移能力，以及与专门为工业应用训练的模型的比较表现。
AI.conclusion: 该基准测试通过强调实际约束、异构图像条件和精确实例匹配要求，为从业者和研究者提供了当前视觉嵌入方法在生产级产品识别系统中的优势和局限性信息。

title: Process Supervision for Chain-of-Thought Reasoning via Monte Carlo Net Information Gain
summary: Multi-step reasoning improves the capabilities of large language models (LLMs) but increases the risk of errors propagating through intermediate steps. Process reward models (PRMs) mitigate this by scoring each step individually, enabling fine-grained supervision and improved reliability. Existing methods for training PRMs rely on costly human annotations or computationally intensive automatic labeling. We propose a novel approach to automatically generate step-level labels using Information Theory. Our method estimates how each reasoning step affects the likelihood of the correct answer, providing a signal of step quality. Importantly, it reduces computational complexity to $\mathcal{O}(N)$, improving over the previous $\mathcal{O}(N \log N)$ methods. We demonstrate that these labels enable effective chain-of-thought selection in best-of-$K$ evaluation settings across diverse reasoning benchmarks, including mathematics, Python programming, SQL, and scientific question answering. This work enables scalable and efficient supervision of LLM reasoning, particularly for tasks where error propagation is critical.

AI.tldr: 提出基于信息论自动生成推理步骤标签的新方法，降低计算复杂度至O(N)，用于改进大语言模型的多步推理可靠性
AI.motivation: 多步推理能提升大语言模型能力，但会增加错误传播风险。现有过程奖励模型训练方法依赖昂贵的人工标注或计算密集的自动标注，需要更高效、可扩展的解决方案。
AI.method: 利用信息论自动生成步骤级标签，估计每个推理步骤如何影响正确答案的可能性，提供步骤质量信号。将计算复杂度从O(N log N)降低到O(N)。
AI.result: 该方法在多种推理基准测试（数学、Python编程、SQL、科学问答）中有效支持链式思维选择，在最佳K评估设置中表现良好。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作实现了对大语言模型推理的可扩展和高效监督，特别适用于错误传播关键的任务，为自动评估和改进推理过程提供了新途径。

title: SCALE:Scalable Conditional Atlas-Level Endpoint transport for virtual cell perturbation prediction
summary: Virtual cell models aim to enable in silico experimentation by predicting how cells respond to genetic, chemical, or cytokine perturbations from single-cell measurements. In practice, however, large-scale perturbation prediction remains constrained by three coupled bottlenecks: inefficient training and inference pipelines, unstable modeling in high-dimensional sparse expression space, and evaluation protocols that overemphasize reconstruction-like accuracy while underestimating biological fidelity. In this work we present a specialized large-scale foundation model SCALE for virtual cell perturbation prediction that addresses the above limitations jointly. First, we build a BioNeMo-based training and inference framework that substantially improves data throughput, distributed scalability, and deployment efficiency, yielding 12.51* speedup on pretrain and 1.29* on inference over the prior SOTA pipeline under matched system settings. Second, we formulate perturbation prediction as conditional transport and implement it with a set-aware flow architecture that couples LLaMA-based cellular encoding with endpoint-oriented supervision. This design yields more stable training and stronger recovery of perturbation effects. Third, we evaluate the model on Tahoe-100M using a rigorous cell-level protocol centered on biologically meaningful metrics rather than reconstruction alone. On this benchmark, our model improves PDCorr by 12.02% and DE Overlap by 10.66% over STATE. Together, these results suggest that advancing virtual cells requires not only better generative objectives, but also the co-design of scalable infrastructure, stable transport modeling, and biologically faithful evaluation.

AI.tldr: SCALE是一个用于虚拟细胞扰动预测的大规模基础模型，通过改进训练推理框架、采用条件传输建模和生物导向评估，显著提升了预测性能和效率。
AI.motivation: 虚拟细胞模型旨在通过单细胞测量预测细胞对遗传、化学或细胞因子扰动的响应，但面临三个瓶颈：低效的训练推理流程、高维稀疏表达空间中的建模不稳定、以及过度强调重建精度而忽视生物保真度的评估协议。
AI.method: 1) 构建基于BioNeMo的训练推理框架，提升数据吞吐、分布式扩展和部署效率；2) 将扰动预测建模为条件传输问题，采用基于LLaMA的细胞编码和端点导向监督的集合感知流架构；3) 在Tahoe-100M数据集上使用以生物意义指标为中心的严格细胞级评估协议。
AI.result: 在匹配系统设置下，预训练速度提升12.51倍，推理速度提升1.29倍；在Tahoe-100M基准测试中，PDCorr提升12.02%，DE Overlap提升10.66%，优于现有最佳方法。
AI.conclusion: 推进虚拟细胞模型不仅需要更好的生成目标，还需要可扩展基础设施、稳定传输建模和生物保真评估的协同设计，SCALE模型为此提供了有效解决方案。

title: SA-CycleGAN-2.5D: Self-Attention CycleGAN with Tri-Planar Context for Multi-Site MRI Harmonization
comment: 12 pages, 5 figures, 5 tables. Submitted to MICCAI 2026
summary:
Multi-site neuroimaging analysis is fundamentally confounded by scanner-induced covariate shifts, where the marginal distribution of voxel intensities $P(\mathbf{x})$ varies non-linearly across acquisition protocols while the conditional anatomy $P(\mathbf{y}|\mathbf{x})$ remains constant. This is particularly detrimental to radiomic reproducibility, where acquisition variance often exceeds biological pathology variance. Existing statistical harmonization methods (e.g., ComBat) operate in feature space, precluding spatial downstream tasks, while standard deep learning approaches are theoretically bounded by local effective receptive fields (ERF), failing to model the global intensity correlations characteristic of field-strength bias.
  We propose SA-CycleGAN-2.5D, a domain adaptation framework motivated by the $HΔH$-divergence bound of Ben-David et al., integrating three architectural innovations: (1) A 2.5D tri-planar manifold injection preserving through-plane gradients $\nabla_z$ at $O(HW)$ complexity; (2) A U-ResNet generator with dense voxel-to-voxel self-attention, surpassing the $O(\sqrt{L})$ receptive field limit of CNNs to model global scanner field biases; and (3) A spectrally-normalized discriminator constraining the Lipschitz constant ($K_D \le 1$) for stable adversarial optimization. Evaluated on 654 glioma patients across two institutional domains (BraTS and UPenn-GBM), our method reduces Maximum Mean Discrepancy (MMD) by 99.1% ($1.729 \to 0.015$) and degrades domain classifier accuracy to near-chance (59.7%). Ablation confirms that global attention is statistically essential (Cohen's $d = 1.32$, $p < 0.001$) for the harder heterogeneous-to-homogeneous translation direction. By bridging 2D efficiency and 3D consistency, our framework yields voxel-level harmonized images that preserve tumor pathophysiology, enabling reproducible multi-center radiomic analysis.

AI.tldr: 提出SA-CycleGAN-2.5D框架，通过2.5D三平面流形注入、全局自注意力生成器和谱归一化判别器，解决多站点神经影像分析中的扫描仪引起的协变量偏移问题，显著降低域间差异并保持肿瘤病理生理学特征。
AI.motivation: 多站点神经影像分析面临扫描仪引起的协变量偏移问题，即体素强度的边际分布随采集协议非线性变化，而解剖条件分布保持不变。现有统计协调方法在特征空间操作，无法支持空间下游任务；标准深度学习方法受限于局部有效感受野，无法建模全局强度相关性。
AI.method: 提出SA-CycleGAN-2.5D域适应框架：1) 2.5D三平面流形注入，以O(HW)复杂度保持平面间梯度；2) U-ResNet生成器结合密集体素到体素自注意力，超越CNN的O(√L)感受野限制；3) 谱归一化判别器约束Lipschitz常数(K_D≤1)实现稳定对抗优化。
AI.result: 在654名胶质瘤患者（BraTS和UPenn-GBM两个机构域）上评估，最大均值差异(MMD)降低99.1%(1.729→0.015)，域分类器准确率降至接近随机水平(59.7%)。消融实验证实全局注意力对异质到同质转换方向具有统计显著性(Cohen's d=1.32, p<0.001)。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合2D效率和3D一致性，该框架生成保持肿瘤病理生理学的体素级协调图像，支持可重复的多中心影像组学分析，有效解决扫描仪引起的域偏移问题。

title: Text-to-Stage: Spatial Layouts from Long-form Narratives
summary: In this work, we probe the ability of a language model to demonstrate spatial reasoning from unstructured text, mimicking human capabilities and automating a process that benefits many downstream media applications. Concretely, we study the narrative-to-play task: inferring stage-play layouts (scenes, speaker positions, movements, and room types) from text that lacks explicit spatial, positional, or relational cues. We then introduce a dramaturgy-inspired deterministic evaluation suite and, finally, a training and inference recipe that combines rejection SFT using Best-of-N sampling with RL from verifiable rewards via GRPO. Experiments on a text-only corpus of classical English literature demonstrate improvements over vanilla models across multiple metrics (character attribution, spatial plausibility, and movement economy), as well as alignment with an LLM-as-a-judge and subjective human preferences.

AI.tldr: 研究语言模型从无结构化文本进行空间推理的能力，提出叙事到舞台布局的任务，通过结合拒绝式监督微调和强化学习的方法提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 探索语言模型模仿人类空间推理能力，从缺乏明确空间、位置或关系线索的文本中推断舞台布局，以自动化对下游媒体应用有益的过程。
AI.method: 引入戏剧学启发的确定性评估套件，提出结合拒绝式监督微调（使用Best-of-N采样）和基于可验证奖励的强化学习（通过GRPO）的训练和推理方案。
AI.result: 在古典英语文学纯文本语料上的实验表明，相比基础模型在多个指标（角色归属、空间合理性、移动经济性）上有改进，并与LLM作为评判者和主观人类偏好保持一致。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了语言模型从无结构化文本进行空间推理的能力，为自动化舞台布局推断提供了可行方案。

title: Cohomological Obstructions to Global Counterfactuals: A Sheaf-Theoretic Foundation for Generative Causal Models
summary: Current continuous generative models (e.g., Diffusion Models, Flow Matching) implicitly assume that locally consistent causal mechanisms naturally yield globally coherent counterfactuals. In this paper, we prove that this assumption fails fundamentally when the causal graph exhibits non-trivial homology (e.g., structural conflicts or hidden confounders). We formalize structural causal models as cellular sheaves over Wasserstein spaces, providing a strict algebraic topological definition of cohomological obstructions in measure spaces. To ensure computational tractability and avoid deterministic singularities (which we define as manifold tearing), we introduce entropic regularization and derive the Entropic Wasserstein Causal Sheaf Laplacian, a novel system of coupled non-linear Fokker-Planck equations. Crucially, we prove an entropic pullback lemma for the first variation of pushforward measures. By integrating this with the Implicit Function Theorem (IFT) on Sinkhorn optimality conditions, we establish a direct algorithmic bridge to automatic differentiation (VJP), achieving O(1)-memory reverse-mode gradients strictly independent of the iteration horizon. Empirically, our framework successfully leverages thermodynamic noise to navigate topological barriers ("entropic tunneling") in high-dimensional scRNA-seq counterfactuals. Finally, we invert this theoretical framework to introduce the Topological Causal Score, demonstrating that our Sheaf Laplacian acts as a highly sensitive algebraic detector for topology-aware causal discovery.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种基于代数拓扑的因果生成模型框架，通过引入熵正则化和Wasserstein空间上的层结构，解决了传统连续生成模型在非平凡同调因果图中的全局一致性失败问题。
AI.motivation: 当前连续生成模型（如扩散模型、流匹配）隐含假设局部一致的因果机制能自然产生全局一致的因果推断。然而，当因果图具有非平凡同调（如结构冲突或隐藏混杂因子）时，这一假设会根本性失败，需要新的理论框架来处理拓扑障碍。
AI.method: 1. 将结构因果模型形式化为Wasserstein空间上的胞腔层；2. 引入熵正则化避免确定性奇点（流形撕裂）；3. 推导熵正则化Wasserstein因果层拉普拉斯算子（耦合非线性Fokker-Planck方程组）；4. 证明推前测度一阶变分的熵拉回引理；5. 结合隐函数定理和Sinkhorn最优条件，建立与自动微分的直接算法桥梁。
AI.result: 1. 实现了O(1)-内存的反向模式梯度，严格独立于迭代时域；2. 成功利用热力学噪声导航高维scRNA-seq因果推断中的拓扑障碍（"熵隧穿"）；3. 提出了拓扑因果评分，证明层拉普拉斯算子可作为拓扑感知因果发现的高度敏感代数检测器。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为具有复杂拓扑结构的因果图提供了严格的代数拓扑框架，通过熵正则化Wasserstein层理论解决了传统生成模型的全局一致性限制，并建立了与自动微分的实用算法连接，为高维生物数据的因果推断开辟了新途径。

title: Adaptive Anchor Policies for Efficient 4D Gaussian Streaming
summary: Dynamic scene reconstruction with Gaussian Splatting has enabled efficient streaming for real-time rendering and free-viewpoint video. However, most pipelines rely on fixed anchor selection such as Farthest Point Sampling (FPS), typically using 8,192 anchors regardless of scene complexity, which over-allocates computation under strict budgets. We propose Efficient Gaussian Streaming (EGS), a plug-in, budget-aware anchor sampler that replaces FPS with a reinforcement-learned policy while keeping the Gaussian streaming reconstruction backbone unchanged. The policy jointly selects an anchor budget and a subset of informative anchors under discrete constraints, balancing reconstruction quality and runtime using spatial features of the Gaussian representation. We evaluate EGS in two settings: fast rendering, which prioritizes runtime efficiency, and high-quality refinement, which enables additional optimization. Experiments on dynamic multi-view datasets show consistent improvements in the quality--efficiency trade-off over FPS sampling. On unseen data, in fast rendering at 256 anchors ($32\times$ fewer than 8,192), EGS improves PSNR by $+0.52$--$0.61$\,dB while running $1.29$--$1.35\times$ faster than IGS@8192 (N3DV and MeetingRoom). In high-quality refinement, EGS remains competitive with the full-anchor baseline at substantially lower anchor budgets. \emph{Code and pretrained checkpoints will be released upon acceptance.} \keywords{4D Gaussian Splatting \and 4D Gaussian Streaming \and Reinforcement Learning}

AI.tldr: EGS提出了一种基于强化学习的预算感知锚点采样器，用于动态场景高斯溅射重建，在保持重建质量的同时显著减少计算开销。
AI.motivation: 现有动态场景重建方法使用固定锚点选择（如FPS），通常使用8192个锚点而不考虑场景复杂度，在严格计算预算下过度分配计算资源。
AI.method: 提出EGS（高效高斯流式处理），一个基于强化学习的插件式锚点采样器，联合选择锚点预算和信息丰富的锚点子集，利用高斯表示的空间特征平衡重建质量和运行时间。
AI.result: 在动态多视角数据集上，EGS在质量-效率权衡方面优于FPS采样。在快速渲染模式下（256锚点，比8192少32倍），PSNR提升0.52-0.61dB，运行速度比IGS@8192快1.29-1.35倍。
AI.conclusion: EGS通过强化学习策略实现了预算感知的锚点选择，在显著减少锚点预算的同时保持重建质量，为动态高斯溅射重建提供了更高效的计算资源分配方案。

title: Event-Centric Human Value Understanding in News-Domain Texts: An Actor-Conditioned, Multi-Granularity Benchmark
