We train our model with a supervised contrastive loss that brings embeddings of material-consistent parts closer while separating those of different materials; therefore, part grouping can be achieved by retrieving embeddings that are close to the embedding of the selected part. To benchmark this task, we introduce a curated dataset of 100 shapes with 241 part-level queries. We verify the effectiveness of our method through extensive experiments and demonstrate its practical value in an interactive material assignment application.

AI.tldr: 提出Material Magic Wand工具，通过材质感知嵌入自动识别3D网格中共享相同材质的重复部件，简化材质分配工作流程。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中的3D形状（如松果鳞片、建筑窗户）常包含几何变化但材质相同的重复结构，手动逐个选择这些部件进行材质分配既繁琐又耗时。
AI.method: 提出材质感知部件编码器，为每个3D部件生成同时考虑局部几何和全局上下文的嵌入表示，使用监督对比损失训练模型，使相同材质的部件嵌入更接近，不同材质的嵌入更分离。
AI.result: 构建了包含100个形状和241个部件级查询的基准数据集，通过大量实验验证了方法的有效性，并在交互式材质分配应用中展示了实用价值。
AI.conclusion: Material Magic Wand工具能够有效识别3D网格中共享材质的部件组，显著简化了材质分配工作流程，为3D艺术家提供了实用的自动化工具。

title: Identifying Latent Actions and Dynamics from Offline Data via Demonstrator Diversity
summary: Can latent actions and environment dynamics be recovered from offline trajectories when actions are never observed? We study this question in a setting where trajectories are action-free but tagged with demonstrator identity. We assume that each demonstrator follows a distinct policy, while the environment dynamics are shared across demonstrators and identity affects the next observation only through the chosen action. Under these assumptions, the conditional next-observation distribution $p(o_{t+1}\mid o_t,e)$ is a mixture of latent action-conditioned transition kernels with demonstrator-specific mixing weights. We show that this induces, for each state, a column-stochastic nonnegative matrix factorization of the observable conditional distribution. Using sufficiently scattered policy diversity and rank conditions, we prove that the latent transitions and demonstrator policies are identifiable up to permutation of the latent action labels. We extend the result to continuous observation spaces via a Gram-determinant minimum-volume criterion, and show that continuity of the transition map over a connected state space upgrades local permutation ambiguities to a single global permutation. A small amount of labeled action data then suffices to fix this final ambiguity. These results establish demonstrator diversity as a principled source of identifiability for learning latent actions and dynamics from offline RL data.

AI.tldr: 从无动作标签的离线轨迹中，利用演示者多样性可以识别潜在动作和环境动态
AI.motivation: 研究在离线轨迹中从未观察到动作的情况下，是否能够恢复潜在动作和环境动态。当轨迹没有动作标签但带有演示者身份时，探索如何利用演示者多样性来实现可识别性。
AI.method: 假设每个演示者遵循不同的策略，环境动态在演示者间共享。将条件下一观测分布建模为潜在动作条件转移核的混合，形成列随机非负矩阵分解。利用充分分散的策略多样性和秩条件证明可识别性，并扩展到连续观测空间。
AI.result: 证明在适当条件下，潜在转移和演示者策略在潜在动作标签的排列意义下是可识别的。通过Gram行列式最小体积准则扩展到连续观测空间，少量标记动作数据即可解决最终排列模糊性。
AI.conclusion: 演示者多样性为从离线RL数据中学习潜在动作和动态提供了原则性的可识别性来源，为无动作标签的离线强化学习提供了理论基础。

title: Understanding and Defending VLM Jailbreaks via Jailbreak-Related Representation Shift
summary: Large vision-language models (VLMs) often exhibit weakened safety alignment with the integration of the visual modality. Even when text prompts contain explicit harmful intent, adding an image can substantially increase jailbreak success rates. In this paper, we observe that VLMs can clearly distinguish benign inputs from harmful ones in their representation space. Moreover, even among harmful inputs, jailbreak samples form a distinct internal state that is separable from refusal samples. These observations suggest that jailbreaks do not arise from a failure to recognize harmful intent. Instead, the visual modality shifts representations toward a specific jailbreak state, thereby leading to a failure to trigger refusal. To quantify this transition, we identify a jailbreak direction and define the jailbreak-related shift as the component of the image-induced representation shift along this direction. Our analysis shows that the jailbreak-related shift reliably characterizes jailbreak behavior, providing a unified explanation for diverse jailbreak scenarios. Finally, we propose a defense method that enhances VLM safety by removing the jailbreak-related shift (JRS-Rem) at inference time. Experiments show that JRS-Rem provides strong defense across multiple scenarios while preserving performance on benign tasks.

AI.tldr: 该研究发现视觉语言模型（VLMs）的安全对齐在视觉模态整合后减弱，图像能显著提高越狱成功率。研究识别出越狱方向，并提出通过移除越狱相关偏移（JRS-Rem）的防御方法。
AI.motivation: 大型视觉语言模型在整合视觉模态后安全对齐能力减弱，即使文本提示包含明确有害意图，添加图像也能大幅提高越狱成功率。需要理解这种现象的内在机制并开发有效的防御方法。
AI.method: 研究发现VLMs在表示空间中能清楚区分良性输入和有害输入，且越狱样本形成与拒绝样本可分离的独特内部状态。研究识别出越狱方向，定义越狱相关偏移为图像诱导表示偏移沿该方向的分量。提出JRS-Rem防御方法，在推理时移除越狱相关偏移。
AI.result: 越狱相关偏移能可靠地表征越狱行为，为不同越狱场景提供统一解释。JRS-Rem防御方法在多个场景中提供强大防御，同时在良性任务上保持性能。
AI.conclusion: 视觉模态将表示向特定越狱状态偏移，导致未能触发拒绝机制。通过移除越狱相关偏移的防御方法能有效增强VLM安全性，同时保持正常功能。

title: One-Step Sampler for Boltzmann Distributions via Drifting
summary: We present a drifting-based framework for amortized sampling of Boltzmann distributions defined by energy functions. The method trains a one-step neural generator by projecting samples along a Gaussian-smoothed score field from the current model distribution toward the target Boltzmann distribution. For targets specified only up to an unknown normalization constant, we derive a practical target-side drift from a smoothed energy and use two estimators: a local importance-sampling mean-shift estimator and a second-order curvature-corrected approximation. Combined with a mini-batch Gaussian mean-shift estimate of the sampler-side smoothed score, this yields a simple stop-gradient objective for stable one-step training. On a four-mode Gaussian-mixture Boltzmann target, our sampler achieves mean error $0.0754$, covariance error $0.0425$, and RBF MMD $0.0020$. Additional double-well and banana targets show that the same formulation also handles nonconvex and curved low-energy geometries. Overall, the results support drifting as an effective way to amortize iterative sampling from Boltzmann distributions into a single forward pass at test time.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于漂移的摊销采样框架，通过训练一步神经网络生成器，将样本沿高斯平滑的得分场从当前模型分布投影到目标玻尔兹曼分布
AI.motivation: 玻尔兹曼分布（特别是归一化常数未知的情况）的采样在统计物理和机器学习中很重要，传统迭代采样方法计算成本高，需要开发摊销采样方法将迭代采样转化为单步前向传播
AI.method: 训练一步神经生成器，使用高斯平滑得分场将样本从当前模型分布投影到目标分布。对于归一化常数未知的目标，推导出基于平滑能量的实用目标侧漂移，使用两种估计器：局部重要性采样均值漂移估计器和二阶曲率校正近似。结合采样器侧平滑得分的mini-batch高斯均值漂移估计，得到简单的stop-gradient目标用于稳定的一步训练
AI.result: 在四模态高斯混合玻尔兹曼目标上，采样器达到均值误差0.0754、协方差误差0.0425和RBF MMD 0.0020。在双阱和香蕉形目标上的实验表明，同一方法也能处理非凸和弯曲的低能量几何结构
AI.conclusion: 漂移是摊销玻尔兹曼分布迭代采样的有效方法，可将测试时的采样转化为单步前向传播，为玻尔兹曼分布采样提供了高效实用的解决方案

title: Shot-Aware Frame Sampling for Video Understanding
summary: Video frame sampling is essential for efficient long-video understanding with Vision-Language Models (VLMs), since dense inputs are costly and often exceed context limits. Yet when only a small number of frames can be retained, existing samplers often fail to balance broad video coverage with brief but critical events, which can lead to unreliable downstream predictions. To address this issue, we present InfoShot, a task-agnostic, shot-aware frame sampler for long-video understanding. InfoShot first partitions a video into semantically consistent shots, and then selects two complementary keyframes from each shot: one to represent the main content and one to capture unusual within-shot changes. This design is guided by an information-theoretic objective that encourages the sampled set to retain high information about both shot structure and sparse within-shot deviations. In this way, it improves the chance of preserving both overall video context and short decision-critical moments without requiring any retraining. To better evaluate such short-lived events, we further introduce SynFlash, a synthetic benchmark with controllable sub-second anomaly patterns and frame-level ground truth, and we also evaluate InfoShot on existing anomaly datasets and general video understanding tasks. Experiments show that InfoShot improves anomaly hit rate and downstream Video-QA accuracy under frame number constraints, while matching or outperforming strong baselines on standard video understanding benchmarks.

AI.tldr: InfoShot：一种面向长视频理解的任务无关、镜头感知帧采样方法，通过信息论目标选择互补关键帧，平衡视频覆盖与关键事件捕捉
AI.motivation: 现有帧采样方法在只能保留少量帧时，难以平衡广泛的视频覆盖和短暂但关键的事件，导致下游预测不可靠
AI.method: 1) 将视频分割成语义一致的镜头；2) 从每个镜头中选择两个互补关键帧：一个代表主要内容，一个捕捉镜头内的异常变化；3) 基于信息论目标优化采样集
AI.result: 在帧数限制下，InfoShot提高了异常检测命中率和下游视频问答准确性，同时在标准视频理解基准测试中匹配或优于强基线方法
AI.conclusion: InfoShot通过镜头感知的帧采样策略，有效平衡了长视频的整体上下文和决策关键时刻，无需重新训练即可提升视频理解性能

title: End-to-end data-driven prediction of urban airflow and pollutant dispersion
summary: Climate change and the rapid growth of urban populations are intensifying environmental stresses within cities, making the behavior of urban atmospheric flows a critical factor in public health, energy use, and overall livability. This study targets to develop fast and accurate models of urban pollutant dispersion to support decision-makers, enabling them to implement mitigation measures in a timely and cost-effective manner. To reach this goal, an end-to-end data-driven approach is proposed to model and predict the airflow and pollutant dispersion in a street canyon in skimming flow regime. A series of time-resolved snapshots obtained from large eddy simulation (LES) serves as the database. The proposed framework is based on four fundamental steps. Firstly, a reduced basis is obtained by spectral proper orthogonal decomposition (SPOD) of the database. The projection of the time series snapshot data onto the SPOD modes (time-domain approach) provides the temporal coefficients of the dynamics. Secondly, a nonlinear compression of the temporal coefficients is performed by autoencoder to reduce further the dimensionality of the problem. Thirdly, a reduced-order model (ROM) is learned in the latent space using Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) netowrks. Finally, the pollutant dispersion is estimated from the predicted velocity field through convolutional neural network that maps both fields. The results demonstrate the efficacy of the model in predicting the instantaneous as well as statistically stationary fields over long time horizon.

AI.tldr: 提出一个端到端数据驱动框架，结合SPOD降维、自编码器压缩、LSTM时序建模和CNN映射，用于快速准确预测街道峡谷中的气流和污染物扩散。
AI.motivation: 气候变化和城市人口快速增长加剧了城市环境压力，城市大气流动行为对公共卫生、能源使用和宜居性至关重要。需要开发快速准确的污染物扩散模型，以支持决策者及时有效地实施缓解措施。
AI.method: 1) 使用谱本征正交分解(SPOD)从大涡模拟(LES)数据库中获取降维基；2) 用自编码器对时间系数进行非线性压缩；3) 在潜空间使用长短期记忆(LSTM)网络学习降阶模型(ROM)；4) 通过卷积神经网络(CNN)从预测的速度场映射到污染物扩散场。
AI.result: 模型在预测瞬时场和统计稳态场方面表现出高效性，能够实现长时间范围内的准确预测。
AI.conclusion: 该端到端数据驱动框架为城市污染物扩散建模提供了一种快速准确的解决方案，有助于支持城市环境管理和决策制定。

title: Stereo World Model: Camera-Guided Stereo Video Generation
summary: We present StereoWorld, a camera-conditioned stereo world model that jointly learns appearance and binocular geometry for end-to-end stereo video generation.Unlike monocular RGB or RGBD approaches, StereoWorld operates exclusively within the RGB modality, while simultaneously grounding geometry directly from disparity. To efficiently achieve consistent stereo generation, our approach introduces two key designs: (1) a unified camera-frame RoPE that augments latent tokens with camera-aware rotary positional encoding, enabling relative, view- and time-consistent conditioning while preserving pretrained video priors via a stable attention initialization; and (2) a stereo-aware attention decomposition that factors full 4D attention into 3D intra-view attention plus horizontal row attention, leveraging the epipolar prior to capture disparity-aligned correspondences with substantially lower compute. Across benchmarks, StereoWorld improves stereo consistency, disparity accuracy, and camera-motion fidelity over strong monocular-then-convert pipelines, achieving more than 3x faster generation with an additional 5% gain in viewpoint consistency. Beyond benchmarks, StereoWorld enables end-to-end binocular VR rendering without depth estimation or inpainting, enhances embodied policy learning through metric-scale depth grounding, and is compatible with long-video distillation for extended interactive stereo synthesis.

AI.tldr: StereoWorld是一个相机条件化的立体世界模型，能够端到端生成立体视频，同时学习外观和双目几何，无需深度估计或修复，相比单目转换方法在立体一致性、视差精度和相机运动保真度方面表现更优。
AI.motivation: 现有方法要么基于单目RGB或RGBD，要么需要将单目生成结果转换为立体格式，这会导致立体不一致、视差不准确和相机运动保真度低的问题。需要一种能够直接在RGB模态中学习双目几何的端到端立体视频生成方法。
AI.method: 1. 统一的相机帧RoPE：通过相机感知的旋转位置编码增强潜在标记，实现相对、视图和时间一致的相机条件化，同时通过稳定的注意力初始化保留预训练视频先验。2. 立体感知注意力分解：将完整的4D注意力分解为3D视图内注意力加水平行注意力，利用极线先验以更低的计算成本捕捉视差对齐的对应关系。
AI.result: 在基准测试中，StereoWorld相比强大的单目转换流程，在立体一致性、视差精度和相机运动保真度方面都有提升，生成速度提高3倍以上，视角一致性额外提升5%。
AI.conclusion: StereoWorld实现了无需深度估计或修复的端到端双目VR渲染，通过度量尺度深度接地增强了具身策略学习，并且兼容长视频蒸馏以实现扩展的交互式立体合成。

title: AdaMuS: Adaptive Multi-view Sparsity Learning for Dimensionally Unbalanced Data
comment: 15 pages. Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Image Processing
summary: Multi-view learning primarily aims to fuse multiple features to describe data comprehensively. Most prior studies implicitly assume that different views share similar dimensions. In practice, however, severe dimensional disparities often exist among different views, leading to the unbalanced multi-view learning issue. For example, in emotion recognition tasks, video frames often reach dimensions of $10^6$, while physiological signals comprise only $10^1$ dimensions. Existing methods typically face two main challenges for this problem: (1) They often bias towards high-dimensional data, overlooking the low-dimensional views. (2) They struggle to effectively align representations under extreme dimensional imbalance, which introduces severe redundancy into the low-dimensional ones. To address these issues, we propose the Adaptive Multi-view Sparsity Learning (AdaMuS) framework. First, to prevent ignoring the information of low-dimensional views, we construct view-specific encoders to map them into a unified dimensional space. Given that mapping low-dimensional data to a high-dimensional space often causes severe overfitting, we design a parameter-free pruning method to adaptively remove redundant parameters in the encoders. Furthermore, we propose a sparse fusion paradigm that flexibly suppresses redundant dimensions and effectively aligns each view. Additionally, to learn representations with stronger generalization, we propose a self-supervised learning paradigm that obtains supervision information by constructing similarity graphs. Extensive evaluations on a synthetic toy dataset and seven real-world benchmarks demonstrate that AdaMuS consistently achieves superior performance and exhibits strong generalization across both classification and semantic segmentation tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出AdaMuS框架解决多视图学习中极端维度不平衡问题，通过参数无关剪枝和稀疏融合有效对齐不同维度视图。
AI.motivation: 实际应用中不同视图常存在严重维度差异（如视频帧10^6维vs生理信号10^1维），现有方法偏向高维数据且难以有效对齐表示，导致低维视图信息被忽视和冗余问题。
AI.method: 1) 构建视图特定编码器将不同维度映射到统一空间；2) 设计参数无关剪枝方法自适应移除编码器冗余参数；3) 提出稀疏融合范式抑制冗余维度并有效对齐视图；4) 引入自监督学习范式通过构建相似图获取监督信息。
AI.result: 在合成玩具数据集和7个真实基准测试上评估，AdaMuS在分类和语义分割任务中均取得优越性能，表现出强泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: AdaMuS框架能有效解决极端维度不平衡的多视图学习问题，防止忽略低维视图信息，减少冗余，提升表示对齐和泛化性能。

title: VisionNVS: Self-Supervised Inpainting for Novel View Synthesis under the Virtual-Shift Paradigm
summary: A fundamental bottleneck in Novel View Synthesis (NVS) for autonomous driving is the inherent supervision gap on novel trajectories: models are tasked with synthesizing unseen views during inference, yet lack ground truth images for these shifted poses during training. In this paper, we propose VisionNVS, a camera-only framework that fundamentally reformulates view synthesis from an ill-posed extrapolation problem into a self-supervised inpainting task. By introducing a ``Virtual-Shift'' strategy, we use monocular depth proxies to simulate occlusion patterns and map them onto the original view. This paradigm shift allows the use of raw, recorded images as pixel-perfect supervision, effectively eliminating the domain gap inherent in previous approaches. Furthermore, we address spatial consistency through a Pseudo-3D Seam Synthesis strategy, which integrates visual data from adjacent cameras during training to explicitly model real-world photometric discrepancies and calibration errors. Experiments demonstrate that VisionNVS achieves superior geometric fidelity and visual quality compared to LiDAR-dependent baselines, offering a robust solution for scalable driving simulation.

AI.tldr: VisionNVS将自动驾驶中的新视角合成从外推问题重构为自监督修复任务，通过虚拟位移策略和伪3D接缝合成实现仅使用相机的高质量视图合成。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶新视角合成存在监督鸿沟：模型需要在推理时合成未见过的视角，但训练时缺乏这些偏移姿态的真实图像作为监督信号。
AI.method: 1. 提出虚拟位移策略：使用单目深度代理模拟遮挡模式并映射到原始视图，将视图合成重构为自监督修复任务；2. 伪3D接缝合成策略：整合相邻相机视觉数据，显式建模真实世界光度差异和标定误差。
AI.result: VisionNVS相比依赖激光雷达的基线方法，在几何保真度和视觉质量上表现更优，为可扩展的驾驶模拟提供了鲁棒解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 通过将视图合成重构为自监督修复任务，VisionNVS消除了传统方法中的领域鸿沟，仅使用相机数据就能实现高质量的新视角合成，为自动驾驶模拟提供了更可扩展的解决方案。

title: UniSAFE: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Safety Evaluation of Unified Multimodal Models
comment: Equal contribution by first three authors, 55 pages
summary: Unified Multimodal Models (UMMs) offer powerful cross-modality capabilities but introduce new safety risks not observed in single-task models. Despite their emergence, existing safety benchmarks remain fragmented across tasks and modalities, limiting the comprehensive evaluation of complex system-level vulnerabilities. To address this gap, we introduce UniSAFE, the first comprehensive benchmark for system-level safety evaluation of UMMs across 7 I/O modality combinations, spanning conventional tasks and novel multimodal-context image generation settings. UniSAFE is built with a shared-target design that projects common risk scenarios across task-specific I/O configurations, enabling controlled cross-task comparisons of safety failures. Comprising 6,802 curated instances, we use UniSAFE to evaluate 15 state-of-the-art UMMs, both proprietary and open-source. Our results reveal critical vulnerabilities across current UMMs, including elevated safety violations in multi-image composition and multi-turn settings, with image-output tasks consistently more vulnerable than text-output tasks. These findings highlight the need for stronger system-level safety alignment for UMMs. Our code and data are publicly available at https://github.com/segyulee/UniSAFE

AI.tldr: UniSAFE是首个针对统一多模态模型的系统级安全评估基准，涵盖7种I/O模态组合，揭示当前UMMs在安全对齐方面的关键漏洞
AI.motivation: 统一多模态模型虽然具有强大的跨模态能力，但引入了单任务模型未观察到的安全风险。现有安全基准在任务和模态上碎片化，无法全面评估复杂的系统级漏洞
AI.method: 构建UniSAFE基准，采用共享目标设计，将常见风险场景映射到任务特定的I/O配置中，包含6,802个精心策划的实例，涵盖7种I/O模态组合，包括传统任务和新型多模态上下文图像生成设置
AI.result: 评估15个最先进的UMMs（包括专有和开源模型），发现关键漏洞：多图像组合和多轮设置中安全违规率升高，图像输出任务比文本输出任务更易受攻击
AI.conclusion: 当前UMMs存在显著的系统级安全漏洞，需要更强的安全对齐措施。UniSAFE为全面评估多模态模型安全提供了重要工具

title: Complementary Reinforcement Learning
summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has emerged as a powerful paradigm for training LLM-based agents, yet remains limited by low sample efficiency, stemming not only from sparse outcome feedback but also from the agent's inability to leverage prior experience across episodes. While augmenting agents with historical experience offers a promising remedy, existing approaches suffer from a critical weakness: the experience distilled from history is either stored statically or fail to coevolve with the improving actor, causing a progressive misalignment between the experience and the actor's evolving capability that diminishes its utility over the course of training. Inspired by complementary learning systems in neuroscience, we present Complementary RL to achieve seamless co-evolution of an experience extractor and a policy actor within the RL optimization loop. Specifically, the actor is optimized via sparse outcome-based rewards, while the experience extractor is optimized according to whether its distilled experiences demonstrably contribute to the actor's success, thereby evolving its experience management strategy in lockstep with the actor's growing capabilities. Empirically, Complementary RL outperforms outcome-based agentic RL baselines that do not learn from experience, achieving 10% performance improvement in single-task scenarios and exhibits robust scalability in multi-task settings. These results establish Complementary RL as a paradigm for efficient experience-driven agent learning.

AI.tldr: 提出Complementary RL框架，通过让经验提取器与策略执行器协同进化，解决传统RL中经验与执行器能力不匹配的问题，提升样本效率。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习在训练LLM智能体时样本效率低，不仅因为稀疏奖励反馈，还因为智能体无法有效利用跨episode的历史经验。现有方法中，从历史中提取的经验要么静态存储，要么无法与改进中的执行器协同进化，导致经验与执行器能力逐渐不匹配，降低训练效果。
AI.method: 提出Complementary RL框架，受神经科学互补学习系统启发，在RL优化循环中实现经验提取器与策略执行器的无缝协同进化。执行器通过稀疏奖励优化，而经验提取器根据其提取的经验是否真正有助于执行器成功来优化，使经验管理策略与执行器能力同步进化。
AI.result: 实验表明，Complementary RL优于不学习经验的基于结果的智能体RL基线，在单任务场景中实现10%的性能提升，并在多任务设置中展现出强大的可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: Complementary RL建立了一个高效经验驱动智能体学习的新范式，通过协同进化机制解决了经验与执行器能力不匹配的问题，显著提升了样本效率。

title: Toward Phonology-Guided Sign Language Motion Generation: A Diffusion Baseline and Conditioning Analysis
summary: Generating natural, correct, and visually smooth 3D avatar sign language motion conditioned on the text inputs continues to be very challenging. In this work, we train a generative model of 3D body motion and explore the role of phonological attribute conditioning for sign language motion generation, using ASL-LEX 2.0 annotations such as hand shape, hand location and movement. We first establish a strong diffusion baseline using an Human Motion MDM-style diffusion model with SMPL-X representation, which outperforms SignAvatar, a state-of-the-art CVAE method, on gloss discriminability metrics. We then systematically study the role of text conditioning using different text encoders (CLIP vs. T5), conditioning modes (gloss-only vs. gloss+phonological attributes), and attribute notation format (symbolic vs. natural language). Our analysis reveals that translating symbolic ASL-LEX notations to natural language is a necessary condition for effective CLIP-based attribute conditioning, while T5 is largely unaffected by this translation. Furthermore, our best-performing variant (CLIP with mapped attributes) outperforms SignAvatar across all metrics. These findings highlight input representation as a critical factor for text-encoder-based attribute conditioning, and motivate structured conditioning approaches where gloss and phonological attributes are encoded through independent pathways.

AI.tldr: 研究探索语音属性条件对3D手语动作生成的影响，建立了基于扩散模型的基线系统，发现将符号化ASL-LEX标注转换为自然语言对CLIP编码器至关重要，最佳模型在所有指标上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 生成自然、正确且视觉流畅的基于文本输入的3D手语动作仍然非常具有挑战性。本研究旨在探索语音属性条件在手语动作生成中的作用，使用ASL-LEX 2.0标注（如手形、手部位置和运动）来改进生成质量。
AI.method: 首先建立基于Human Motion MDM风格的扩散模型基线，使用SMPL-X表示。然后系统研究不同文本编码器（CLIP vs. T5）、条件模式（仅gloss vs. gloss+语音属性）和属性表示格式（符号化 vs. 自然语言）对生成效果的影响。
AI.result: 研究发现将符号化ASL-LEX标注转换为自然语言是CLIP编码器有效条件化的必要条件，而T5编码器基本不受这种转换影响。最佳模型（CLIP配合映射属性）在所有指标上都超越了现有的SignAvatar方法。
AI.conclusion: 输入表示是文本编码器属性条件化的关键因素，这促使采用结构化条件方法，其中gloss和语音属性通过独立路径编码，为改进3D手语动作生成提供了重要见解。

title: ARES: Scalable and Practical Gradient Inversion Attack in Federated Learning through Activation Recovery
comment: 18 pages. To appear in the IEEE Symposium on Security and Privacy 2026
summary: Federated Learning (FL) enables collaborative model training by sharing model updates instead of raw data, aiming to protect user privacy. However, recent studies reveal that these shared updates can inadvertently leak sensitive training data through gradient inversion attacks (GIAs). Among them, active GIAs are particularly powerful, enabling high-fidelity reconstruction of individual samples even under large batch sizes. Nevertheless, existing approaches often require architectural modifications, which limit their practical applicability. In this work, we bridge this gap by introducing the Activation REcovery via Sparse inversion (ARES) attack, an active GIA designed to reconstruct training samples from large training batches without requiring architectural modifications. Specifically, we formulate the recovery problem as a noisy sparse recovery task and solve it using the generalized Least Absolute Shrinkage and Selection Operator (Lasso). To extend the attack to multi-sample recovery, ARES incorporates the imprint method to disentangle activations, enabling scalable per-sample reconstruction. We further establish the expected recovery rate and derive an upper bound on the reconstruction error, providing theoretical guarantees for the ARES attack. Extensive experiments on CNNs and MLPs demonstrate that ARES achieves high-fidelity reconstruction across diverse datasets, significantly outperforming prior GIAs under large batch sizes and realistic FL settings. Our results highlight that intermediate activations pose a serious and underestimated privacy risk in FL, underscoring the urgent need for stronger defenses.

AI.tldr: ARES是一种无需修改架构的主动梯度反演攻击，通过稀疏恢复方法从大训练批次中高保真重建训练样本，揭示了联邦学习中激活值的严重隐私风险。
AI.motivation: 尽管联邦学习通过共享模型更新而非原始数据来保护隐私，但研究表明梯度更新可能泄露敏感训练数据。现有主动梯度反演攻击虽然强大，但通常需要修改模型架构，限制了实际应用。
AI.method: 提出ARES攻击，将恢复问题建模为噪声稀疏恢复任务，使用广义LASSO求解。通过imprint方法分离激活，实现多样本恢复。建立了恢复率的期望和重建误差的上界。
AI.result: 在CNN和MLP上的实验表明，ARES在大批次和实际联邦学习设置下实现了高保真重建，显著优于现有梯度反演攻击方法。
AI.conclusion: 中间激活值在联邦学习中构成严重且被低估的隐私风险，迫切需要更强的防御措施。

title: Harnessing the Power of Foundation Models for Accurate Material Classification
summary: Material classification has emerged as a critical task in computer vision and graphics, supporting the assignment of accurate material properties to a wide range of digital and real-world applications. While traditionally framed as an image classification task, this domain faces significant challenges due to the scarcity of annotated data, limiting the accuracy and generalizability of trained models. Recent advances in vision-language foundation models (VLMs) offer promising avenues to address these issues, yet existing solutions leveraging these models still exhibit unsatisfying results in material recognition tasks. In this work, we propose a novel framework that effectively harnesses foundation models to overcome data limitations and enhance classification accuracy. Our method integrates two key innovations: (a) a robust image generation and auto-labeling pipeline that creates a diverse and high-quality training dataset with material-centric images, and automatically assigns labels by fusing object semantics and material attributes in text prompts; (b) a prior incorporation strategy to distill information from VLMs, combined with a joint fine-tuning method that optimizes a pre-trained vision foundation model alongside VLM-derived priors, preserving broad generalizability while adapting to material-specific features.Extensive experiments demonstrate significant improvements on multiple datasets. We show that our synthetic dataset effectively captures the characteristics of real world materials, and the integration of priors from vision-language models significantly enhances the final performance. The source code and dataset will be released.

AI.tldr: 提出一个利用基础模型解决材料分类数据稀缺问题的新框架，通过图像生成自动标注和先验知识融合提升分类性能
AI.motivation: 材料分类在计算机视觉和图形学中很重要，但面临标注数据稀缺的挑战，现有基于视觉语言基础模型的方法在材料识别任务中效果仍不理想
AI.method: 包含两个关键创新：(1) 鲁棒的图像生成和自动标注流程，创建多样化的材料中心图像数据集，通过融合物体语义和材料属性的文本提示自动分配标签；(2) 先验知识融合策略，从视觉语言模型中提取信息，结合联合微调方法优化预训练视觉基础模型和VLM先验
AI.result: 在多个数据集上取得显著改进，合成数据集能有效捕捉真实世界材料的特性，视觉语言模型先验的整合显著提升了最终性能
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架能有效利用基础模型克服数据限制并提高分类准确性，代码和数据集将开源

title: Benchmarking Reinforcement Learning via Stochastic Converse Optimality: Generating Systems with Known Optimal Policies
summary: The objective comparison of Reinforcement Learning (RL) algorithms is notoriously complex as outcomes and benchmarking of performances of different RL approaches are critically sensitive to environmental design, reward structures, and stochasticity inherent in both algorithmic learning and environmental dynamics. To manage this complexity, we introduce a rigorous benchmarking framework by extending converse optimality to discrete-time, control-affine, nonlinear systems with noise. Our framework provides necessary and sufficient conditions, under which a prescribed value function and policy are optimal for constructed systems, enabling the systematic generation of benchmark families via homotopy variations and randomized parameters. We validate it by automatically constructing diverse environments, demonstrating our framework's capacity for a controlled and comprehensive evaluation across algorithms. By assessing standard methods against a ground-truth optimum, our work delivers a reproducible foundation for precise and rigorous RL benchmarking.

AI.tldr: 提出一个强化学习算法的严格基准测试框架，通过扩展逆最优性到离散时间、控制仿射、非线性带噪声系统，为RL算法提供可重现的精确评估基础。
AI.motivation: 强化学习算法的比较非常复杂，因为结果和性能基准对环境设计、奖励结构和算法学习与环境动态中的随机性高度敏感。需要一种严格的基准测试框架来解决这一问题。
AI.method: 扩展逆最优性到离散时间、控制仿射、非线性带噪声系统，提供必要和充分条件来确定给定值函数和策略对于构造系统的最优性，通过同伦变化和随机化参数系统生成基准测试家族。
AI.result: 自动构建了多样化环境，展示了框架能够对算法进行受控和全面的评估。通过将标准方法与真实最优解进行比较，为精确严格的RL基准测试提供了可重现的基础。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为强化学习算法提供了系统化、可重现的基准测试方法，能够进行精确和严格的性能评估，解决了RL算法比较中的复杂性问题。

title: Gesture-Aware Pretraining and Token Fusion for 3D Hand Pose Estimation
summary: Estimating 3D hand pose from monocular RGB images is fundamental for applications in AR/VR, human-computer interaction, and sign language understanding. In this work we focus on a scenario where a discrete set of gesture labels is available and show that gesture semantics can serve as a powerful inductive bias for 3D pose estimation. We present a two-stage framework: gesture-aware pretraining that learns an informative embedding space using coarse and fine gesture labels from InterHand2.6M, followed by a per-joint token Transformer guided by gesture embeddings as intermediate representations for final regression of MANO hand parameters. Training is driven by a layered objective over parameters, joints, and structural constraints. Experiments on InterHand2.6M demonstrate that gesture-aware pretraining consistently improves single-hand accuracy over the state-of-the-art EANet baseline, and that the benefit transfers across architectures without any modification.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种利用手势语义作为归纳偏置的两阶段3D手部姿态估计框架，通过手势感知预训练和基于Transformer的关节回归，在InterHand2.6M数据集上超越了现有方法。
AI.motivation: 从单目RGB图像估计3D手部姿态对于AR/VR、人机交互和手语理解应用至关重要。现有方法通常忽略手势语义信息，而本文认为离散的手势标签可以作为强大的归纳偏置来提升姿态估计精度。
AI.method: 提出两阶段框架：1) 手势感知预训练，利用InterHand2.6M的粗粒度与细粒度手势标签学习信息丰富的嵌入空间；2) 基于手势嵌入引导的逐关节token Transformer，作为中间表示来回归MANO手部参数。训练采用分层目标函数，涵盖参数、关节和结构约束。
AI.result: 在InterHand2.6M数据集上的实验表明，手势感知预训练持续提升了单手姿态估计精度，超越了最先进的EANet基线。该方法的优势能够跨架构迁移，无需任何修改。
AI.conclusion: 手势语义可以作为有效的归纳偏置来提升3D手部姿态估计性能。提出的两阶段框架通过手势感知预训练和Transformer引导的回归，在保持架构通用性的同时实现了精度提升。

title: Discovering Decoupled Functional Modules in Large Language Models
summary: Understanding the internal functional organization of Large Language Models (LLMs) is crucial for improving their trustworthiness and performance. However, how LLMs organize different functions into modules remains highly unexplored. To bridge this gap, we formulate a functional module discovery problem and propose an Unsupervised LLM Cross-layer MOdule Discovery (ULCMOD) framework that simultaneously disentangles the large set of neurons in the entire LLM into modules while discovering the topics of input samples related to these modules. Our framework introduces a novel objective function and an efficient Iterative Decoupling (IterD) algorithm. Extensive experiments show that our method discovers high-quality, disentangled modules that capture more meaningful semantic information and achieve superior performance in various downstream tasks. Moreover, our qualitative analysis reveals that the discovered modules show semantic coherence, correspond to interpretable specializations, and a clear spatial and hierarchical organization within the LLM. Our work provides a novel tool for interpreting the functional modules of LLMs, filling a critical blank in LLM's interpretability research.

AI.tldr: 提出ULCMOD框架，通过无监督方法发现LLM中的功能模块，揭示神经元如何组织成具有特定语义功能的模块，并展示模块的空间和层次结构。
AI.motivation: 理解LLM内部功能组织对于提高其可信度和性能至关重要，但目前LLM如何将不同功能组织成模块仍未被充分探索。
AI.method: 提出ULCMOD框架，包含新的目标函数和高效的迭代解耦算法，同时将整个LLM的大量神经元解耦成模块，并发现与这些模块相关的输入样本主题。
AI.result: 方法发现了高质量、解耦的模块，能捕获更有意义的语义信息，在各种下游任务中表现优异。模块具有语义一致性、可解释的专业化特征，以及清晰的空间和层次组织。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为解释LLM的功能模块提供了新工具，填补了LLM可解释性研究的关键空白。

title: DSS-GAN: Directional State Space GAN with Mamba backbone for Class-Conditional Image Synthesis
summary: We present DSS-GAN, the first generative adversarial network to employ Mamba as a hierarchical generator backbone for noise-to-image synthesis. The central contribution is Directional Latent Routing (DLR), a novel conditioning mechanism that decomposes the latent vector into direction-specific subvectors, each jointly projected with a class embedding to produce a feature-wise affine modulation of the corresponding Mamba scan. Unlike conventional class conditioning that injects a global signal, DLR couples class identity and latent structure along distinct spatial axes of the feature map, applied consistently across all generative scales. DSS-GAN achieves improved FID, KID, and precision-recall scores compared to StyleGAN2-ADA across multiple tested datasets. Analysis of the latent space reveals that directional subvectors exhibit measurable specialization: perturbations along individual components produce structured, direction-correlated changes in the synthesized image.

AI.tldr: DSS-GAN首次使用Mamba作为分层生成器骨干进行噪声到图像合成，通过新颖的方向性潜在路由机制实现更好的条件生成。
AI.motivation: 传统GAN的条件机制通常注入全局信号，无法有效耦合类别身份和潜在结构在特征图的不同空间轴上。需要一种新的条件机制来更好地控制生成过程。
AI.method: 提出方向性潜在路由(DLR)，将潜在向量分解为方向特定的子向量，每个子向量与类别嵌入联合投影，产生对应Mamba扫描的特征级仿射调制。使用Mamba作为分层生成器骨干。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上相比StyleGAN2-ADA取得了改进的FID、KID和精度-召回分数。潜在空间分析显示方向性子向量表现出可测量的专业化：沿单个分量的扰动产生结构化、方向相关的图像变化。
AI.conclusion: DSS-GAN通过方向性潜在路由机制成功实现了类别身份和潜在结构在空间轴上的耦合，为条件生成提供了更精细的控制能力。

title: Motion-Adaptive Temporal Attention for Lightweight Video Generation with Stable Diffusion
comment: 6 pages, 3 figures, 4 tables. Published at IS&T Electronic Imaging 2026, GENAI Track
summary: We present a motion-adaptive temporal attention mechanism for parameter-efficient video generation built upon frozen Stable Diffusion models. Rather than treating all video content uniformly, our method dynamically adjusts temporal attention receptive fields based on estimated motion content: high-motion sequences attend locally across frames to preserve rapidly changing details, while low-motion sequences attend globally to enforce scene consistency. We inject lightweight temporal attention modules into all UNet transformer blocks via a cascaded strategy -- global attention in down-sampling and middle blocks for semantic stabilization, motion-adaptive attention in up-sampling blocks for fine-grained refinement. Combined with temporally correlated noise initialization and motion-aware gating, the system adds only 25.8M trainable parameters (2.9\% of the base UNet) while achieving competitive results on WebVid validation when trained on 100K videos. We demonstrate that the standard denoising objective alone provides sufficient implicit temporal regularization, outperforming approaches that add explicit temporal consistency losses. Our ablation studies reveal a clear trade-off between noise correlation and motion amplitude, providing a practical inference-time control for diverse generation behaviors.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于运动自适应的时序注意力机制，用于参数高效的视频生成，在冻结的Stable Diffusion模型基础上仅添加少量参数即可实现竞争性结果。
AI.motivation: 现有视频生成方法通常对所有视频内容采用统一的时序处理方式，未能根据运动内容动态调整注意力机制。高运动和低运动序列需要不同的时序关注策略来平衡细节保持和场景一致性。
AI.method: 1) 运动自适应时序注意力机制：根据估计的运动内容动态调整时序注意力感受野，高运动序列局部跨帧关注以保留快速变化细节，低运动序列全局关注以增强场景一致性；2) 级联注入策略：在UNet所有transformer块中注入轻量级时序注意力模块，下采样和中间块使用全局注意力进行语义稳定，上采样块使用运动自适应注意力进行细粒度优化；3) 时序相关噪声初始化和运动感知门控。
AI.result: 仅添加25.8M可训练参数（占基础UNet的2.9%），在100K视频训练后，在WebVid验证集上取得竞争性结果。标准去噪目标本身提供足够的隐式时序正则化，优于添加显式时序一致性损失的方法。消融研究揭示了噪声相关性与运动幅度之间的权衡关系。
AI.conclusion: 运动自适应时序注意力机制能够有效平衡视频生成中的细节保持和场景一致性，仅需少量额外参数即可实现高质量视频生成，为推理时控制提供了实用的噪声相关性-运动幅度权衡机制。

title: Only relative ranks matter in weight-clustered large language models
summary: Large language models (LLMs) contain billions of parameters, yet many exact values are not essential. We show that what matters most is the relative rank of weights-whether one connection is stronger or weaker than another-rather than precise magnitudes. To reduce the number of unique weight values, we apply weight clustering to pretrained models, replacing every weight matrix with K shared values from K-means. For Llama 3.1-8B-Instruct and SmolLM2-135M, reducing each matrix to only 16-64 distinct values preserves strong accuracy without retraining, providing a simple, training-free method to compress LLMs on disk. Optionally fine-tuning only the cluster means (centroids) recovers 30-40 percent of the remaining accuracy gap at minimal cost. We then systematically randomize cluster means while keeping assignments fixed. Scrambling the relative ranks of the clusters degrades quality sharply-perplexity can increase by orders of magnitude-even when global statistics such as mean and variance are preserved. In contrast, rank-preserving randomizations cause almost no loss at mid and late layers. On the other hand, when many layers are perturbed simultaneously, progressive layer-by-layer replacement reveals that scale drift-not rank distortion-is the dominant collapse mechanism; however, an affine correction w' = aw + b with a > 0 (which preserves both rank order and overall weight distribution) can substantially delay this drift. This rank-based perspective offers a new lens on model compression and robustness.

AI.tldr: 论文提出权重相对排序比精确数值更重要，通过权重聚类将LLM压缩到16-64个不同值，无需训练即可保持准确性，并揭示了保持排序比保持统计分布更关键。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型包含数十亿参数，但许多精确值并非必需。研究发现权重相对排序（连接强弱关系）比精确数值更重要，这为模型压缩提供了新视角。
AI.method: 使用K-means聚类对预训练模型的权重矩阵进行压缩，将每个矩阵替换为K个共享值；可选地微调聚类中心以恢复精度；通过随机化聚类中心值来研究排序和统计分布的影响。
AI.result: 将每个矩阵压缩到16-64个不同值即可保持强准确性；微调聚类中心可恢复30-40%精度损失；破坏聚类相对排序会严重降低质量，而保持排序的随机化几乎无损失；尺度漂移是主要崩溃机制，但仿射校正可显著延迟。
AI.conclusion: 权重相对排序是LLM功能的关键因素，基于排序的压缩方法简单有效，为模型压缩和鲁棒性提供了新视角，仿射变换可缓解尺度漂移问题。

title: Flow Matching Policy with Entropy Regularization
summary: Diffusion-based policies have gained significant popularity in Reinforcement Learning (RL) due to their ability to represent complex, non-Gaussian distributions. Stochastic Differential Equation (SDE)-based diffusion policies often rely on indirect entropy control due to the intractability of the exact entropy, while also suffering from computationally prohibitive policy gradients through the iterative denoising chain. To overcome these issues, we propose Flow Matching Policy with Entropy Regularization (FMER), an Ordinary Differential Equation (ODE)-based online RL framework. FMER parameterizes the policy via flow matching and samples actions along a straight probability path, motivated by optimal transport. FMER leverages the model's generative nature to construct an advantage-weighted target velocity field from a candidate set, steering policy updates toward high-value regions. By deriving a tractable entropy objective, FMER enables principled maximum-entropy optimization for enhanced exploration. Experiments on sparse multi-goal FrankaKitchen benchmarks demonstrate that FMER outperforms state-of-the-art methods, while remaining competitive on standard MuJoco benchmarks. Moreover, FMER reduces training time by 7x compared to heavy diffusion baselines (QVPO) and 10-15% relative to efficient variants.

AI.tldr: FMER提出基于流匹配和熵正则化的ODE在线强化学习框架，通过直线概率路径采样动作，相比扩散策略训练更快、熵控制更直接。
AI.motivation: 现有基于SDE的扩散策略存在两个问题：1) 由于精确熵难以计算，只能依赖间接熵控制；2) 通过迭代去噪链计算策略梯度计算代价过高。需要更高效、可扩展的策略表示方法。
AI.method: FMER采用基于ODE的流匹配策略，通过最优传输思想在直线概率路径上采样动作。利用生成模型特性构建优势加权目标速度场，从候选集中引导策略更新至高价值区域。推导出可处理的熵目标，实现原则性的最大熵优化。
AI.result: 在稀疏多目标FrankaKitchen基准测试中超越最先进方法，在标准MuJoco基准测试中保持竞争力。相比QVPO等扩散基线训练时间减少7倍，相比高效变体减少10-15%。
AI.conclusion: FMER提供了一种高效、可扩展的ODE-based RL框架，通过流匹配和直接熵正则化解决了扩散策略的计算和熵控制问题，在复杂任务中表现出色且训练效率显著提升。

title: Joint Degradation-Aware Arbitrary-Scale Super-Resolution for Variable-Rate Extreme Image Compression
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on BroadCasting
summary:
Recent diffusion-based extreme image compression methods have demonstrated remarkable performance at ultra-low bitrates. However, most approaches require training separate diffusion models for each target bitrate, resulting in substantial computational overhead and hindering practical deployment. Meanwhile, recent studies have shown that joint super-resolution can serve as an effective approach for enhancing low-bitrate reconstruction. However, when moving toward ultra-low bitrate regimes, these methods struggle due to severe information loss, and their reliance on fixed super-resolution scales prevents flexible adaptation across diverse bitrates.
  To address these limitations, we propose ASSR-EIC, a novel image compression framework that leverages arbitrary-scale super-resolution (ASSR) to support variable-rate extreme image compression (EIC). An arbitrary-scale downsampling module is introduced at the encoder side to provide controllable rate reduction, while a diffusion-based, joint degradation-aware ASSR decoder enables rate-adaptive reconstruction within a single model. We exploit the compression- and rescaling-aware diffusion prior to guide the reconstruction, yielding high fidelity and high realism restoration across diverse compression and rescaling settings. Specifically, we design a global compression-rescaling adaptor that offers holistic guidance for rate adaptation, and a local compression-rescaling modulator that dynamically balances generative and fidelity-oriented behaviors to achieve fine-grained, bitrate-adaptive detail restoration. To further enhance reconstruction quality, we introduce a dual semantic-enhanced design.
  Extensive experiments demonstrate that ASSR-EIC delivers state-of-the-art performance in extreme image compression while simultaneously supporting flexible bitrate control and adaptive rate-dependent reconstruction.

AI.tldr: ASSR-EIC：基于任意尺度超分辨率的可变码率极端图像压缩框架，通过单一模型支持多种码率，在极低码率下实现高质量重建
AI.motivation: 现有扩散基极端图像压缩方法需要为每个目标码率训练单独模型，计算开销大且部署困难。同时，现有联合超分辨率方法在极低码率下效果不佳，且固定超分辨率尺度无法适应不同码率需求
AI.method: 提出ASSR-EIC框架：编码器端引入任意尺度下采样模块实现可控码率降低；解码器端采用基于扩散的联合退化感知任意尺度超分辨率解码器，支持单一模型内的码率自适应重建。利用压缩和缩放感知扩散先验指导重建，设计全局压缩-缩放适配器和局部压缩-缩放调制器，并引入双重语义增强设计
AI.result: 实验表明ASSR-EIC在极端图像压缩中达到最先进性能，同时支持灵活的码率控制和自适应码率相关重建
AI.conclusion: ASSR-EIC成功解决了现有极端图像压缩方法的局限性，通过任意尺度超分辨率实现了可变码率压缩，在单一模型中支持多种码率设置，为极端图像压缩提供了高效实用的解决方案

title: Loc3R-VLM: Language-based Localization and 3D Reasoning with Vision-Language Models
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have made impressive progress in connecting vision and language, but they still struggle with spatial understanding and viewpoint-aware reasoning. Recent efforts aim to augment the input representations with geometric cues rather than explicitly teaching models to reason in 3D space. We introduce Loc3R-VLM, a framework that equips 2D Vision-Language Models with advanced 3D understanding capabilities from monocular video input. Inspired by human spatial cognition, Loc3R-VLM relies on two joint objectives: global layout reconstruction to build a holistic representation of the scene structure, and explicit situation modeling to anchor egocentric perspective. These objectives provide direct spatial supervision that grounds both perception and language in a 3D context. To ensure geometric consistency and metric-scale alignment, we leverage lightweight camera pose priors extracted from a pre-trained 3D foundation model. Loc3R-VLM achieves state-of-the-art performance in language-based localization and outperforms existing 2D- and video-based approaches on situated and general 3D question-answering benchmarks, demonstrating that our spatial supervision framework enables strong 3D understanding. Project page: https://kevinqu7.github.io/loc3r-vlm

AI.tldr: Loc3R-VLM是一个为2D视觉语言模型增加3D理解能力的框架，通过单目视频输入实现空间认知，在语言定位和3D问答任务上达到SOTA
AI.motivation: 当前多模态大语言模型在空间理解和视角感知推理方面仍有不足，现有方法主要通过在输入中添加几何线索而非显式教授3D推理能力
AI.method: 受人类空间认知启发，采用两个联合目标：全局布局重建构建场景结构整体表示，显式情境建模锚定自我中心视角；利用预训练3D基础模型的轻量相机姿态先验确保几何一致性和度量尺度对齐
AI.result: 在语言定位任务上达到最先进性能，在情境和通用3D问答基准上优于现有2D和视频方法
AI.conclusion: 空间监督框架能够实现强大的3D理解能力，为2D视觉语言模型赋能高级3D认知

title: Objective Mispricing Detection for Shortlisting Undervalued Football Players via Market Dynamics and News Signals
summary:
We present a practical, reproducible framework for identifying undervalued football players grounded in objective mispricing. Instead of relying on subjective expert labels, we estimate an expected market value from structured data (historical market dynamics, biographical and contract features, transfer history) and compare it to the observed valuation to define mispricing. We then assess whether news-derived Natural Language Processing (NLP) features (i.e., sentiment statistics and semantic embeddings from football articles) complement market signals for shortlisting undervalued players.
  Using a chronological (leakage-aware) evaluation, gradient-boosted regression explains a large share of the variance in log-transformed market value. For undervaluation shortlisting, ROC-AUC-based ablations show that market dynamics are the primary signal, while NLP features provide consistent, secondary gains that improve robustness and interpretability. SHAP analyses suggest the dominance of market trends and age, with news-derived volatility cues amplifying signals in high-uncertainty regimes. The proposed pipeline is designed for decision support in scouting workflows, emphasizing ranking/shortlisting over hard classification thresholds, and includes a concise reproducibility and ethics statement.

AI.tldr: 提出一个基于客观错误定价识别被低估足球球员的实用框架，通过市场价值预测与新闻NLP特征结合来筛选被低估球员
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖主观专家标签，需要更客观、可重复的框架来识别被低估的足球球员，为球探工作提供决策支持
AI.method: 使用结构化数据（历史市场动态、传记合同特征、转会历史）预测市场价值，与观察价值比较定义错误定价；加入新闻NLP特征（情感统计和语义嵌入）；采用时序评估和梯度提升回归
AI.result: 梯度提升回归能解释市场价值的大部分方差；市场动态是主要信号，NLP特征提供一致的次要增益；SHAP分析显示市场趋势和年龄占主导，新闻波动线索在高不确定性情况下增强信号
AI.conclusion: 提出的管道适用于球探工作流程的决策支持，强调排名/筛选而非硬分类阈值，包含可重复性和伦理声明

title: Mutually Causal Semantic Distillation Network for Zero-Shot Learning
comment: Accepted to IJCV. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2203.03137
summary: Zero-shot learning (ZSL) aims to recognize the unseen classes in the open-world guided by the side-information (e.g., attributes). Its key task is how to infer the latent semantic knowledge between visual and attribute features on seen classes, and thus conducting a desirable semantic knowledge transfer from seen classes to unseen ones. Prior works simply utilize unidirectional attention within a weakly-supervised manner to learn the spurious and limited latent semantic representations, which fail to effectively discover the intrinsic semantic knowledge (e.g., attribute semantic) between visual and attribute features. To solve the above challenges, we propose a mutually causal semantic distillation network (termed MSDN++) to distill the intrinsic and sufficient semantic representations for ZSL. MSDN++ consists of an attribute$\rightarrow$visual causal attention sub-net that learns attribute-based visual features, and a visual$\rightarrow$attribute causal attention sub-net that learns visual-based attribute features. The causal attentions encourages the two sub-nets to learn causal vision-attribute associations for representing reliable features with causal visual/attribute learning. With the guidance of semantic distillation loss, the two mutual attention sub-nets learn collaboratively and teach each other throughout the training process. Extensive experiments on three widely-used benchmark datasets (e.g., CUB, SUN, AWA2, and FLO) show that our MSDN++ yields significant improvements over the strong baselines, leading to new state-of-the-art performances.

AI.tldr: MSDN++是一个用于零样本学习的相互因果语义蒸馏网络，通过双向因果注意力机制学习视觉和属性特征之间的内在语义表示，在多个基准数据集上取得了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有零样本学习方法通常使用弱监督的单向注意力机制，学习到的潜在语义表示是虚假且有限的，无法有效发现视觉和属性特征之间的内在语义知识（如属性语义）。
AI.method: 提出相互因果语义蒸馏网络（MSDN++），包含两个子网络：属性→视觉因果注意力子网络学习基于属性的视觉特征，视觉→属性因果注意力子网络学习基于视觉的属性特征。通过因果注意力机制学习因果视觉-属性关联，并在语义蒸馏损失的指导下相互协作学习。
AI.result: 在CUB、SUN、AWA2和FLO等广泛使用的基准数据集上进行大量实验，MSDN++相比强基线方法有显著改进，达到了新的最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: MSDN++通过双向因果注意力机制和相互蒸馏学习，能够提取内在且充分的语义表示，有效解决了零样本学习中语义知识转移的挑战。

title: Can Blindfolded LLMs Still Trade? An Anonymization-First Framework for Portfolio Optimization
comment: Accepted at the ICLR 2026 Workshop on Advances in Financial AI (FinAI). 18 pages, 7 figures
summary: For LLM trading agents to be genuinely trustworthy, they must demonstrate understanding of market dynamics rather than exploitation of memorized ticker associations. Building responsible multi-agent systems demands rigorous signal validation: proving that predictions reflect legitimate patterns, not pre-trained recall. We address two sources of spurious performance: memorization bias from ticker-specific pre-training, and survivorship bias from flawed backtesting. Our approach is to blindfold the agents--anonymizing all identifiers--and verify whether meaningful signals persist. BlindTrade anonymizes tickers and company names, and four LLM agents output scores along with reasoning. We construct a GNN graph from reasoning embeddings and trade using PPO-DSR policy. On 2025 YTD (through 2025-08-01), we achieved Sharpe 1.40 +/- 0.22 across 20 seeds and validated signal legitimacy through negative control experiments. To assess robustness beyond a single OOS window, we additionally evaluate an extended period (2024--2025), revealing market-regime dependency: the policy excels in volatile conditions but shows reduced alpha in trending bull markets.

AI.tldr: 论文提出BlindTrade方法，通过匿名化股票代码和公司名称来验证LLM交易代理是否真正理解市场动态而非依赖记忆，使用GNN和PPO-DSR策略在2025年实现Sharpe 1.40，并发现策略在波动市场中表现更好。
AI.motivation: 确保LLM交易代理真正理解市场动态而非依赖预训练记忆，解决记忆偏差和幸存者偏差问题，构建可信赖的多代理系统。
AI.method: 采用盲测方法：匿名化所有股票代码和公司名称，四个LLM代理输出评分和推理，从推理嵌入构建GNN图，使用PPO-DSR策略进行交易。
AI.result: 在2025年YTD（至2025-08-01）实现Sharpe 1.40 ± 0.22（20个种子平均），通过负控制实验验证信号有效性。在2024-2025年扩展测试中，发现策略在波动市场中表现优异，但在趋势性牛市中alpha减少。
AI.conclusion: BlindTrade方法能有效验证LLM交易信号的合法性，策略表现具有市场状态依赖性，为构建可信赖的LLM交易系统提供了验证框架。

title: Towards Motion-aware Referring Image Segmentation
summary: Referring Image Segmentation (RIS) requires identifying objects from images based on textual descriptions. We observe that existing methods significantly underperform on motion-related queries compared to appearance-based ones. To address this, we first introduce an efficient data augmentation scheme that extracts motion-centric phrases from original captions, exposing models to more motion expressions without additional annotations. Second, since the same object can be described differently depending on the context, we propose Multimodal Radial Contrastive Learning (MRaCL), performed on fused image-text embeddings rather than unimodal representations. For comprehensive evaluation, we introduce a new test split focusing on motion-centric queries, and introduce a new benchmark called M-Bench, where objects are distinguished primarily by actions. Extensive experiments show our method substantially improves performance on motion-centric queries across multiple RIS models, maintaining competitive results on appearance-based descriptions. Codes are available at https://github.com/snuviplab/MRaCL

AI.tldr: 提出针对Referring Image Segmentation中运动相关查询性能不足的问题，通过数据增强和多模态对比学习提升模型对运动描述的理解能力
AI.motivation: 现有Referring Image Segmentation方法在处理运动相关查询时性能显著低于外观描述查询，需要解决模型对运动表达理解不足的问题
AI.method: 1. 高效数据增强方案：从原始标注中提取运动中心短语，无需额外标注即可让模型接触更多运动表达；2. 多模态径向对比学习：在融合的图像-文本嵌入上执行对比学习，而非单模态表示
AI.result: 提出的方法显著提升了多个RIS模型在运动中心查询上的性能，同时在外观描述上保持竞争力；创建了新的测试划分M-Bench用于全面评估
AI.conclusion: 通过数据增强和多模态对比学习的结合，有效解决了RIS中运动相关查询性能不足的问题，为处理上下文相关的对象描述提供了有效方案

title: Predicting Trajectories of Long COVID in Adult Women: The Critical Role of Causal Disentanglement
summary: Early prediction of Post-Acute Sequelae of SARS-CoV-2 severity is a critical challenge for women's health, particularly given the diagnostic overlap between PASC and common hormonal transitions such as menopause. Identifying and accounting for these confounding factors is essential for accurate long-term trajectory prediction. We conducted a retrospective study of 1,155 women (mean age 61) from the NIH RECOVER dataset. By integrating static clinical profiles with four weeks of longitudinal wearable data (monitoring cardiac activity and sleep), we developed a causal network based on a Large Language Model to predict future PASC scores. Our framework achieved a precision of 86.7\% in clinical severity prediction. Our causal attribution analysis demonstrate the model's ability to differentiate between active pathology and baseline noise: direct indicators such as breathlessness and malaise reached maximum saliency (1.00), while confounding factors like menopause and diabetes were successfully suppressed with saliency scores below 0.27.

AI.tldr: 基于LLM的因果网络模型，整合临床数据和可穿戴设备数据，能够高精度预测女性COVID-19后遗症严重程度，并能有效区分真实病理信号与更年期等混杂因素。
AI.motivation: COVID-19后遗症（PASC）的早期预测对女性健康至关重要，但PASC症状与更年期等常见激素转变存在诊断重叠，需要准确区分这些混杂因素以实现精准的长期轨迹预测。
AI.method: 回顾性研究1,155名女性患者，整合静态临床档案和四周纵向可穿戴设备数据（监测心脏活动和睡眠），基于大语言模型构建因果网络来预测未来PASC评分。
AI.result: 临床严重程度预测精度达到86.7%；因果归因分析显示模型能有效区分病理信号与基线噪声：呼吸困难、不适等直接指标达到最大显著性（1.00），而更年期、糖尿病等混杂因素被成功抑制（显著性低于0.27）。
AI.conclusion: 该因果网络框架不仅能高精度预测PASC严重程度，还能有效识别和抑制混杂因素，为女性COVID-19后遗症的精准预测提供了有力工具。

title: SHIFT: Motion Alignment in Video Diffusion Models with Adversarial Hybrid Fine-Tuning
summary: Image-conditioned Video diffusion models achieve impressive visual realism but often suffer from weakened motion fidelity, e.g., reduced motion dynamics or degraded long-term temporal coherence, especially after fine-tuning. We study the problem of motion alignment in video diffusion models post-training. To address this, we introduce pixel-motion rewards based on pixel flux dynamics, capturing both instantaneous and long-term motion consistency. We further propose Smooth Hybrid Fine-tuning (SHIFT), a scalable reward-driven fine-tuning framework for video diffusion models. SHIFT fuses the normal supervised fine-tuning and advantage weighted fine-tuning into a unified framework. Benefiting from novel adversarial advantages, SHIFT improves convergence speed and mitigates reward hacking. Experiments show that our approach efficiently resolves dynamic-degree collapse in modern video diffusion models supervised fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: 提出SHIFT框架，通过像素运动奖励和混合微调解决视频扩散模型微调后的运动保真度下降问题
AI.motivation: 图像条件视频扩散模型在视觉真实性方面表现出色，但在微调后经常出现运动保真度下降的问题，如运动动态减弱或长期时间一致性退化
AI.method: 提出基于像素通量动态的像素运动奖励，捕捉瞬时和长期运动一致性；设计SHIFT框架，将监督微调和优势加权微调融合，利用新颖的对抗优势提高收敛速度并减轻奖励攻击
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效解决现代视频扩散模型监督微调中的动态度崩溃问题
AI.conclusion: SHIFT框架通过像素运动奖励和混合微调策略，成功提升了视频扩散模型的运动保真度，解决了微调后的运动退化问题

title: Embedding World Knowledge into Tabular Models: Towards Best Practices for Embedding Pipeline Design
summary: Embeddings are a powerful way to enrich data-driven machine learning models with the world knowledge of large language models (LLMs). Yet, there is limited evidence on how to design effective LLM-based embedding pipelines for tabular prediction. In this work, we systematically benchmark 256 pipeline configurations, covering 8 preprocessing strategies, 16 embedding models, and 2 downstream models. Our results show that it strongly depends on the specific pipeline design whether incorporating the prior knowledge of LLMs improves the predictive performance. In general, concatenating embeddings tends to outperform replacing the original columns with embeddings. Larger embedding models tend to yield better results, while public leaderboard rankings and model popularity are poor performance indicators. Finally, gradient boosting decision trees tend to be strong downstream models. Our findings provide researchers and practitioners with guidance for building more effective embedding pipelines for tabular prediction tasks.

AI.tldr: 系统评估了256种LLM嵌入管道配置在表格预测任务中的表现，发现管道设计对性能影响显著，拼接嵌入优于替换原始列，大模型表现更好，梯度提升决策树是强下游模型
AI.motivation: 目前缺乏关于如何为表格预测任务设计有效LLM嵌入管道的证据，需要系统评估不同配置对预测性能的影响
AI.method: 系统基准测试256种管道配置，涵盖8种预处理策略、16种嵌入模型和2种下游模型，评估LLM嵌入在表格预测中的效果
AI.result: 管道设计对性能影响显著；拼接嵌入优于替换原始列；大嵌入模型表现更好；公开排行榜排名和模型流行度是差的性能指标；梯度提升决策树是强下游模型
AI.conclusion: 为研究人员和从业者提供了构建更有效表格预测嵌入管道的指导，强调管道设计的重要性而非单纯依赖模型规模或流行度

title: ECHO: Towards Emotionally Appropriate and Contextually Aware Interactive Head Generation
summary: In natural face-to-face interaction, participants seamlessly alternate between speaking and listening, producing facial behaviors (FBs) that are finely informed by long-range context and naturally exhibit contextual appropriateness and emotional rationality. Interactive Head Generation (IHG) aims to synthesize lifelike avatar head video emulating such capabilities. Existing IHG methods typically condition on dual-track signals (i.e., human user's behaviors and pre-defined audio for avatar) within a short temporal window, jointly driving generation of avatar's audio-aligned lip articulation and non-verbal FBs. However, two main challenges persist in these methods: (i) the reliance on short-clip behavioral cues without long-range contextual modeling leads them to produce facial behaviors lacking contextual appropriateness; and (ii) the entangled, role-agnostic fusion of dual-track signals empirically introduces cross-signal interference, potentially compromising lip-region synchronization during speaking. To this end, we propose ECHO, a novel IHG framework comprising two key components: a Long-range Contextual Understanding (LCU) component that facilitates contextual understanding of both behavior-grounded dynamics and linguistic-driven affective semantics to promote contextual appropriateness and emotional rationality of synthesized avatar FBs; and a block-wise Spatial-aware Decoupled Cross-attention Modulation (SDCM) module, that preserves self-audio-driven lip articulation while adaptively integrating user contextual behavioral cues for non-lip facial regions, complemented by our designed two-stage training paradigm, to jointly enhance lip synchronization and visual fidelity. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of proposed components and ECHO's superior IHG performance.

AI.tldr: 论文提出ECHO框架，通过长程上下文理解和空间感知解耦交叉注意力模块，解决交互式头部生成中上下文适当性和唇部同步的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有交互式头部生成方法依赖短时行为线索，缺乏长程上下文建模，导致面部行为缺乏上下文适当性；同时双轨信号融合方式存在交叉干扰，可能损害唇部同步质量。
AI.method: 提出ECHO框架：1) 长程上下文理解组件，建模行为动态和语言驱动的情感语义；2) 块级空间感知解耦交叉注意力模块，保持音频驱动的唇部运动，同时自适应整合用户行为线索到非唇部区域；3) 两阶段训练范式。
AI.result: 大量实验证明所提组件的有效性，ECHO在交互式头部生成任务上表现出优越性能。
AI.conclusion: ECHO框架通过长程上下文建模和空间解耦的信号融合，显著提升了生成头像的面部行为上下文适当性、情感合理性和唇部同步质量。

title: Towards Infinitely Long Neural Simulations: Self-Refining Neural Surrogate Models for Dynamical Systems
summary: Recent advances in autoregressive neural surrogate models have enabled orders-of-magnitude speedups in simulating dynamical systems. However, autoregressive models are generally prone to distribution drift: compounding errors in autoregressive rollouts that severely degrade generation quality over long time horizons. Existing work attempts to address this issue by implicitly leveraging the inherent trade-off between short-time accuracy and long-time consistency through hyperparameter tuning. In this work, we introduce a unifying mathematical framework that makes this tradeoff explicit, formalizing and generalizing hyperparameter-based strategies in existing approaches. Within this framework, we propose a robust, hyperparameter-free model implemented as a conditional diffusion model that balances short-time fidelity with long-time consistency by construction. Our model, Self-refining Neural Surrogate model (SNS), can be implemented as a standalone model that refines its own autoregressive outputs or as a complementary model to existing neural surrogates to ensure long-time consistency. We also demonstrate the numerical feasibility of SNS through high-fidelity simulations of complex dynamical systems over arbitrarily long time horizons.

AI.tldr: 提出SNS模型，通过条件扩散模型平衡短期精度与长期一致性，解决自回归神经代理模型中的分布漂移问题
AI.motivation: 自回归神经代理模型在模拟动力系统时存在分布漂移问题，即自回归展开中的累积误差会严重降低长期生成质量。现有方法通过超参数调优隐式利用短期精度与长期一致性之间的权衡，但缺乏明确的数学框架。
AI.method: 提出统一的数学框架，使短期精度与长期一致性的权衡显式化。在此基础上，提出SNS（Self-refining Neural Surrogate）模型，这是一个无需超参数的条件扩散模型，通过构造平衡短期保真度与长期一致性。SNS可以作为独立模型优化自身自回归输出，或作为现有神经代理模型的补充模型。
AI.result: SNS模型在复杂动力系统的高保真模拟中表现出数值可行性，能够在任意长的时间范围内保持模拟质量。
AI.conclusion: SNS模型通过条件扩散方法有效解决了自回归神经代理模型的分布漂移问题，为长期动力系统模拟提供了稳健的解决方案，既可作为独立模型使用，也可增强现有神经代理模型的长期一致性。

title: AdaZoom-GUI: Adaptive Zoom-based GUI Grounding with Instruction Refinement
summary: GUI grounding is a critical capability for vision-language models (VLMs) that enables automated interaction with graphical user interfaces by locating target elements from natural language instructions. However, grounding on GUI screenshots remains challenging due to high-resolution images, small UI elements, and ambiguous user instructions. In this work, we propose AdaZoom-GUI, an adaptive zoom-based GUI grounding framework that improves both localization accuracy and instruction understanding. Our approach introduces an instruction refinement module that rewrites natural language commands into explicit and detailed descriptions, allowing the grounding model to focus on precise element localization. In addition, we design a conditional zoom-in strategy that selectively performs a second-stage inference on predicted small elements, improving localization accuracy while avoiding unnecessary computation and context loss on simpler cases. To support this framework, we construct a high-quality GUI grounding dataset and train the grounding model using Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), enabling the model to predict both click coordinates and element bounding boxes. Experiments on public benchmarks demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance among models with comparable or even larger parameter sizes, highlighting its effectiveness for high-resolution GUI understanding and practical GUI agent deployment.

AI.tldr: AdaZoom-GUI：基于自适应缩放的GUI定位框架，通过指令细化和条件放大策略提升GUI元素定位精度
AI.motivation: GUI定位是视觉语言模型的关键能力，但当前面临高分辨率图像、小UI元素和模糊用户指令的挑战，需要更精确的定位和指令理解方法
AI.method: 1) 指令细化模块：将自然语言指令重写为明确详细描述；2) 条件放大策略：对预测的小元素进行第二阶段推理；3) 使用GRPO训练模型预测点击坐标和边界框
AI.result: 在公开基准测试中达到最先进性能，在可比或更大参数规模的模型中表现优异，证明了高分辨率GUI理解和实际GUI代理部署的有效性
AI.conclusion: AdaZoom-GUI框架通过自适应缩放方法显著提升了GUI定位的准确性和效率，为GUI自动化交互提供了实用解决方案

title: Attention Sinks Induce Gradient Sinks
summary: Attention sinks and massive activations are recurring and closely related phenomena in Transformer models. Existing studies have largely focused on the forward pass, making it unclear whether their connection is direct or mediated by a training-time mechanism. We study this question from the perspective of backpropagation. Empirically and theoretically, we show that under causal mask, attention sinks can induce pronounced gradient concentration, which we term gradient sinks. Furthermore, in pre-norm architectures with RMSNorm, massive activations can be understood as an adaptive response to this localized gradient pressure during training. To test this hypothesis, we introduce V-scale, a modification that adjusts value-path backpropagated gradients. In pretrained V-scale models, attention sinks are preserved whereas massive activations are suppressed. These results support the interpretation that gradient sink is a key training-time mediator linking attention sinks and massive activations.

AI.tldr: 研究发现注意力汇聚（attention sinks）在因果掩码下会导致梯度汇聚（gradient sinks），而大规模激活（massive activations）是训练期间对这种梯度压力的自适应响应。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注Transformer模型的前向传播，不清楚注意力汇聚和大规模激活之间的连接是直接的还是由训练时机制介导的。本文从反向传播的角度研究这个问题。
AI.method: 通过实证和理论分析，研究因果掩码下注意力汇聚如何导致梯度汇聚。引入V-scale修改来调整值路径的反向传播梯度，测试梯度汇聚作为中介机制的假设。
AI.result: 在预训练的V-scale模型中，注意力汇聚得以保留而大规模激活被抑制。这支持了梯度汇聚是连接注意力汇聚和大规模激活的关键训练时中介机制。
AI.conclusion: 梯度汇聚是连接注意力汇聚和大规模激活的关键训练时中介机制，大规模激活是预归一化架构中对局部梯度压力的自适应响应。

title: FACE-net: Factual Calibration and Emotion Augmentation for Retrieval-enhanced Emotional Video Captioning
summary: Emotional Video Captioning (EVC) is an emerging task, which aims to describe factual content with the intrinsic emotions expressed in videos. Existing works perceive global emotional cues and then combine with video content to generate descriptions. However, insufficient factual and emotional cues mining and coordination during generation make their methods difficult to deal with the factual-emotional bias, which refers to the factual and emotional requirements being different in different samples on generation. To this end, we propose a retrieval-enhanced framework with FActual Calibration and Emotion augmentation (FACE-net), which through a unified architecture collaboratively mines factual-emotional semantics and provides adaptive and accurate guidance for generation, breaking through the compromising tendency of factual-emotional descriptions in all sample learning. Technically, we firstly introduces an external repository and retrieves the most relevant sentences with the video content to augment the semantic information. Subsequently, our factual calibration via uncertainty estimation module splits the retrieved information into subject-predicate-object triplets, and self-refines and cross-refines different components through video content to effectively mine the factual semantics; while our progressive visual emotion augmentation module leverages the calibrated factual semantics as experts, interacts with the video content and emotion dictionary to generate visual queries and candidate emotions, and then aggregates them to adaptively augment emotions to each factual semantics. Moreover, to alleviate the factual-emotional bias, we design a dynamic bias adjustment routing module to predict and adjust the degree of bias of a sample.

AI.tldr: 提出FACE-net框架，通过检索增强、事实校准和情感增强解决情感视频描述中的事实-情感偏差问题
AI.motivation: 现有情感视频描述方法在挖掘和协调事实与情感线索方面不足，难以处理不同样本中事实与情感需求不同的偏差问题
AI.method: 提出检索增强框架FACE-net，包含外部知识库检索、基于不确定性估计的事实校准、渐进式视觉情感增强和动态偏差调整路由模块
AI.result: 通过统一架构协同挖掘事实-情感语义，为生成提供自适应准确指导，突破所有样本学习中事实-情感描述的妥协倾向
AI.conclusion: FACE-net框架有效解决了情感视频描述中的事实-情感偏差问题，通过检索增强、事实校准和情感增强机制提升了描述质量

title: RangeAD: Fast On-Model Anomaly Detection
summary: In practice, machine learning methods commonly require anomaly detection (AD) to filter inputs or detect distributional shifts. Typically, this is implemented by running a separate AD model alongside the primary model. However, this separation ignores the fact that the primary model already encodes substantial information about the target distribution. In this paper, we introduce On-Model AD, a setting for anomaly detection that explicitly leverages access to a related machine learning model. Within this setting, we propose RangeAD, an algorithm that utilizes neuron-wise output ranges derived from the primary model. RangeAD achieves superior performance even on high-dimensional tasks while incurring substantially lower inference costs. Our results demonstrate the potential of the On-Model AD setting as a practical framework for efficient anomaly detection.

AI.tldr: 提出On-Model AD框架，利用主模型内部信息进行异常检测，避免额外独立AD模型的开销
AI.motivation: 传统异常检测需要运行独立的AD模型，忽略了主模型已经编码了大量目标分布信息，造成资源浪费
AI.method: 提出RangeAD算法，利用主模型的神经元输出范围进行异常检测，显著降低推理成本
AI.result: RangeAD在高维任务上表现优异，同时大幅降低推理开销，证明了On-Model AD框架的实用性
AI.conclusion: On-Model AD为高效异常检测提供了实用框架，通过利用主模型已有信息实现更优性能

title: AR-CoPO: Align Autoregressive Video Generation with Contrastive Policy Optimization
summary: Streaming autoregressive (AR) video generators combined with few-step distillation achieve low-latency, high-quality synthesis, yet remain difficult to align via reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF). Existing SDE-based GRPO methods face challenges in this setting: few-step ODEs and consistency model samplers deviate from standard flow-matching ODEs, and their short, low-stochasticity trajectories are highly sensitive to initialization noise, rendering intermediate SDE exploration ineffective. We propose AR-CoPO (AutoRegressive Contrastive Policy Optimization), a framework that adapts the Neighbor GRPO contrastive perspective to streaming AR generation. AR-CoPO introduces chunk-level alignment via a forking mechanism that constructs neighborhood candidates at a randomly selected chunk, assigns sequence-level rewards, and performs localized GRPO updates. We further propose a semi-on-policy training strategy that complements on-policy exploration with exploitation over a replay buffer of reference rollouts, improving generation quality across domains. Experiments on Self-Forcing demonstrate that AR-CoPO improves both out-of-domain generalization and in-domain human preference alignment over the baseline, providing evidence of genuine alignment rather than reward hacking.

AI.tldr: AR-CoPO：针对流式自回归视频生成器的强化学习对齐框架，通过分块级对比策略优化解决现有方法在少步采样下的对齐难题
AI.motivation: 现有的SDE-based GRPO方法在流式自回归视频生成器上难以有效对齐，因为少步ODE和一致性模型采样器偏离标准流匹配ODE，且短轨迹对初始化噪声高度敏感，导致中间SDE探索失效
AI.method: AR-CoPO采用分块级对齐机制：1）在随机选择的分块处通过分叉机制构建邻域候选；2）分配序列级奖励；3）执行局部GRPO更新。同时提出半在线策略训练策略，结合在线探索和参考轨迹回放缓冲区的利用
AI.result: 在Self-Forcing上的实验表明，AR-CoPO在域外泛化和域内人类偏好对齐方面均优于基线，提供了真正对齐而非奖励黑客的证据
AI.conclusion: AR-CoPO成功地将对比策略优化框架适配到流式自回归生成场景，解决了现有强化学习方法在该设置下的对齐挑战，实现了更有效的视频生成器对齐

title: Dropout Robustness and Cognitive Profiling of Transformer Models via Stochastic Inference
summary:
Transformer-based language models are widely deployed for reasoning, yet their behavior under inference-time stochasticity remains underexplored. While dropout is common during training, its inference-time effects via Monte Carlo sampling lack systematic evaluation across architectures, limiting understanding of model reliability in uncertainty-aware applications.
  This work analyzes dropout-induced variability across 19 transformer models using MC Dropout with 100 stochastic forward passes per sample. Dropout robustness is defined as maintaining high accuracy and stable predictions under stochastic inference, measured by standard deviation of per-run accuracies. A cognitive decomposition framework disentangles performance into memory and reasoning components. Experiments span five dropout configurations yielding 95 unique evaluations on 1,000 samples.
  Results reveal substantial architectural variation. Smaller models demonstrate perfect prediction stability while medium-sized models exhibit notable volatility. Mid-sized models achieve the best overall performance; larger models excel at memory tasks. Critically, 53% of models suffer severe accuracy degradation under baseline MC Dropout, with task-specialized models losing up to 24 percentage points, indicating unsuitability for uncertainty quantification in these architectures. Asymmetric effects emerge: high dropout reduces memory accuracy by 27 percentage points while reasoning degrades only 1 point, suggesting memory tasks rely on stable representations that dropout disrupts. 84% of models demonstrate memory-biased performance.
  This provides the first comprehensive MC Dropout benchmark for transformers, revealing dropout robustness is architecture-dependent and uncorrelated with scale. The cognitive profiling framework offers actionable guidance for model selection in uncertainty-aware applications.

AI.tldr: 本文首次系统评估了19个Transformer模型在推理时随机性（MC Dropout）下的表现，发现模型对dropout的鲁棒性高度依赖于架构而非规模，53%的模型在基线MC Dropout下出现严重精度下降，不适合不确定性量化应用。
AI.motivation: Transformer语言模型在推理时随机性（如dropout）下的行为尚未得到充分研究，限制了模型在不确定性感知应用中的可靠性评估。需要系统评估不同架构模型在MC Dropout下的表现，为模型选择提供指导。
AI.method: 使用MC Dropout方法，对19个Transformer模型进行100次随机前向传播采样。采用认知分解框架将性能分解为记忆和推理组件。实验涵盖5种dropout配置，在1000个样本上进行95次独特评估。
AI.result: 发现显著的架构差异：小模型预测稳定，中等模型波动大；中等规模模型整体性能最佳，大模型在记忆任务上表现优异。53%的模型在基线MC Dropout下精度严重下降（最高24个百分点）。记忆任务受dropout影响更大（下降27个百分点），推理任务仅下降1个百分点。84%的模型表现出记忆偏向性能。
AI.conclusion: 这是首个全面的Transformer MC Dropout基准测试，表明dropout鲁棒性依赖于架构而非规模。认知分析框架为不确定性感知应用中的模型选择提供了实用指导，揭示了现有模型在不确定性量化方面的局限性。

title: VirPro: Visual-referred Probabilistic Prompt Learning for Weakly-Supervised Monocular 3D Detection
summary: Monocular 3D object detection typically relies on pseudo-labeling techniques to reduce dependency on real-world annotations. Recent advances demonstrate that deterministic linguistic cues can serve as effective auxiliary weak supervision signals, providing complementary semantic context. However, hand-crafted textual descriptions struggle to capture the inherent visual diversity of individuals across scenes, limiting the model's ability to learn scene-aware representations. To address this challenge, we propose Visual-referred Probabilistic Prompt Learning (VirPro), an adaptive multi-modal pretraining paradigm that can be seamlessly integrated into diverse weakly supervised monocular 3D detection frameworks. Specifically, we generate a diverse set of learnable, instance-conditioned prompts across scenes and store them in an Adaptive Prompt Bank (APB). Subsequently, we introduce Multi-Gaussian Prompt Modeling (MGPM), which incorporates scene-based visual features into the corresponding textual embeddings, allowing the text prompts to express visual uncertainties. Then, from the fused vision-language embeddings, we decode a prompt-targeted Gaussian, from which we derive a unified object-level prompt embedding for each instance. RoI-level contrastive matching is employed to enforce modality alignment, bringing embeddings of co-occurring objects within the same scene closer in the latent space, thus enhancing semantic coherence. Extensive experiments on the KITTI benchmark demonstrate that integrating our pretraining paradigm consistently yields substantial performance gains, achieving up to a 4.8% average precision improvement than the baseline.

AI.tldr: 提出VirPro方法，通过自适应多模态预训练增强弱监督单目3D检测，利用视觉引导的概率提示学习来捕捉场景视觉多样性，在KITTI基准上实现4.8%的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 单目3D检测通常依赖伪标签技术，现有方法使用确定性语言提示作为弱监督信号，但手工制作的文本描述难以捕捉不同场景中个体的视觉多样性，限制了模型学习场景感知表示的能力。
AI.method: 提出视觉引导的概率提示学习(VirPro)：1) 构建自适应提示库(APB)存储可学习的实例条件提示；2) 引入多高斯提示建模(MGPM)，将场景视觉特征融入文本嵌入以表达视觉不确定性；3) 从融合的视觉语言嵌入解码提示目标高斯分布，获得统一的对象级提示嵌入；4) 使用RoI级对比匹配增强模态对齐和语义连贯性。
AI.result: 在KITTI基准上的大量实验表明，集成该预训练范式能带来显著的性能提升，相比基线方法平均精度提升高达4.8%。
AI.conclusion: VirPro通过自适应多模态预训练有效解决了弱监督单目3D检测中手工文本提示难以捕捉视觉多样性的问题，提出的概率提示学习方法能够增强场景感知表示，提升检测性能。

title: Federated Distributional Reinforcement Learning with Distributional Critic Regularization
summary: Federated reinforcement learning typically aggregates value functions or policies by parameter averaging, which emphasizes expected return and can obscure statistical multimodality and tail behavior that matter in safety-critical settings. We formalize federated distributional reinforcement learning (FedDistRL), where clients parametrize quantile value function critics and federate these networks only. We also propose TR-FedDistRL, which builds a per client, risk-aware Wasserstein barycenter over a temporal buffer. This local barycenter provides a reference region to constrain the parameter averaged critic, ensuring necessary distributional information is not averaged out during the federation process. The distributional trust region is implemented as a shrink-squash step around this reference. Under fixed-policy evaluation, the feasibility map is nonexpansive and the update is contractive in a probe-set Wasserstein metric under evaluation. Experiments on a bandit, multi-agent gridworld, and continuous highway environment show reduced mean-smearing, improved safety proxies (catastrophe/accident rate), and lower critic/policy drift versus mean-oriented and non-federated baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出联邦分布强化学习(FedDistRL)，通过量化价值函数和Wasserstein重心约束，解决传统联邦RL中参数平均导致的分布信息丢失问题，提升安全关键场景下的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统联邦强化学习通过参数平均聚合价值函数或策略，强调期望回报但会模糊统计多模态和尾部行为，这在安全关键场景中至关重要。需要一种能保留分布信息的方法。
AI.method: 提出FedDistRL框架，客户端参数化量化价值函数critics并仅联邦化这些网络。进一步提出TR-FedDistRL，为每个客户端构建基于时间缓冲区的风险感知Wasserstein重心，作为参考区域约束参数平均的critic，通过shrink-squash步骤实现分布信任区域。
AI.result: 在固定策略评估下，可行性映射是非扩张的，更新在探针集Wasserstein度量下是收缩的。实验在老虎机、多智能体网格世界和连续高速公路环境中显示：减少了均值模糊、改善了安全代理指标（灾难/事故率）、降低了critic/策略漂移。
AI.conclusion: FedDistRL和TR-FedDistRL能有效保留分布信息，避免传统联邦RL中的均值模糊问题，在安全关键场景中提供更好的性能和安全保障。

title: Revisiting Cross-Attention Mechanisms: Leveraging Beneficial Noise for Domain-Adaptive Learning
summary: Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) seeks to transfer knowledge from a labeled source domain to an unlabeled target domain but often suffers from severe domain and scale gaps that degrade performance. Existing cross-attention-based transformers can align features across domains, yet they struggle to preserve content semantics under large appearance and scale variations. To explicitly address these challenges, we introduce the concept of beneficial noise, which regularizes cross-attention by injecting controlled perturbations, encouraging the model to ignore style distractions and focus on content. We propose the Domain-Adaptive Cross-Scale Matching (DACSM) framework, which consists of a Domain-Adaptive Transformer (DAT) for disentangling domain-shared content from domain-specific style, and a Cross-Scale Matching (CSM) module that adaptively aligns features across multiple resolutions. DAT incorporates beneficial noise into cross-attention, enabling progressive domain translation with enhanced robustness, yielding content-consistent and style-invariant representations. Meanwhile, CSM ensures semantic consistency under scale changes. Extensive experiments on VisDA-2017, Office-Home, and DomainNet demonstrate that DACSM achieves state-of-the-art performance, with up to +2.3% improvement over CDTrans on VisDA-2017. Notably, DACSM achieves a +5.9% gain on the challenging "truck" class of VisDA, evidencing the strength of beneficial noise in handling scale discrepancies. These results highlight the effectiveness of combining domain translation, beneficial-noise-enhanced attention, and scale-aware alignment for robust cross-domain representation learning.

AI.tldr: 提出DACSM框架，通过有益噪声增强的跨注意力机制和多尺度匹配，解决无监督域自适应中的域差异和尺度差异问题
AI.motivation: 现有基于跨注意力的Transformer方法在处理大外观和尺度变化时难以保持内容语义，导致域自适应性能下降
AI.method: 提出DACSM框架，包含域自适应Transformer（DAT）和跨尺度匹配（CSM）模块。DAT通过注入有益噪声来正则化跨注意力，分离域共享内容和域特定风格；CSM在多分辨率下自适应对齐特征
AI.result: 在VisDA-2017、Office-Home和DomainNet上达到SOTA性能，VisDA-2017上比CDTrans提升2.3%，在"卡车"类上提升5.9%
AI.conclusion: 结合域翻译、有益噪声增强的注意力和尺度感知对齐，能有效实现鲁棒的跨域表示学习

title: Symmetry-Reduced Physics-Informed Learning of Tensegrity Dynamics
summary: Tensegrity structures possess intrinsic geometric symmetries that govern their dynamic behavior. However, most existing physics-informed neural network (PINN) approaches for tensegrity dynamics do not explicitly exploit these symmetries, leading to high computational complexity and unstable optimization. In this work, we propose a symmetry-reduced physics-informed neural network (SymPINN) framework that embeds group-theory-based symmetry directly into both the solution expression and the neural network architecture to predict tensegrity dynamics. By decomposing nodes into symmetry orbits and representing free nodal coordinates using a symmetry basis, the proposed method constructs a reduced coordinate representation that preserves geometric symmetry of the structure. The full coordinates are then recovered via symmetry transformations of the reduced solution learned by the network, ensuring that the predicted configurations automatically satisfy the symmetry constraints. In this framework, equivariance is enforced through orbit-based coordinate generation, symmetry-consistent message passing, and physics residual constraints. In addition, SymPINN improves training effectiveness by encoding initial conditions as hard constraints, incorporating Fourier feature encoding to enhance the representation of dynamic motions, and employing a two-stage optimization strategy. Extensive numerical experiments on symmetric T-bars and lander structures demonstrate significantly improved prediction accuracy and computational efficiency compared to standard physics-informed models, indicating the great potential of symmetry-aware learning for structure-preserving modeling of tensegrity dynamics.

AI.tldr: 提出SymPINN框架，将群论对称性嵌入PINN中预测张拉整体结构动力学，通过对称轨道分解和对称基表示，显著提升预测精度和计算效率。
AI.motivation: 现有PINN方法未充分利用张拉整体结构的固有几何对称性，导致计算复杂度高且优化不稳定。需要开发能显式利用对称性的方法。
AI.method: 提出SymPINN框架：1) 将节点分解为对称轨道，用对称基表示自由节点坐标；2) 通过对称变换恢复完整坐标；3) 通过轨道坐标生成、对称一致消息传递和物理残差约束强制等变性；4) 编码初始条件为硬约束，使用傅里叶特征编码，采用两阶段优化策略。
AI.result: 在对称T型杆和着陆器结构上的数值实验表明，相比标准物理信息模型，预测精度和计算效率显著提升。
